## File: frontend/src/features/auth/components/AuthLayout.jsx
````javascript
 1: import { Outlet, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
 2: import { CityBackground } from '../../../components/ui/CityBackground';
 3: import { useTheme } from '../../../context/ThemeContext';
 4: export default function AuthLayout() {
 5:     const { isDark } = useTheme();
 6:     const location = useLocation();
 7:     // Determinamos si estamos en la ruta de registro para animar la cámara
 8:     const isRegister = location.pathname === '/register';
 9:     return (
10:         <div style={{ position: 'relative', width: '100vw', height: '100vh', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
11:             {/* El fondo 3D se renderiza una vez a nivel de Layout */}
12:             <CityBackground isDark={isDark} isRegister={isRegister} />
13:             {/* El contenido de Login o Register se superpone */}
14:             <div style={{ position: 'absolute', inset: 0, zIndex: 10, overflowY: 'auto' }}>
15:                 <Outlet />
16:             </div>
17:         </div>
18:     );
19: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/auth/components/GroupSelector.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
  3: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  4: export default function GroupSelector({ userData, onComplete }) {
  5:     const [groups, setGroups] = useState([]);
  6:     const [selectedGroup, setSelectedGroup] = useState('');
  7:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  8:     const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  9:     const navigate = useNavigate();
 10:     useEffect(() => {
 11:         fetchGroups();
 12:     }, []);
 13:     const fetchGroups = async () => {
 14:         try {
 15:             const response = await api.get('/api/groups');
 16:             setGroups(response.data);
 17:         } catch (error) {
 18:             console.error('Error fetching groups:', error);
 19:             // Mock data for development
 20:             setGroups([
 21:                 { id: '5a', nombre: '5A', turno: 'Matutino' },
 22:                 { id: '5b', nombre: '5B', turno: 'Vespertino' },
 23:                 { id: '6a', nombre: '6A', turno: 'Matutino' },
 24:                 { id: '6b', nombre: '6B', turno: 'Vespertino' },
 25:             ]);
 26:         } finally {
 27:             setLoading(false);
 28:         }
 29:     };
 30:     const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
 31:         e.preventDefault();
 32:         if (!selectedGroup) return;
 33:         setSubmitting(true);
 34:         try {
 35:             await api.put(`/api/users/${userData.userId}/group`, {
 36:                 grupoId: selectedGroup
 37:             });
 38:             onComplete?.();
 39:             navigate('/dashboard');
 40:         } catch (error) {
 41:             console.error('Error updating group:', error);
 42:         } finally {
 43:             setSubmitting(false);
 44:         }
 45:     };
 46:     if (loading) {
 47:         return (
 48:             <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen">
 49:                 <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-blue-500"></div>
 50:             </div>
 51:         );
 52:     }
 53:     return (
 54:         <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-100 p-4">
 55:             <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8 max-w-md w-full">
 56:                 <div className="text-center mb-8">
 57:                     <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800">¡Bienvenido!</h1>
 58:                     <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">
 59:                         {userData?.rol === 'Alumno'
 60:                             ? 'Selecciona tu grupo para continuar'
 61:                             : 'Selecciona los grupos que impartes'}
 62:                     </p>
 63:                     {userData?.matricula && (
 64:                         <div className="mt-4 inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 text-sm font-medium">
 65:                             Matrícula: {userData.matricula}
 66:                         </div>
 67:                     )}
 68:                 </div>
 69:                 <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
 70:                     <div>
 71:                         <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-3">
 72:                             {userData?.rol === 'Alumno' ? 'Tu grupo' : 'Grupos asignados'}
 73:                         </label>
 74:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
 75:                             {groups.map((group) => (
 76:                                 <button
 77:                                     key={group.id}
 78:                                     type="button"
 79:                                     onClick={() => setSelectedGroup(group.id)}
 80:                                     className={`p-4 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all duration-200 ${selectedGroup === group.id
 81:                                             ? 'border-blue-500 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700'
 82:                                             : 'border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300 text-gray-700'
 83:                                         }`}
 84:                                 >
 85:                                     <div className="text-lg font-bold">{group.nombre}</div>
 86:                                     <div className="text-sm opacity-75">{group.turno}</div>
 87:                                 </button>
 88:                             ))}
 89:                         </div>
 90:                     </div>
 91:                     <button
 92:                         type="submit"
 93:                         disabled={!selectedGroup || submitting}
 94:                         className="w-full py-3 px-4 bg-blue-600 text-white font-medium rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
 95:                     >
 96:                         {submitting ? 'Guardando...' : 'Continuar'}
 97:                     </button>
 98:                 </form>
 99:             </div>
100:         </div>
101:     );
102: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/auth/components/RoleGuard.jsx
````javascript
 1: import { Navigate, Outlet } from 'react-router-dom';
 2: import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
 3: export default function RoleGuard({ allowedRoles }) {
 4:     const { userData, loading } = useAuth();
 5:     if (loading) {
 6:         return <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50">
 7:             <div className="w-8 h-8 border-2 border-gray-400 border-t-gray-900 rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
 8:         </div>;
 9:     }
10:     if (!userData || !allowedRoles.includes(userData.rol)) {
11:         // Redirect unauthorized users to dashboard or login
12:         return <Navigate to="/dashboard" replace />;
13:     }
14:     return <Outlet />;
15: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/RubricRadarChart.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useMemo } from 'react';
  2: import { Radar, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip } from 'recharts';
  3: import { Trophy, Info } from 'lucide-react';
  4: const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload }) => {
  5:     if (active && payload && payload.length) {
  6:         return (
  7:             <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] p-3 rounded-lg shadow-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50">
  8:                 <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white capitalize">
  9:                     {payload[0].payload.subject}
 10:                 </p>
 11:                 <p className="text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 font-bold">
 12:                     {payload[0].value}% <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">de puntuación máxima</span>
 13:                 </p>
 14:             </div>
 15:         );
 16:     }
 17:     return null;
 18: };
 19: export function RubricRadarChart({ project }) {
 20:     const { hasVotes, data, highestCriterium } = useMemo(() => {
 21:         if (!project || !project.votantes) {
 22:             return { hasVotes: false, data: [], highestCriterium: null };
 23:         }
 24:         const votersCount = Object.keys(project.votantes).length;
 25:         if (votersCount === 0) {
 26:             return { hasVotes: false, data: [], highestCriterium: null };
 27:         }
 28:         const maxPoints = votersCount * 12.5; // El backend suma hasta 12.5 pts por criterio (5 estrellas * 2.5)
 29:         // Mapeo seguro en caso de que algún punto sea indefinido o nulo
 30:         const getPct = (points) => {
 31:             if (!points || maxPoints === 0) return 0;
 32:             return Number(((points / maxPoints) * 100).toFixed(1));
 33:         };
 34:         const chartData = [
 35:             { subject: 'UI/UX', A: getPct(project.puntosUIUX), fullMark: 100 },
 36:             { subject: 'Innovación', A: getPct(project.puntosInovacion), fullMark: 100 },
 37:             { subject: 'Presentación', A: getPct(project.puntosPresentacion), fullMark: 100 },
 38:             { subject: 'Impacto', A: getPct(project.puntosImpacto), fullMark: 100 },
 39:         ];
 40:         // Encontrar el valor más alto
 41:         const max = chartData.reduce((prev, current) => (prev.A > current.A) ? prev : current);
 42:         return {
 43:             hasVotes: true,
 44:             data: chartData,
 45:             highestCriterium: max.A > 0 ? max : null
 46:         };
 47:     }, [project]);
 48:     if (!hasVotes) {
 49:         return (
 50:             <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center h-full min-h-[300px]">
 51:                 <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4 text-gray-400">
 52:                     <Info size={28} />
 53:                 </div>
 54:                 <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-2">Sin Evaluaciones</h3>
 55:                 <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-sm max-w-[250px]">
 56:                     Tu proyecto no ha recibido votos estructurados. ¡Comparte tu proyecto para obtener feedback!
 57:                 </p>
 58:             </div>
 59:         );
 60:     }
 61:     return (
 62:         <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col h-full min-h-[350px]">
 63:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
 64:                 <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Análisis de Desempeño</h3>
 65:                 {highestCriterium && (
 66:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-900/20 text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-500 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border border-amber-200 dark:border-amber-800/50">
 67:                         <Trophy size={14} />
 68:                         <span>Destaca en {highestCriterium.subject}</span>
 69:                     </div>
 70:                 )}
 71:             </div>
 72:             <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mb-6">
 73:                 Porcentaje de aprobación basado en la evaluación de la rúbrica.
 74:             </p>
 75:             <div className="flex-1 w-full relative min-h-[250px] -mt-4">
 76:                 <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
 77:                     <RadarChart cx="50%" cy="50%" outerRadius="70%" data={data}>
 78:                         <PolarGrid stroke="#334155" strokeDasharray="3 3" opacity={0.3} />
 79:                         <PolarAngleAxis 
 80:                             dataKey="subject"
````

````javascript
  1: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';

  5: export function TeacherDashboard({ userData, projects, groupName, searchQuery, onProjectClick }) {

  8:         hidden: { opacity: 0 },
  9:         visible: {
 10:             opacity: 1,

 18:             y: 0,

 20:         }

 31:         (p.liderNombre?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
 32:     );

 34:         <div className="space-y-8">
 35:             {/* Header: Greeting */}
 36:             <div className="bg-slate-900 rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-10 text-white relative overflow-hidden shadow-xl">

 46:                         )}
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/pages/CalendarPage.jsx

````javascript
  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Calendar as CalendarIcon, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Clock, Users } from 'lucide-react';
  3: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  4: export default function CalendarPage() {
  5:     const [currentDate] = useState(new Date());
  6:     // Get current month info
  7:     const monthNames = ["Enero", "Febrero", "Marzo", "Abril", "Mayo", "Junio",
  8:         "Julio", "Agosto", "Septiembre", "Octubre", "Noviembre", "Diciembre"];
  9:     const dayNames = ["L", "M", "M", "J", "V", "S", "D"];
 10:     const currentMonth = currentDate.getMonth();
 11:     const currentYear = currentDate.getFullYear();
 12:     const today = currentDate.getDate();
 13:     // Calculate days in month
 14:     const firstDay = new Date(currentYear, currentMonth, 1).getDay();
 15:     const daysInMonth = new Date(currentYear, currentMonth + 1, 0).getDate();
 16:     const adjustedFirstDay = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1; // Adjust for Monday start
 17:     // Generate calendar days
 18:     const calendarDays = [];
 19:     for (let i = 0; i < adjustedFirstDay; i++) {
 20:         calendarDays.push(null);
 21:     }
 22:     for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
 23:         calendarDays.push(day);
 24:     }
 25:     // Mock events
 26:     const events = {
 27:         15: { title: "Entrega Hito 1", color: "blue" },
 28:         22: { title: "Revisión", color: "green" },
 29:         28: { title: "Presentación", color: "indigo" }
 30:     };
 31:     return (
 32:         <div className="space-y-6 h-full flex flex-col">
 33:             {/* Header */}
 34:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 35:                 <div>
 36:                     <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Agenda</h1>
 37:                     <p className="text-gray-500">Próximas entregas y reuniones de equipo.</p>
 38:                 </div>
 39:                 <div className="flex gap-2">

 53:                 initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}

100:                                     }
101:                                 `}
````

## File: frontend/src/features/profile/components/GlobeBanner.jsx
````javascript
 1: import createGlobe from "cobe";
 2: import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
 3: import { usePerformance } from "../../../hooks/usePerformance";
 4: export function GlobeBanner() {
 5:     const canvasRef = useRef();
 6:     const { isLowEnd } = usePerformance();
 7:     useEffect(() => {
 8:         if (isLowEnd || !canvasRef.current) return;
 9:         let phi = 0;
10:         const size = 260;
11:         const globe = createGlobe(canvasRef.current, {
12:             devicePixelRatio: 1,
13:             width: size,
14:             height: size,
15:             phi: 0,
16:             theta: 0.1,
17:             dark: 1,
18:             diffuse: 1.2,
19:             mapSamples: 8000,
20:             mapBrightness: 6,
21:             baseColor: [0.1, 0.2, 0.4],
22:             markerColor: [0.1, 0.5, 1],
23:             glowColor: [0.05, 0.1, 0.35],
24:             markers: [
25:                 { location: [20.9674, -89.6227], size: 0.08 }, // Mérida
26:                 { location: [19.4326, -99.1332], size: 0.05 }, // CDMX
27:                 { location: [37.7749, -122.4194], size: 0.05 } // SF
28:             ],
29:             onRender: (state) => {
30:                 state.phi = phi;
31:                 phi += 0.002;
32:             },
33:         });
34:         return () => {
35:             globe.destroy();
36:         };
37:     }, [isLowEnd]);
38:     return (
39:         // Posicionado en la mitad derecha del banner, centrado verticalmente
40:         // Sin overflow hidden ni transforms que lo corten
41:         <div
42:             className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-end pr-16 pointer-events-none"
43:             style={{ mixBlendMode: 'screen' }}
44:         >
45:             <canvas
46:                 ref={canvasRef}
47:                 style={{
48:                     width: 260,
49:                     height: 260,
50:                     opacity: 0.92,
51:                 }}
52:             />
53:         </div>
54:     );
55: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/projects/components/ProjectPDFExport.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
  3: import { Download, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
  4: import QRCode from 'react-qr-code';
  5: // Utility for defensive metadata parsing (same as CanvasEditor)
  6: const getNormalizedMetadata = (metadata) => {
  7:     if (!metadata) return {};
  8:     if (typeof metadata === 'string') { try { return JSON.parse(metadata); } catch { return {}; } }
  9:     return metadata;
 10: };
 11: const getTableData = (block) => {
 12:     const meta = getNormalizedMetadata(block.metadata);
 13:     let raw = meta?.table || meta?.Table;
 14:     if (typeof raw === 'string') { try { raw = JSON.parse(raw); } catch { raw = null; } }
 15:     if (!raw) return { rows: [], hasHeader: true };
 16:     let rows = raw.rows || raw.Rows || [];
 17:     if (Array.isArray(rows)) {
 18:         rows = rows.map(row => {
 19:             if (typeof row === 'string') { try { return JSON.parse(row); } catch { return [row]; } }
 20:             return Array.isArray(row) ? row : [String(row)];
 21:         });
 22:     }
 23:     const hasHeader = raw.hasHeader ?? raw.HasHeader ?? true;
 24:     return { rows, hasHeader };
 25: };
 26: // Strip all HTML tags and decode basic entities
 27: const stripHtml = (html) => {
 28:     if (!html) return '';
 29:     return html
 30:         .replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, '\n')
 31:         .replace(/<\/p>/gi, '\n')
 32:         .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '')
 33:         .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
 34:         .replace(/&lt;/g, '<')
 35:         .replace(/&gt;/g, '>')
 36:         .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
 37:         .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
 38:         .trim();
 39: };
 40: // Draw wrapped text and return the new Y position
 41: const addWrappedText = (doc, text, x, y, maxWidth, lineHeight) => {
 42:     const lines = doc.splitTextToSize(text, maxWidth);
 43:     doc.text(lines, x, y);
 44:     return y + lines.length * lineHeight;
 45: };
 46: export function ProjectPDFExportButton({ project, creadorNombre }) {
 47:     const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);
 48:     const publicUrl = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? `${window.location.origin}/showcase` : 'https://integradorhub.com';
 49:     const handleExportPDF = async () => {
 50:         if (!project) return;
 51:         setIsExporting(true);
 52:         try {
 53:             // Pre-fetch all image blocks as base64 so we can embed them in the PDF
 54:             const blocks = project?.canvas || project?.canvasBlocks || [];
 55:             const imageBlocks = Array.isArray(blocks) ? blocks.filter(b => b.type === 'image' && b.content) : [];
 56:             const imageCache = {};
 57:             await Promise.allSettled(
 58:                 imageBlocks.map(async (block) => {
 59:                     try {
 60:                         const resp = await fetch(block.content, { mode: 'cors' });
 61:                         const blob = await resp.blob();
 62:                         const base64 = await new Promise((res) => {
 63:                             const reader = new FileReader();
 64:                             reader.onloadend = () => res(reader.result);
 65:                             reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
 66:                         });
 67:                         // Detect format from mime type
 68:                         const mime = blob.type || 'image/jpeg';
 69:                         const fmt = mime.includes('png') ? 'PNG' : mime.includes('gif') ? 'GIF' : 'JPEG';
 70:                         imageCache[block.id] = { base64, fmt };
 71:                     } catch { /* skip images that fail to load */ }
 72:                 })
 73:             );
 74:             const doc = new jsPDF({ orientation: 'portrait', unit: 'mm', format: 'a4' });
 75:             const W = doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();     // 210
 76:             const H = doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();    // 297
 77:             const margin = 20;
 78:             const contentW = W - margin * 2;
 79:             let y = margin;
 80:             const LINE_SM = 5;
 81:             const LINE_MD = 6;
 82:             const LINE_LG = 8;
 83:             const newPage = () => {
 84:                 doc.addPage();
 85:                 y = margin;
 86:             };
 87:             const checkY = (needed = 10) => {
 88:                 if (y + needed > H - margin) newPage();
 89:             };
 90:             // ── HEADER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 91:             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
 92:             doc.setFontSize(22);
 93:             doc.setTextColor(17, 24, 39);
 94:             const titleLines = doc.splitTextToSize(project.titulo || 'Sin Título', contentW - 30);
 95:             doc.text(titleLines, margin, y);
 96:             y += titleLines.length * LINE_LG + 2;
 97:             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
 98:             doc.setFontSize(10);
 99:             doc.setTextColor(107, 114, 128);
100:             doc.text(`${project.materia || ''} • Ciclo ${project.ciclo || ''}`, margin, y);
101:             y += LINE_MD;
102:             // Divider
103:             doc.setDrawColor(229, 231, 235);
104:             doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
105:             doc.line(margin, y, W - margin, y);
106:             y += 8;
107:             // ── INFO GRID ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
108:             // Left: Responsable
109:             doc.setFillColor(239, 246, 255);
110:             doc.roundedRect(margin, y, contentW / 2 - 3, 22, 3, 3, 'F');
111:             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
112:             doc.setFontSize(7);
113:             doc.setTextColor(59, 130, 246);
114:             doc.text('RESPONSABLE', margin + 4, y + 6);
115:             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
116:             doc.setFontSize(11);
117:             doc.setTextColor(31, 41, 55);
118:             doc.text(creadorNombre || 'N/A', margin + 4, y + 13);
119:             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
120:             doc.setFontSize(8);
121:             doc.setTextColor(107, 114, 128);
122:             doc.text('Líder de Proyecto', margin + 4, y + 19);
123:             // Right: Stack
124:             const rx = margin + contentW / 2 + 3;
125:             doc.setFillColor(249, 250, 251);
126:             doc.roundedRect(rx, y, contentW / 2 - 3, 22, 3, 3, 'F');
127:             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
128:             doc.setFontSize(7);
129:             doc.setTextColor(107, 114, 128);
130:             doc.text('TECNOLOGÍAS', rx + 4, y + 6);
131:             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
132:             doc.setFontSize(9);
133:             doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
134:             const stack = (project.stackTecnologico || []).join(' • ') || 'No especificado';
135:             const stackLines = doc.splitTextToSize(stack, contentW / 2 - 10);
136:             doc.text(stackLines, rx + 4, y + 13);
137:             y += 28;
138:             // ── TEAM ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
139:             if (project.members?.length > 0) {
140:                 checkY(14);
141:                 doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
142:                 doc.setFontSize(11);
143:                 doc.setTextColor(17, 24, 39);
144:                 doc.text('Equipo', margin, y);
145:                 y += LINE_MD;
146:                 doc.setDrawColor(229, 231, 235);
147:                 doc.line(margin, y, W - margin, y);
148:                 y += 5;
149:                 doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
150:                 doc.setFontSize(9);
151:                 project.members.forEach(m => {
152:                     checkY(6);
153:                     const name = m.nombre && m.nombre !== 'Usuario' ? m.nombre : m.email;
154:                     const role = m.rol || 'Miembro';
155:                     doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
156:                     doc.text(`• ${name}`, margin + 3, y);
157:                     doc.setTextColor(107, 114, 128);
158:                     doc.text(role, W - margin - doc.getTextWidth(role), y);
159:                     y += LINE_SM + 1;
160:                 });
161:                 y += 4;
162:             }
163:             // ── CANVAS BLOCKS ─────────────────────────────────────────────
164:             const canvas = project?.canvas || project?.canvasBlocks || [];
165:             if (Array.isArray(canvas) && canvas.length > 0) {
166:                 checkY(14);
167:                 doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
168:                 doc.setFontSize(11);
169:                 doc.setTextColor(17, 24, 39);
170:                 doc.text('Detalles del Proyecto', margin, y);
171:                 y += LINE_MD;
172:                 doc.setDrawColor(229, 231, 235);
173:                 doc.line(margin, y, W - margin, y);
174:                 y += 6;
175:                 for (const block of canvas) {
176:                     checkY(10);
177:                     const text = stripHtml(block.content || '');
178:                     switch (block.type) {
179:                         case 'h1':
180:                             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
181:                             doc.setFontSize(16);
182:                             doc.setTextColor(17, 24, 39);
183:                             y = addWrappedText(doc, text, margin, y, contentW, LINE_LG + 2);
184:                             y += 3;
185:                             break;
186:                         case 'h2':
187:                             checkY(12);
188:                             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
189:                             doc.setFontSize(13);
190:                             doc.setTextColor(31, 41, 55);
191:                             y = addWrappedText(doc, text, margin, y, contentW, LINE_LG);
192:                             y += 2;
193:                             break;
194:                         case 'h3':
195:                             checkY(10);
196:                             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
197:                             doc.setFontSize(11);
198:                             doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
199:                             y = addWrappedText(doc, text, margin, y, contentW, LINE_MD);
200:                             y += 2;
201:                             break;
202:                         case 'quote':
203:                             checkY(8);
204:                             doc.setDrawColor(156, 163, 175);
205:                             doc.setLineWidth(1.5);
206:                             doc.line(margin, y - 1, margin, y + LINE_MD * doc.splitTextToSize(text, contentW - 8).length);
207:                             doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
208:                             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
209:                             doc.setFontSize(10);
210:                             doc.setTextColor(75, 85, 99);
211:                             y = addWrappedText(doc, text, margin + 5, y, contentW - 8, LINE_MD);
212:                             y += 3;
213:                             break;
214:                         case 'code':
215:                             checkY(10);
216:                             doc.setFillColor(243, 244, 246);
217:                             const codeLines = doc.splitTextToSize(block.content || '', contentW - 8);
218:                             doc.roundedRect(margin, y - 3, contentW, codeLines.length * LINE_SM + 8, 2, 2, 'F');
219:                             doc.setFont('courier', 'normal');
220:                             doc.setFontSize(8);
221:                             doc.setTextColor(31, 41, 55);
222:                             doc.text(codeLines, margin + 4, y + 2);
223:                             y += codeLines.length * LINE_SM + 9;
224:                             break;
225:                         case 'bullet':
226:                             checkY(6);
227:                             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
228:                             doc.setFontSize(10);
229:                             doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
230:                             doc.text('•', margin + 2, y);
231:                             y = addWrappedText(doc, text, margin + 7, y, contentW - 7, LINE_MD);
232:                             y += 1;
233:                             break;
234:                         case 'todo':
235:                             checkY(6);
236:                             const metaTodo = getNormalizedMetadata(block.metadata);
237:                             doc.setDrawColor(209, 213, 219);
238:                             doc.setLineWidth(0.4);
239:                             doc.rect(margin + 1, y - 3.5, 4, 4);
240:                             if (metaTodo?.checked) {
241:                                 doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
242:                                 doc.setFontSize(8);
243:                                 doc.setTextColor(59, 130, 246);
244:                                 doc.text('✓', margin + 1.5, y - 0.5);
245:                             }
246:                             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
247:                             doc.setFontSize(10);
248:                             doc.setTextColor(metaTodo?.checked ? 156 : 55, metaTodo?.checked ? 163 : 65, metaTodo?.checked ? 175 : 81);
249:                             y = addWrappedText(doc, text, margin + 8, y, contentW - 8, LINE_MD);
250:                             y += 1;
251:                             break;
252:                         case 'divider':
253:                             checkY(6);
254:                             doc.setDrawColor(229, 231, 235);
255:                             doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
256:                             doc.line(margin, y, W - margin, y);
257:                             y += 6;
258:                             break;
259:                         case 'table':
260:                             checkY(20);
261:                             const { rows, hasHeader } = getTableData(block);
262:                             if (!rows.length) break;
263:                             // Calculate column widths
264:                             const cols = rows[0]?.length || 1;
265:                             const colW = contentW / cols;
266:                             doc.setLineWidth(0.3);
267:                             doc.setDrawColor(209, 213, 219);
268:                             rows.forEach((row, ri) => {
269:                                 checkY(8);
270:                                 const cellH = 8;
271:                                 if (hasHeader && ri === 0) {
272:                                     doc.setFillColor(249, 250, 251);
273:                                 }
274:                                 row.forEach((cell, ci) => {
275:                                     const cx = margin + ci * colW;
276:                                     if (hasHeader && ri === 0) {
277:                                         doc.setFillColor(249, 250, 251);
278:                                         doc.rect(cx, y - 4, colW, cellH, 'FD');
279:                                         doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
280:                                     } else {
281:                                         doc.rect(cx, y - 4, colW, cellH, 'D');
282:                                         doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
283:                                     }
284:                                     doc.setFontSize(9);
285:                                     doc.setTextColor(31, 41, 55);
286:                                     const cellText = doc.splitTextToSize(String(cell || ''), colW - 4);
287:                                     doc.text(cellText[0] || '', cx + 2, y);
288:                                 });
289:                                 y += cellH;
290:                             });
291:                             y += 4;
292:                             break;
293:                         case 'image': {
294:                             const cached = imageCache[block.id];
295:                             if (cached) {
296:                                 try {
297:                                     // Calculate height proportionally to fit within page width
298:                                     const imgProps = doc.getImageProperties(cached.base64);
299:                                     const imgW = contentW;
300:                                     const imgH = (imgProps.height * imgW) / imgProps.width;
301:                                     const maxImgH = 120; // max 120mm tall
302:                                     const finalH = Math.min(imgH, maxImgH);
303:                                     checkY(finalH + 4);
304:                                     doc.addImage(cached.base64, cached.fmt, margin, y, imgW, finalH);
305:                                     y += finalH + 4;
306:                                 } catch {
307:                                     doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
308:                                     doc.setFontSize(8);
309:                                     doc.setTextColor(156, 163, 175);
310:                                     doc.text('[Imagen no disponible]', margin, y);
311:                                     y += LINE_MD;
312:                                 }
313:                             } else if (block.content) {
314:                                 doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
315:                                 doc.setFontSize(8);
316:                                 doc.setTextColor(156, 163, 175);
317:                                 doc.text('[Imagen adjunta]', margin, y);
318:                                 y += LINE_MD;
319:                             }
320:                             break;
321:                         }
322:                         default: // text
323:                             if (!text) break;
324:                             checkY(6);
325:                             doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
326:                             doc.setFontSize(10);
327:                             doc.setTextColor(75, 85, 99);
328:                             y = addWrappedText(doc, text, margin, y, contentW, LINE_MD);
329:                             y += 2;
330:                             break;
331:                     }
332:                 }
333:             }
334:             // ── FOOTER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
335:             const totalPages = doc.internal.getNumberOfPages();
336:             for (let p = 1; p <= totalPages; p++) {
337:                 doc.setPage(p);
338:                 doc.setDrawColor(229, 231, 235);
339:                 doc.setLineWidth(0.4);
340:                 doc.line(margin, H - 12, W - margin, H - 12);
341:                 doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
342:                 doc.setFontSize(7);
343:                 doc.setTextColor(156, 163, 175);
344:                 doc.text('Generado por Byfrost • IntegradorHub', margin, H - 7);
345:                 doc.text(`${p} / ${totalPages}`, W - margin, H - 7, { align: 'right' });
346:             }
347:             const safeName = `Proyecto_${(project.titulo || 'Export').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\u00C0-\u024F\s_-]/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '_')}.pdf`;
348:             doc.save(safeName);
349:         } catch (error) {
350:             console.error('Error exportando PDF:', error);
351:             alert(`Error al exportar: ${error.message || error}`);
352:         } finally {
353:             setIsExporting(false);
354:         }
355:     };
356:     if (!project) return null;
357:     return (
358:         <button
359:             onClick={handleExportPDF}
360:             disabled={isExporting}
361:             className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-xl shadow-md hover:bg-black transition-all disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-wait"
362:         >
363:             {isExporting ? <Loader2 size={16} className="animate-spin" /> : <Download size={16} />}
364:             {isExporting ? 'Generando...' : 'Exportar PDF'}
365:         </button>
366:     );
367: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Evaluations/EvaluationsController.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
 3: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
 4: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Evaluations.Create;
 5: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Evaluations.GetByProject;
 6: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Evaluations.Visibility;
 7: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Abstractions;
 8: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Evaluations;
 9: [Authorize]
10: [ApiController]
11: [Route("api/[controller]")]
12: public class EvaluationsController : BaseApiController
13: {
14:     private readonly IMediator _mediator;
15:     public EvaluationsController(IMediator mediator)
16:     {
17:         _mediator = mediator;
18:     }
19:     /// <summary>
20:     /// Crea una nueva evaluación para un proyecto.
21:     /// El DocenteId se extrae del JWT para prevenir spoofing.
22:     /// </summary>
23:     [HttpPost]
24:     public async Task<ActionResult<CreateEvaluationResponse>> Create([FromBody] CreateEvaluationRequest request)
25:     {
26:         var command = new CreateEvaluationCommand(
27:             request.ProjectId,
28:             GetUserId(), // Previene ID Spoofing: DocenteId viene del JWT
29:             request.DocenteNombre,
30:             request.Tipo,
31:             request.Contenido,
32:             request.Calificacion
33:         );
34:         try
35:         {
36:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
37:             return Ok(response);
38:         }
39:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex) { return Forbid(ex.Message); }
40:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
41:         catch (ArgumentException ex) { return BadRequest(ex.Message); }
42:     }
43:     /// <summary>
44:     /// Obtiene todas las evaluaciones de un proyecto.
45:     /// </summary>
46:     [HttpGet("project/{projectId}")]
47:     public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<EvaluationDto>>> GetByProject(string projectId)
48:     {
49:         var query = new GetEvaluationsByProjectQuery(projectId);
50:         var evaluations = await _mediator.Send(query);
51:         return Ok(evaluations);
52:     }
53:     /// <summary>
54:     /// Cambia la visibilidad de una evaluación (Público/Privado).
55:     /// El UserId se extrae del JWT para prevenir spoofing.
56:     /// </summary>
57:     [HttpPatch("{id}/visibility")]
58:     public async Task<ActionResult<UpdateEvaluationVisibilityResponse>> ChangeVisibility(string id, [FromBody] ChangeVisibilityRequest request)
59:     {
60:         var command = new UpdateEvaluationVisibilityCommand(id, GetUserId(), request.EsPublico);
61:         try
62:         {
63:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
64:             return Ok(response);
65:         }
66:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex) { return Forbid(ex.Message); }
67:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
68:     }
69: }
70: // DTOs limpios: sin campos UserId/DocenteId que el backend extrae del JWT
71: public record ChangeVisibilityRequest(bool EsPublico);
72: public record CreateEvaluationRequest(
73:     string ProjectId,
74:     string DocenteNombre,
75:     string Tipo,
76:     string Contenido,
77:     int? Calificacion
78: );
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/Create/CreateProjectHandler.cs
````csharp
  1: using FluentValidation;
  2: using MediatR;
  3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
  4: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Enums;
  5: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
  6: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Create;
  7: // === COMMAND ===
  8: public record CreateProjectCommand(
  9:     string Titulo,
 10:     string Materia,
 11:     string MateriaId,
 12:     string Ciclo,
 13:     List<string> StackTecnologico,
 14:     string? RepositorioUrl,
 15:     string? VideoUrl,
 16:     string UserId, // ID del usuario autenticado (Líder)
 17:     string UserGroupId, // Grupo del usuario (para validación)
 18:     string? DocenteId,
 19:     List<string> MiembrosIds
 20: ) : IRequest<CreateProjectResponse>;
 21: public record CreateProjectResponse(string ProjectId);
 22: // === VALIDATOR ===
 23: public class CreateProjectValidator : AbstractValidator<CreateProjectCommand>
 24: {
 25:     public CreateProjectValidator()
 26:     {
 27:         RuleFor(x => x.Titulo).NotEmpty().MaximumLength(100);
 28:         RuleFor(x => x.Materia).NotEmpty();
 29:         RuleFor(x => x.MateriaId).NotEmpty();
 30:         RuleFor(x => x.Ciclo).NotEmpty().Matches(@"^\d{4}-\d$"); // Ej: 2024-1
 31:         RuleFor(x => x.StackTecnologico).Must(x => x.Count > 0).WithMessage("Debe incluir al menos una tecnología");
 32:         RuleFor(x => x.RepositorioUrl).Must(uri => Uri.TryCreate(uri, UriKind.Absolute, out _))
 33:             .When(x => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(x.RepositorioUrl))
 34:             .WithMessage("URL de repositorio inválida");
 35:         RuleFor(x => x.VideoUrl).Must(uri => Uri.TryCreate(uri, UriKind.Absolute, out _))
 36:             .When(x => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(x.VideoUrl))
 37:             .WithMessage("URL de video inválida");
 38:         // REGLA DE NEGOCIO: Máximo 5 integrantes (Líder + 4 invitados)
 39:         RuleFor(x => x.MiembrosIds).Must(x => x.Count <= 4)
 40:             .WithMessage("El equipo no puede tener más de 5 integrantes (incluyendo al líder).");
 41:     }
 42: }
 43: // === HANDLER ===
 44: public class CreateProjectHandler : IRequestHandler<CreateProjectCommand, CreateProjectResponse>
 45: {
 46:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
 47:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
 48:     public CreateProjectHandler(IProjectRepository projectRepository, IUserRepository userRepository)
 49:     {
 50:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
 51:         _userRepository = userRepository;
 52:     }
 53:     public async Task<CreateProjectResponse> Handle(CreateProjectCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 54:     {
 55:         // 1. Validar al Líder (Usuario actual)
 56:         var leader = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.UserId);
 57:         if (leader == null) throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("Usuario no encontrado");
 58:         if (leader.Rol != nameof(UserRole.Alumno))
 59:             throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("Solo los alumnos pueden crear proyectos");
 60:         // 3. Validar Docente (Si se seleccionó uno)
 61:         if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.DocenteId))
 62:         {
 63:             var teacher = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.DocenteId);
 64:             if (teacher == null) 
 65:                 throw new KeyNotFoundException("El docente seleccionado no existe.");
 66:             if (teacher.Rol != nameof(UserRole.Docente) && teacher.Rol != "Admin") 
 67:                 throw new InvalidOperationException("El usuario seleccionado no tiene rol de Docente.");
 68:             // VALIDACIÓN ESTRICTA: El docente debe estar asignado al grupo del líder
 69:             var isAssignedToGroup = teacher.Asignaciones?
 70:                 .Any(a => a.GruposIds.Contains(leader.GrupoId ?? string.Empty)) ?? false;
 71:             if (!isAssignedToGroup && teacher.Rol != "Admin")
 72:             {
 73:                 throw new InvalidOperationException($"El docente {teacher.Nombre} no imparte clases al grupo {leader.GrupoId}.");
 74:             }
 75:         }
 76:         // REGLA DE NEGOCIO: Exclusividad (Líder no debe tener proyecto)
 77:         if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(leader.ProjectId))
 78:             throw new InvalidOperationException("Ya perteneces a un equipo. Debes salirte antes de crear uno nuevo.");
 79:         var finalMembers = new List<User> { leader };
 80:         var finalMemberIds = new List<string> { leader.Id };
 81:         // 2. Validar Miembros Invitados
 82:         if (request.MiembrosIds != null && request.MiembrosIds.Any())
 83:         {
 84:             foreach (var memberId in request.MiembrosIds)
 85:             {
 86:                 if (memberId == leader.Id) continue; // Ignorar si se auto-agregó
 87:                 var member = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(memberId);
 88:                 if (member == null) continue; // O lanzar error
 89:                 // REGLA: Mismo Grupo
 90:                 if (member.GrupoId != leader.GrupoId)
 91:                     throw new InvalidOperationException($"El alumno {member.Nombre} no pertenece a tu grupo.");
 92:                 // REGLA: Exclusividad
 93:                 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(member.ProjectId))
 94:                     throw new InvalidOperationException($"El alumno {member.Nombre} ya tiene un proyecto asignado.");
 95:                 finalMembers.Add(member);
 96:                 finalMemberIds.Add(member.Id);
 97:             }
 98:         }
 99:         // 3. Crear entidad Proyecto
100:         var project = new Project
101:         {
102:             Id = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
103:             Titulo = request.Titulo,
104:             Materia = request.Materia,
105:             MateriaId = request.MateriaId,
106:             Ciclo = request.Ciclo,
107:             GrupoId = request.UserGroupId,
108:             LiderId = request.UserId,
109:             MiembrosIds = finalMemberIds, 
110:             DocenteId = request.DocenteId, // Asignar docente seleccionado
111:             Estado = nameof(ProjectState.Borrador),
112:             StackTecnologico = request.StackTecnologico,
113:             RepositorioUrl = request.RepositorioUrl,
114:             VideoUrl = request.VideoUrl,
115:             CreatedAt = Google.Cloud.Firestore.Timestamp.GetCurrentTimestamp(),
116:             UpdatedAt = Google.Cloud.Firestore.Timestamp.GetCurrentTimestamp()
117:         };
118:         // 4. Guardar Proyecto
119:         await _projectRepository.CreateAsync(project);
120:         // 5. Actualizar Usuarios (Asignar ProjectId) - "Batch" manual
121:         foreach (var user in finalMembers)
122:         {
123:             user.ProjectId = project.Id; // Vincular usuario al equipo
124:             await _userRepository.UpdateAsync(user);
125:         }
126:         return new CreateProjectResponse(project.Id);
127:     }
128: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/Rate/RateProjectHandler.cs
````csharp
  1: using MediatR;
  2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
  3: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
  4: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Rate;
  5: // === VALUE OBJECTS ===
  6: [FirestoreData]
  7: public class RubricVote
  8: {
  9:     [FirestoreProperty("ui_ux")]
 10:     public int UIUX { get; set; }
 11:     [FirestoreProperty("inovacion")]
 12:     public int Inovacion { get; set; }
 13:     [FirestoreProperty("presentacion")]
 14:     public int Presentacion { get; set; }
 15:     [FirestoreProperty("impacto")]
 16:     public int Impacto { get; set; }
 17:     // Total de puntos de este voto (cada criterio 1-5, cada punto = 2.5 pts)
 18:     public double TotalPoints => (UIUX + Inovacion + Presentacion + Impacto) * 2.5;
 19: }
 20: // === COMMAND ===
 21: public record RateProjectCommand(
 22:     string ProjectId,
 23:     string UserId,
 24:     int UIUX,       // 1-5
 25:     int Inovacion,  // 1-5
 26:     int Presentacion, // 1-5
 27:     int Impacto     // 1-5
 28: ) : IRequest<RateProjectResponse>;
 29: public record RateProjectResponse(
 30:     bool Success,
 31:     string Message,
 32:     double NewTotalPoints,
 33:     double PuntosUIUX,
 34:     double PuntosInovacion,
 35:     double PuntosPresentacion,
 36:     double PuntosImpacto
 37: );
 38: // === HANDLER ===
 39: public class RateProjectHandler : IRequestHandler<RateProjectCommand, RateProjectResponse>
 40: {
 41:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
 42:     public RateProjectHandler(IProjectRepository projectRepository)
 43:     {
 44:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
 45:     }
 46:     public async Task<RateProjectResponse> Handle(RateProjectCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 47:     {
 48:         // 1. Obtener el Proyecto
 49:         var project = await _projectRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.ProjectId);
 50:         if (project == null)
 51:             throw new KeyNotFoundException("Proyecto no encontrado");
 52:         // 2. El líder no puede votar por su propio proyecto
 53:         if (project.LiderId == request.UserId)
 54:             throw new InvalidOperationException("El líder del proyecto no puede votar por su propio proyecto.");
 55:         // 3. Validar rúbrica (cada criterio debe ser entre 1 y 5)
 56:         Validate(request.UIUX, "UI/UX");
 57:         Validate(request.Inovacion, "Innovación");
 58:         Validate(request.Presentacion, "Presentación");
 59:         Validate(request.Impacto, "Impacto");
 60:         // 4. Crear el nuevo voto de rúbrica
 61:         var newVoteObj = new RubricVote
 62:         {
 63:             UIUX = request.UIUX,
 64:             Inovacion = request.Inovacion,
 65:             Presentacion = request.Presentacion,
 66:             Impacto = request.Impacto
 67:         };
 68:         // Convertir explícitamente a Dictionary para que Firestore serialice correctamente
 69:         var newVoteDict = new Dictionary<string, object>
 70:         {
 71:             { "ui_ux", request.UIUX },
 72:             { "inovacion", request.Inovacion },
 73:             { "presentacion", request.Presentacion },
 74:             { "impacto", request.Impacto }
 75:         };
 76:         // 5. Si el usuario ya votó anteriormente, restar sus puntos anteriores antes de sumar los nuevos
 77:         if (project.Votantes.ContainsKey(request.UserId))
 78:         {
 79:             var oldVoteObj = project.Votantes[request.UserId];
 80:             RubricVote? oldRubric = TryParseRubricVote(oldVoteObj);
 81:             if (oldRubric != null)
 82:             {
 83:                 // Restar puntos del voto anterior (acumuladores desglosados)
 84:                 project.PuntosTotales    -= oldRubric.TotalPoints;
 85:                 project.PuntosUIUX       -= oldRubric.UIUX * 2.5;
 86:                 project.PuntosInovacion  -= oldRubric.Inovacion * 2.5;
 87:                 project.PuntosPresentacion -= oldRubric.Presentacion * 2.5;
 88:                 project.PuntosImpacto    -= oldRubric.Impacto * 2.5;
 89:             }
 90:             else
 91:             {
 92:                 // Voto antiguo con formato int (estrellas simples), sólo resta del total
 93:                 if (oldVoteObj is long oldStars)
 94:                     project.PuntosTotales -= oldStars * 10;
 95:             }
 96:             // Actualizar voto existente
 97:             project.Votantes[request.UserId] = newVoteDict;
 98:         }
 99:         else
100:         {
101:             // Voto nuevo
102:             project.Votantes.Add(request.UserId, newVoteDict);
103:             project.ConteoVotos++;
104:         }
105:         // 6. Sumar puntos del nuevo voto a los acumuladores
106:         project.PuntosTotales      += newVoteObj.TotalPoints;
107:         project.PuntosUIUX         += newVoteObj.UIUX * 2.5;
108:         project.PuntosInovacion    += newVoteObj.Inovacion * 2.5;
109:         project.PuntosPresentacion += newVoteObj.Presentacion * 2.5;
110:         project.PuntosImpacto      += newVoteObj.Impacto * 2.5;
111:         // 7. Guardar cambios
112:         await _projectRepository.UpdateAsync(project);
113:         return new RateProjectResponse(
114:             true,
115:             "Voto registrado correctamente",
116:             project.PuntosTotales,
117:             project.PuntosUIUX,
118:             project.PuntosInovacion,
119:             project.PuntosPresentacion,
120:             project.PuntosImpacto
121:         );
122:     }
123:     // === Helpers ===
124:     private static void Validate(int value, string criterio)
125:     {
126:         if (value < 1 || value > 5)
127:             throw new ArgumentException($"La calificación de '{criterio}' debe ser entre 1 y 5.");
128:     }
129:     /// <summary>
130:     /// Intenta convertir un valor genérico de Firestore a RubricVote.
131:     /// Firestore devuelve mapas anidados como Dictionary<string, object>.
132:     /// </summary>
133:     private static RubricVote? TryParseRubricVote(object obj)
134:     {
135:         if (obj is RubricVote rv) return rv;
136:         if (obj is Dictionary<string, object> dict)
137:         {
138:             return new RubricVote
139:             {
140:                 UIUX         = GetInt(dict, "ui_ux"),
141:                 Inovacion    = GetInt(dict, "inovacion"),
142:                 Presentacion = GetInt(dict, "presentacion"),
143:                 Impacto      = GetInt(dict, "impacto")
144:             };
145:         }
146:         return null;
147:     }
148:     private static int GetInt(Dictionary<string, object> dict, string key)
149:         => dict.TryGetValue(key, out var v) && v is long l ? (int)l : 0;
150: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Teams/GetAvailableTeachers/GetAvailableTeachersQuery.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 4: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Teams.GetAvailableTeachers;
 5: public record GetAvailableTeachersQuery(string GroupId, string? CarreraId = null) : IRequest<List<TeacherDto>>;
 6:     public record TeacherDto(string Id, string NombreCompleto, string Profesion, string Carrera, string Asignatura, string? MateriaId, bool EsAltaPrioridad);
 7:     public class GetAvailableTeachersHandler : IRequestHandler<GetAvailableTeachersQuery, List<TeacherDto>>
 8:     {
 9:         private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
10:         private readonly IMateriaRepository _materiaRepository;
11:         public GetAvailableTeachersHandler(IUserRepository userRepository, IMateriaRepository materiaRepository)
12:         {
13:             _userRepository = userRepository;
14:             _materiaRepository = materiaRepository;
15:         }
16:         public async Task<List<TeacherDto>> Handle(GetAvailableTeachersQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
17:         {
18:             var teachersInGroup = await _userRepository.GetTeachersByGroupAsync(request.GroupId, request.CarreraId);
19:             var materias = await _materiaRepository.GetAllActiveAsync();
20:             var materiasMap = materias.ToDictionary(m => m.Id, m => m); // Store full Materia object
21:             var availableTeachers = teachersInGroup
22:                 .Select(u => {
23:                     // Obtener TODAS las asignaciones para este grupo
24:                     var asignacionesDelGrupo = u.Asignaciones?
25:                         .Where(a => a.GruposIds.Contains(request.GroupId))
26:                         .ToList() ?? new List<AsignacionDocente>();
27:                     if (!asignacionesDelGrupo.Any()) return null;
28:                     // PRIORIDAD: Buscar primero si tiene alguna materia de Alta Prioridad (Integradora)
29:                     var asignacionPrioritaria = asignacionesDelGrupo
30:                         .FirstOrDefault(a => materiasMap.TryGetValue(a.MateriaId, out var m) && m.EsAltaPrioridad);
31:                     // Si no tiene alta prioridad, tomar la primera disponible
32:                     var asignacionFinal = asignacionPrioritaria ?? asignacionesDelGrupo.First();
33:                     var materiaNombre = "Docente";
34:                     var esAltaPrioridad = false;
35:                     if (asignacionFinal != null && materiasMap.TryGetValue(asignacionFinal.MateriaId, out var materia))
36:                     {
37:                         materiaNombre = materia.Nombre;
38:                         esAltaPrioridad = materia.EsAltaPrioridad;
39:                     }
40:                     return new TeacherDto(
41:                         u.Id,
42:                         $"{u.Nombre} {u.ApellidoPaterno} {u.ApellidoMaterno}".Trim(),
43:                         u.Profesion ?? "Docente",
44:                         asignacionFinal?.CarreraId ?? "", 
45:                         materiaNombre,
46:                         asignacionFinal?.MateriaId,
47:                         esAltaPrioridad
48:                     );
49:                 })
50:                 .Where(t => t != null) // Filter out nulls
51:                 .OrderByDescending(t => t!.EsAltaPrioridad) // High Priority first
52:                 .ThenBy(t => t!.NombreCompleto)
53:                 .ToList();
54:             return availableTeachers!;
55:     }
56: }
````

````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
 3: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
 4: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Teams.GetAvailableStudents;
 5: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Teams.GetAvailableTeachers;

 8: [Authorize]
 9: [ApiController]
10: [Route("api/[controller]")]
11: public class TeamsController : BaseApiController
12: {
13:     private readonly IMediator _mediator;
14:     public TeamsController(IMediator mediator)
15:     {
16:         _mediator = mediator;
17:     }
18:     /// <summary>
19:     /// Retorna alumnos del mismo grupo que NO tienen equipo asignado.
20:     /// </summary>
21:     [HttpGet("available-students")]
22:     public async Task<ActionResult<List<StudentDto>>> GetAvailableStudents([FromQuery] string groupId)
23:     {
24:         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(groupId)) return BadRequest("El groupId es requerido");
25:         var query = new GetAvailableStudentsQuery(groupId);
26:         var students = await _mediator.Send(query);
27:         return Ok(students);
28:     }
29:     /// <summary>
30:     /// Retorna docentes asignados a este grupo.
31:     /// </summary>

34:     {
35:         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(groupId)) return BadRequest("El groupId es requerido");
36:         var query = new GetAvailableTeachersQuery(groupId);
37:         var teachers = await _mediator.Send(query);
38:         return Ok(teachers);
````
