## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Shared/Infrastructure/Repositories/ProjectRepository.cs
````csharp
 1: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Enums;
 4: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 5: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Infrastructure.Repositories;
 6: public class ProjectRepository : IProjectRepository
 7: {
 8:     private readonly CollectionReference _collection;
 9:     public ProjectRepository()
10:     {
11:         _collection = FirestoreContext.Projects;
12:     }
13:     public async Task<Project?> GetByIdAsync(string projectId)
14:     {
15:         var snapshot = await _collection.Document(projectId).GetSnapshotAsync();
16:         return snapshot.Exists ? snapshot.ConvertTo<Project>() : null;
17:     }
18:     public async Task<IEnumerable<Project>> GetByGroupIdAsync(string groupId)
19:     {
20:         var query = _collection.WhereEqualTo("grupo_id", groupId);
21:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
22:         return snapshot.Documents.Select(d => d.ConvertTo<Project>());
23:     }
24:     public async Task<IEnumerable<Project>> GetPublicProjectsAsync(string? searchTerm = null, string? techStack = null)
25:     {
26:         var query = _collection.WhereEqualTo("es_publico", true);
27:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
28:         var projects = snapshot.Documents.Select(d => d.ConvertTo<Project>());
29:         // Filtrar en memoria (Firestore no soporta búsqueda de texto completo)
30:         if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
31:         {
32:             var term = searchTerm.ToLowerInvariant();
33:             projects = projects.Where(p => 
34:                 p.Titulo.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(term) ||
35:                 p.Materia.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(term));
36:         }
37:         if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(techStack))
38:         {
39:             projects = projects.Where(p => 
40:                 p.StackTecnologico.Any(s => 
41:                     s.Equals(techStack, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)));
42:         }
43:         return projects;
44:     }
45:     public async Task<IEnumerable<Project>> GetByLeaderIdAsync(string leaderId)
46:     {
47:         var query = _collection.WhereEqualTo("lider_id", leaderId);
48:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
49:         return snapshot.Documents.Select(d => d.ConvertTo<Project>());
50:     }
51:     public async Task<IEnumerable<Project>> GetByMemberIdAsync(string memberId)
52:     {
53:         var query = _collection.WhereArrayContains("miembros_ids", memberId);
54:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
55:         return snapshot.Documents.Select(d => d.ConvertTo<Project>());
56:     }
57:     public async Task<IEnumerable<Project>> GetByTeacherIdAsync(string teacherId)
58:     {
59:         var query = _collection.WhereEqualTo("docente_id", teacherId);
60:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
61:         return snapshot.Documents.Select(d => {
62:             var p = d.ConvertTo<Project>();
63:             p.Id = d.Id;
64:             return p;
65:         });
66:     }
67:     public async Task CreateAsync(Project project)
68:     {
69:         project.Id = string.IsNullOrEmpty(project.Id) 
70:             ? _collection.Document().Id 
71:             : project.Id;
72:         project.CreatedAt = Timestamp.GetCurrentTimestamp();
73:         project.UpdatedAt = Timestamp.GetCurrentTimestamp();
74:         await _collection.Document(project.Id).SetAsync(project);
75:     }
76:     public async Task UpdateAsync(Project project)
77:     {
78:         project.UpdatedAt = Timestamp.GetCurrentTimestamp();
79:         await _collection.Document(project.Id).SetAsync(project, SetOptions.MergeAll);
80:     }
81:     public async Task DeleteAsync(string projectId)
82:     {
83:         await _collection.Document(projectId).DeleteAsync();
84:     }
85: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Shared/Infrastructure/Repositories/UserRepository.cs
````csharp
  1: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
  2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
  3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
  4: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Infrastructure.Repositories;
  5: public class UserRepository : IUserRepository
  6: {
  7:     private readonly CollectionReference _collection;
  8:     public UserRepository()
  9:     {
 10:         _collection = FirestoreContext.Users;
 11:     }
 12:     public async Task<User?> GetByIdAsync(string userId)
 13:     {
 14:         var snapshot = await _collection.Document(userId).GetSnapshotAsync();
 15:         return snapshot.Exists ? snapshot.ConvertTo<User>() : null;
 16:     }
 17:     public async Task<User?> GetByEmailAsync(string email)
 18:     {
 19:         var query = _collection.WhereEqualTo("email", email.ToLowerInvariant());
 20:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
 21:         return snapshot.Documents.FirstOrDefault()?.ConvertTo<User>();
 22:     }
 23:     public async Task<IEnumerable<User>> GetByGroupIdAsync(string groupId)
 24:     {
 25:         var query = _collection.WhereEqualTo("grupo_id", groupId);
 26:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
 27:         return snapshot.Documents.Select(d => d.ConvertTo<User>());
 28:     }
 29:     public async Task<IEnumerable<User>> SearchByNameAsync(string searchTerm, string groupId)
 30:     {
 31:         // Firestore no soporta búsqueda de texto completo nativa
 32:         // Obtenemos usuarios del grupo y filtramos en memoria
 33:         var users = await GetByGroupIdAsync(groupId);
 34:         var term = searchTerm.ToLowerInvariant();
 35:         return users.Where(u => 
 36:             u.Nombre.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(term) ||
 37:             (u.Matricula?.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(term) ?? false));
 38:     }
 39:     public async Task CreateAsync(User user)
 40:     {
 41:         user.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
 42:         user.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
 43:         await _collection.Document(user.Id).SetAsync(user);
 44:     }
 45:     public async Task CreateIfNotExistsAsync(User user)
 46:     {
 47:         user.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
 48:         user.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
 49:         try 
 50:         {
 51:             await _collection.Document(user.Id).CreateAsync(user);
 52:         }
 53:         catch (Grpc.Core.RpcException ex) when (ex.StatusCode == Grpc.Core.StatusCode.AlreadyExists)
 54:         {
 55:             Console.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] UserRepository: User {user.Id} already exists, skipping creation to avoid race condition overwrite.");
 56:         }
 57:     }
 58:     public async Task UpdateAsync(User user)
 59:     {
 60:         user.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
 61:         await _collection.Document(user.Id).SetAsync(user, SetOptions.MergeAll);
 62:     }
 63:     // User Management Methods
 64:     public async Task<IEnumerable<User>> GetByRoleAsync(string role)
 65:     {
 66:         var query = _collection.WhereEqualTo("rol", role);
 67:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
 68:         return snapshot.Documents.Select(d => d.ConvertTo<User>());
 69:     }
 70:     public async Task<IEnumerable<User>> GetStudentsByGroupAsync(string grupoId)
 71:     {
 72:         var query = _collection
 73:             .WhereEqualTo("rol", "Alumno")
 74:             .WhereEqualTo("grupo_id", grupoId);
 75:         var snapshot = await query.GetSnapshotAsync();
 76:         return snapshot.Documents.Select(d => d.ConvertTo<User>());
 77:     }
 78:     public async Task<IEnumerable<User>> GetTeachersByGroupAsync(string grupoId, string? carreraId = null)
 79:     {
 80:         // Obtener todos los docentes
 81:         var teachers = await GetByRoleAsync("Docente");
 82:         // Filtrar docentes que tienen asignaciones con ese grupoId
 83:         return teachers.Where(t => 
 84:             t.Asignaciones?.Any(a => 
 85:                 a.GruposIds.Contains(grupoId) && 
 86:                 (carreraId == null || a.CarreraId == carreraId)
 87:             ) ?? false
 88:         );
 89:     }
 90:     public async Task UpdateSocialLinksAsync(string userId, Dictionary<string, string> redesSociales)
 91:     {
 92:         var timestamp = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
 93:         var updates = new Dictionary<string, object>
 94:         {
 95:             { "redes_sociales", redesSociales },
 96:             { "updated_at", timestamp }
 97:         };
 98:         await _collection.Document(userId).UpdateAsync(updates);
 99:     }
100: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Shared/Infrastructure/FirestoreContext.cs
````csharp
 1: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 2: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Infrastructure;
 3: public class FirestoreContext
 4: {
 5:     private static FirestoreDb? _db;
 6:     private static readonly object _lock = new();
 7:     public static FirestoreDb GetDatabase()
 8:     {
 9:         if (_db is null)
10:         {
11:             lock (_lock)
12:             {
13:                 if (_db is null)
14:                 {
15:                     // 1. Intentar cargar desde archivo local (Desarrollo)
16:                     var localCredentialsPath = Path.Combine(
17:                         Directory.GetCurrentDirectory(), 
18:                         "..", "..", "..",
19:                         "firebase-admin.json"
20:                     );
21:                     if (File.Exists(localCredentialsPath))
22:                     {
23:                         Environment.SetEnvironmentVariable("GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS", localCredentialsPath);
24:                     }
25:                     else 
26:                     {
27:                         // 2. Intentar cargar desde variable de entorno con el JSON directo (Producción - Render/Railway)
28:                         var jsonCredentials = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_JSON");
29:                         if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(jsonCredentials))
30:                         {
31:                             var tempFile = Path.GetTempFileName();
32:                             File.WriteAllText(tempFile, jsonCredentials);
33:                             Environment.SetEnvironmentVariable("GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS", tempFile);
34:                         }
35:                     }
36:                     var projectId = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID") 
37:                                     ?? "integradorhub-dsm";
38:                     _db = FirestoreDb.Create(projectId);
39:                 }
40:             }
41:         }
42:         return _db;
43:     }
44:     // Colecciones
45:     public static CollectionReference Users => GetDatabase().Collection("users");
46:     public static CollectionReference Projects => GetDatabase().Collection("projects");
47:     public static CollectionReference Groups => GetDatabase().Collection("groups");
48:     public static CollectionReference Materias => GetDatabase().Collection("materias");
49:     public static CollectionReference Evaluations => GetDatabase().Collection("evaluations");
50: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/ui/CityBackground.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { Suspense, useEffect, useState, useRef, lazy } from 'react';
  2: import { FloatingPhrases } from './FloatingPhrases';
  3: import { usePerformance } from '../../hooks/usePerformance';
  4: // ─── Lazy-load the entire 3D scene to avoid blocking the login form ────────
  5: // This means React, React-Router, and the login UI render FIRST,
  6: // then the Three.js bundle downloads in the background.
  7: const Lazy3DScene = lazy(() => import('./CityScene'));
  8: // ─── Componente exportado ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  9: export function CityBackground({ isDark = false, isRegister = false }) {
 10:     const { performanceTier, isLowEnd } = usePerformance();
 11:     const [showScene, setShowScene] = useState(false);
 12:     // Delay mounting the 3D scene slightly so the login form paints first
 13:     useEffect(() => {
 14:         if (isLowEnd) return;
 15:         const timer = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
 16:             setShowScene(true);
 17:         });
 18:         return () => cancelAnimationFrame(timer);
 19:     }, [isLowEnd]);
 20:     return (
 21:         <>
 22:         <div style={{
 23:             position: 'fixed',
 24:             top: 0, left: 0,
 25:             width: '100vw', height: '100vh',
 26:             zIndex: 0,
 27:             overflow: 'hidden',
 28:             pointerEvents: 'none',
 29:             background: isDark
 30:                 ? 'linear-gradient(160deg, #020617 0%, #0a1628 45%, #0c1a3a 75%, #060c1a 100%)'
 31:                 : 'linear-gradient(160deg, #e8f0fe 0%, #dbeafe 40%, #eff6ff 75%, #f0f4ff 100%)',
 32:             transition: 'background 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)',
 33:         }}>
 34:             {!isLowEnd && showScene && (
 35:                 <Suspense fallback={<SceneLoadingFallback isDark={isDark} />}>
 36:                     <Lazy3DScene
 37:                         isDark={isDark}
 38:                         isRegister={isRegister}
 39:                         performanceTier={performanceTier}
 40:                     />
 41:                 </Suspense>
 42:             )}
 43:             {/* ── Gradiente inferior reforzado: oculta la base del edificio ── */}
 44:             <div style={{
 45:                 position: 'absolute',
 46:                 bottom: 0, left: 0,
 47:                 width: '100%',
 48:                 height: '40%',
 49:                 background: isDark
 50:                     ? 'linear-gradient(to top, #020617 0%, rgba(6,12,26,0.92) 30%, rgba(10,22,40,0.65) 65%, transparent 100%)'
 51:                     : 'linear-gradient(to top, #dbeafe 0%, rgba(219,234,254,0.95) 30%, rgba(224,238,254,0.6) 65%, transparent 100%)',
 52:                 pointerEvents: 'none',
 53:             }} />
 54:             {/* ── Gradiente superior: funde el cielo ── */}
 55:             <div style={{
 56:                 position: 'absolute',
 57:                 top: 0, left: 0,
 58:                 width: '100%',
 59:                 height: '20%',
 60:                 background: isDark
 61:                     ? 'linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(2,6,23,0.5) 0%, transparent 100%)'
 62:                     : 'linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(232,240,254,0.4) 0%, transparent 100%)',
 63:                 pointerEvents: 'none',
 64:             }} />
 65:             {/* ── Viñeta lateral para enfocar en el centro ── */}
 66:             <div style={{
 67:                 position: 'absolute',
 68:                 top: 0, left: 0,
 69:                 width: '100%', height: '100%',
 70:                 background: isDark
 71:                     ? 'radial-gradient(ellipse at 58% 42%, transparent 30%, rgba(2,6,23,0.5) 100%)'
 72:                     : 'radial-gradient(ellipse at 58% 42%, transparent 30%, rgba(200,220,254,0.35) 100%)',
 73:                 pointerEvents: 'none',
 74:             }} />
 75:             {/* ── Brillo de horizonte (línea de luz en la base oculta) ── */}
 76:             <div style={{
 77:                 position: 'absolute',
 78:                 bottom: '38%',
 79:                 left: 0,
 80:                 width: '100%',
 81:                 height: '80px',
 82:                 background: isDark
 83:                     ? 'linear-gradient(to top, transparent 0%, rgba(59,130,246,0.06) 50%, transparent 100%)'
 84:                     : 'linear-gradient(to top, transparent 0%, rgba(147,197,253,0.08) 50%, transparent 100%)',
 85:                 pointerEvents: 'none',
 86:             }} />
 87:             {/* ── Destellos decorativos de luz (modo oscuro) ── */}
 88:             {isDark && (
 89:                 <>
 90:                     <div style={{
 91:                         position: 'absolute',
 92:                         top: '15%', left: '8%',
 93:                         width: '200px', height: '200px',
 94:                         background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(59,130,246,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%)',
 95:                         pointerEvents: 'none',
 96:                         borderRadius: '50%',
 97:                     }} />
 98:                     <div style={{
 99:                         position: 'absolute',
100:                         top: '20%', right: '10%',
101:                         width: '160px', height: '160px',
102:                         background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(129,140,248,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%)',
103:                         pointerEvents: 'none',
104:                         borderRadius: '50%',
105:                     }} />
106:                 </>
107:             )}
108:             {/* ── Destellos decorativos de luz (modo claro) ── */}
109:             {!isDark && (
110:                 <>
111:                     <div style={{
112:                         position: 'absolute',
113:                         top: '10%', left: '5%',
114:                         width: '280px', height: '280px',
115:                         background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(147,197,253,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%)',
116:                         pointerEvents: 'none',
117:                         borderRadius: '50%',
118:                     }} />
119:                     <div style={{
120:                         position: 'absolute',
121:                         bottom: '30%', right: '5%',
122:                         width: '200px', height: '200px',
123:                         background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(199,210,254,0.2) 0%, transparent 70%)',
124:                         pointerEvents: 'none',
125:                         borderRadius: '50%',
126:                     }} />
127:                 </>
128:             )}
129:         </div>
130:         {/* Mensajes flotantes estilo testimonio */}
131:         <FloatingPhrases isDark={isDark} />
132:         </>
133:     );
134: }
135: // ─── Fallback premium while 3D scene chunk loads ──────────────────────────
136: function SceneLoadingFallback({ isDark }) {
137:     return (
138:         <div style={{
139:             position: 'absolute',
140:             top: '50%', left: '50%',
141:             transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
142:             display: 'flex',
143:             flexDirection: 'column',
144:             alignItems: 'center',
145:             gap: '16px',
146:             opacity: 0.6,
147:         }}>
148:             <div style={{
149:                 width: '40px',
150:                 height: '40px',
151:                 border: `2px solid ${isDark ? 'rgba(59,130,246,0.2)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'}`,
152:                 borderTopColor: isDark ? '#3b82f6' : '#6b7280',
153:                 borderRadius: '50%',
154:                 animation: 'spin 1s linear infinite',
155:             }} />
156:             <style>{`@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }`}</style>
157:         </div>
158:     );
159: }
160: export default CityBackground;
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/StatCard.jsx
````javascript
 1: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
 2: export function StatCard({ title, value, subtitle, icon: Icon, color = 'blue' }) {
 3:     const colorClasses = {
 4:         blue: 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600',
 5:         green: 'bg-green-50 text-green-600',
 6:         amber: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-600',
 7:         purple: 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-600',
 8:         gray: 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-600'
 9:     };
10:     return (
11:         <motion.div
12:             initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
13:             animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
14:             transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
15:             className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 p-5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow"
16:         >
17:             <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
18:                 <div>
19:                     <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mb-1">{title}</p>
20:                     <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">{value}</h3>
21:                     {subtitle && (
22:                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 mt-1">{subtitle}</p>
23:                     )}
24:                 </div>
25:                 {Icon && (
26:                     <div className={`p-3 rounded-lg ${colorClasses[color] || colorClasses.blue}`}>
27:                         <Icon size={20} />
28:                     </div>
29:                 )}
30:             </div>
31:         </motion.div>
32:     );
33: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/TeamSuggestions.jsx
````javascript
 1: import { Code } from 'lucide-react';
 2: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
 3: export function TeamSuggestions({ suggestions }) {
 4:     if (!suggestions || suggestions.length === 0) {
 5:         return null;
 6:     }
 7:     return (
 8:         <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-800 p-6 shadow-sm transition-colors duration-300">
 9:             <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center mb-6">
10:                 <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white transition-colors">Encuentra a tu equipo</h3>
11:                 <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1 transition-colors">Compañeros sin equipo en tu grupo</p>
12:             </div>
13:             <div className="space-y-4">
14:                 {suggestions.map((student, index) => (
15:                     <motion.div
16:                         key={student.id}
17:                         initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
18:                         animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
19:                         transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}
20:                         className="flex flex-col items-center p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 border border-gray-50 dark:border-slate-800/50 hover:border-gray-100 dark:hover:border-slate-700 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md"
21:                     >
22:                         {student.fotoUrl ? (
23:                             <img
24:                                 src={student.fotoUrl}
25:                                 alt={student.nombreCompleto}
26:                                 className="h-12 w-12 rounded-full object-cover mb-3 shadow-sm border border-gray-100"
27:                             />
28:                         ) : (
29:                             <div className="h-12 w-12 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-100 to-blue-100 dark:from-indigo-900/40 dark:to-blue-900/40 flex items-center justify-center text-indigo-700 dark:text-indigo-300 font-bold uppercase mb-3 shadow-sm border border-transparent dark:border-indigo-800/30">
30:                                 {student.nombreCompleto?.substring(0, 2) || 'US'}
31:                             </div>
32:                         )}
33:                         <div className="text-center">
34:                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white transition-colors">{student.nombreCompleto}</p>
35:                             <div className="flex items-center justify-center mt-1.5">
36:                                 <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium border border-blue-100/50 dark:border-blue-800/30">
37:                                     <Code size={12} />
38:                                     {student.matricula || 'Sin Matrícula'}
39:                                 </span>
40:                             </div>
41:                         </div>
42:                     </motion.div>
43:                 ))}
44:             </div>
45:             <button className="w-full mt-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors text-center hidden">
46:                 Ver todos
47:             </button>
48:         </div>
49:     );
50: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Admin/Materias/MateriasController.cs
````csharp
 1: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
 2: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 4: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 5: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Abstractions;
 6: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 7: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Admin.Materias;
 8: [Authorize]
 9: [ApiController]
10: [Route("api/admin/materias")]
11: public class MateriasController : BaseApiController
12: {
13:     private readonly IMateriaRepository _repository;
14:     public MateriasController(IMateriaRepository repository)
15:     {
16:         _repository = repository;
17:     }
18:     [HttpGet]
19:     public async Task<ActionResult<List<Materia>>> GetAll([FromQuery] string? carreraId = null)
20:     {
21:         var materias = await _repository.GetAllActiveAsync();
22:         if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(carreraId))
23:         {
24:             materias = materias.Where(m => m.CarreraId == carreraId);
25:         }
26:         return Ok(materias.ToList());
27:     }
28:     [HttpGet("by-carrera/{carreraId}")]
29:     public async Task<ActionResult<List<Materia>>> GetByCarrera(string carreraId)
30:     {
31:         var materias = await _repository.GetByCuatrimestreAsync(0); // Get all
32:         var filtered = materias.Where(m => m.CarreraId == carreraId).ToList();
33:         return Ok(filtered);
34:     }
35:     [HttpGet("available")]
36:     public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<AvailableMateriaDto>>> GetAvailable([FromQuery] string carreraId, [FromServices] MediatR.IMediator mediator)
37:     {
38:         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(carreraId)) return BadRequest("El ID de la carrera es requerido.");
39:         var query = new GetAvailableMateriasQuery(carreraId);
40:         var result = await mediator.Send(query);
41:         return Ok(result);
42:     }
43:     [HttpPost]
44:     public async Task<ActionResult> Create([FromBody] CreateMateriaRequest request)
45:     {
46:         var materia = new Materia
47:         {
48:             Nombre = request.Nombre,
49:             Clave = request.Clave ?? string.Empty,
50:             CarreraId = request.CarreraId,
51:             Cuatrimestre = request.Cuatrimestre,
52:             IsActive = true,
53:             EsAltaPrioridad = request.EsAltaPrioridad,
54:             CreatedAt = Timestamp.GetCurrentTimestamp()
55:         };
56:         await _repository.CreateAsync(materia);
57:         return Ok(materia);
58:     }
59:     [HttpPut("{id}")]
60:     public async Task<ActionResult> Update(string id, [FromBody] UpdateMateriaRequest request)
61:     {
62:         var materia = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id);
63:         if (materia == null)
64:         {
65:             return NotFound();
66:         }
67:         materia.Nombre = request.Nombre;
68:         materia.Clave = request.Clave ?? string.Empty;
69:         materia.CarreraId = request.CarreraId;
70:         materia.CarreraId = request.CarreraId;
71:         materia.Cuatrimestre = request.Cuatrimestre;
72:         materia.EsAltaPrioridad = request.EsAltaPrioridad;
73:         await _repository.UpdateAsync(materia);
74:         return NoContent();
75:     }
76:     [HttpDelete("{id}")]
77:     public async Task<ActionResult> Delete(string id)
78:     {
79:         var materia = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id);
80:         if (materia == null)
81:         {
82:             return NotFound();
83:         }
84:         materia.IsActive = false;
85:         await _repository.UpdateAsync(materia);
86:         return NoContent();
87:     }
88: }
89: public record CreateMateriaRequest(string Nombre, string? Clave, string CarreraId, int Cuatrimestre, bool EsAltaPrioridad = false);
90: public record UpdateMateriaRequest(string Nombre, string? Clave, string CarreraId, int Cuatrimestre, bool EsAltaPrioridad = false);
````

 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 4: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Evaluations.GetByProject;
 5: // === QUERY ===
 6: public record GetEvaluationsByProjectQuery(string ProjectId) : IRequest<IEnumerable<EvaluationDto>>;

 8: public class GetEvaluationsByProjectHandler : IRequestHandler<GetEvaluationsByProjectQuery, IEnumerable<EvaluationDto>>

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/Delete/DeleteProjectHandler.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 3: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Delete;
 4: // === COMMAND ===
 5: public record DeleteProjectCommand(
 6:     string ProjectId,
 7:     string RequestingUserId // ID del usuario que solicita eliminar
 8: ) : IRequest<DeleteProjectResponse>;
 9: public record DeleteProjectResponse(bool Success, string Message);
10: // === HANDLER ===
11: public class DeleteProjectHandler : IRequestHandler<DeleteProjectCommand, DeleteProjectResponse>
12: {
13:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
14:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
15:     private readonly IEvaluationRepository _evaluationRepository;
16:     public DeleteProjectHandler(
17:         IProjectRepository projectRepository, 
18:         IUserRepository userRepository,
19:         IEvaluationRepository evaluationRepository)
20:     {
21:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
22:         _userRepository = userRepository;
23:         _evaluationRepository = evaluationRepository;
24:     }
25:     public async Task<DeleteProjectResponse> Handle(DeleteProjectCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
26:     {
27:         Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Starting deletion for project: {request.ProjectId} (Requested by: {request.RequestingUserId})");
28:         try 
29:         {
30:             var project = await _projectRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.ProjectId);
31:             if (project == null) 
32:             {
33:                 Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Project not found: {request.ProjectId}");
34:                 return new DeleteProjectResponse(false, "Proyecto no encontrado");
35:             }
36:             // Validar que sea el líder, un docente asignado o un administrador
37:             var requestingUser = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.RequestingUserId);
38:             bool isLeader = project.LiderId == request.RequestingUserId;
39:             bool isAdmin = requestingUser?.Rol == "Admin" || requestingUser?.Rol == "SuperAdmin";
40:             bool isAssignedTeacher = (requestingUser?.Rol == "Docente" && project.DocenteId == request.RequestingUserId);
41:             Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Auth Check: isLeader={isLeader}, isAdmin={isAdmin}, isAssignedTeacher={isAssignedTeacher}");
42:             if (!isLeader && !isAdmin && !isAssignedTeacher)
43:             {
44:                 Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Unauthorized attempt by: {request.RequestingUserId}");
45:                 return new DeleteProjectResponse(false, "No tienes permisos suficientes para eliminar este proyecto.");
46:             }
47:             // 1. Eliminar evaluaciones (Cascade Delete)
48:             Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Step 1: Fetching evaluations for project: {request.ProjectId}");
49:             var evaluations = await _evaluationRepository.GetByProjectIdAsync(request.ProjectId);
50:             int evalCount = 0;
51:             foreach (var evaluation in evaluations)
52:             {
53:                 Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Deleting evaluation: {evaluation.Id}");
54:                 await _evaluationRepository.DeleteAsync(evaluation.Id);
55:                 evalCount++;
56:             }
57:             Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Step 1 complete. Deleted {evalCount} evaluations.");
58:             // 2. Liberar a los miembros (User.ProjectId = null)
59:             // Usamos project.MiembrosIds y project.LiderId para asegurar limpieza
60:             Console.WriteLine("[DELETE-DEBUG] Step 2: Releasing members...");
61:             var usersToRelease = new List<string>(project.MiembrosIds);
62:             if (!usersToRelease.Contains(project.LiderId)) 
63:                 usersToRelease.Add(project.LiderId);
64:             int releasedCount = 0;
65:             foreach (var userId in usersToRelease)
66:             {
67:                 var member = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(userId);
68:                 if (member != null && member.ProjectId == request.ProjectId)
69:                 {
70:                     Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Releasing member: {member.Id}");
71:                     member.ProjectId = null;
72:                     await _userRepository.UpdateAsync(member);
73:                     releasedCount++;
74:                 }
75:             }
76:             Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Step 2 complete. Released {releasedCount} members.");
77:             // 3. Eliminar el proyecto
78:             Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] Step 3: Deleting project document: {request.ProjectId}");
79:             await _projectRepository.DeleteAsync(request.ProjectId);
80:             Console.WriteLine("[DELETE-DEBUG] All steps completed successfully.");
81:             return new DeleteProjectResponse(true, "Proyecto eliminado y equipo disuelto exitosamente.");
82:         }
83:         catch (Exception ex)
84:         {
85:             Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] CRITICAL ERROR during deletion: {ex.Message}");
86:             Console.WriteLine($"[DELETE-DEBUG] StackTrace: {ex.StackTrace}");
87:             return new DeleteProjectResponse(false, $"Error interno al eliminar el proyecto: {ex.Message}");
88:         }
89:     }
90: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Storage/StorageController.cs
````csharp
  1: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Infrastructure.Services;
  2: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
  3: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
  4: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Abstractions;
  5: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Storage;
  6: [Authorize]
  7: [ApiController]
  8: [Route("api/[controller]")]
  9: public class StorageController : BaseApiController
 10: {
 11:     private readonly IStorageService _storageService;
 12:     private readonly ILogger<StorageController> _logger;
 13:     public StorageController(IStorageService storageService, ILogger<StorageController> logger)
 14:     {
 15:         _storageService = storageService;
 16:         _logger = logger;
 17:     }
 18:     /// <summary>
 19:     /// Sube un archivo al storage de Supabase
 20:     /// </summary>
 21:     [HttpPost("upload")]
 22:     [RequestSizeLimit(524288000)] // 500 MB
 23:     [RequestFormLimits(MultipartBodyLengthLimit = 524288000)] // 500 MB
 24:     public async Task<IActionResult> UploadFile(IFormFile file, [FromQuery] string folder = "projects")
 25:     {
 26:         if (file == null || file.Length == 0)
 27:         {
 28:             return BadRequest(new { error = "No file provided" });
 29:         }
 30:         // Validar tamaño (máximo 500MB)
 31:         if (file.Length > 500L * 1024 * 1024)
 32:         {
 33:             return BadRequest(new { error = "File size exceeds 500MB limit" });
 34:         }
 35:         // Validar tipo de archivo
 36:         var allowedTypes = new[] { 
 37:             "image/jpeg", "image/png", "image/gif", "image/webp", "application/pdf",
 38:             "video/mp4", "video/webm", "video/quicktime"
 39:         };
 40:         if (!allowedTypes.Contains(file.ContentType))
 41:         {
 42:             return BadRequest(new { error = "Invalid file type. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, PDF, MP4, WebM, MOV" });
 43:         }
 44:         try
 45:         {
 46:             using var stream = file.OpenReadStream();
 47:             var filePath = await _storageService.UploadFileAsync(stream, file.FileName, file.ContentType, folder);
 48:             var publicUrl = _storageService.GetPublicUrl(filePath);
 49:             _logger.LogInformation("File uploaded successfully: {FilePath}", filePath);
 50:             return Ok(new
 51:             {
 52:                 path = filePath,
 53:                 url = publicUrl,
 54:                 fileName = file.FileName,
 55:                 contentType = file.ContentType,
 56:                 size = file.Length
 57:             });
 58:         }
 59:         catch (Exception ex)
 60:         {
 61:             _logger.LogError(ex, "Error uploading file");
 62:             return StatusCode(500, new { error = "Error uploading file", details = ex.Message });
 63:         }
 64:     }
 65:     /// <summary>
 66:     /// Sube múltiples archivos
 67:     /// </summary>
 68:     [HttpPost("upload-multiple")]
 69:     public async Task<IActionResult> UploadMultipleFiles(List<IFormFile> files, [FromQuery] string folder = "projects")
 70:     {
 71:         if (files == null || files.Count == 0)
 72:         {
 73:             return BadRequest(new { error = "No files provided" });
 74:         }
 75:         var results = new List<object>();
 76:         var errors = new List<string>();
 77:         foreach (var file in files)
 78:         {
 79:             try
 80:             {
 81:                 if (file.Length > 10 * 1024 * 1024)
 82:                 {
 83:                     errors.Add($"{file.FileName}: exceeds 10MB limit");
 84:                     continue;
 85:                 }
 86:                 using var stream = file.OpenReadStream();
 87:                 var filePath = await _storageService.UploadFileAsync(stream, file.FileName, file.ContentType, folder);
 88:                 var publicUrl = _storageService.GetPublicUrl(filePath);
 89:                 results.Add(new
 90:                 {
 91:                     path = filePath,
 92:                     url = publicUrl,
 93:                     fileName = file.FileName
 94:                 });
 95:             }
 96:             catch (Exception ex)
 97:             {
 98:                 errors.Add($"{file.FileName}: {ex.Message}");
 99:             }
100:         }
101:         return Ok(new
102:         {
103:             uploaded = results,
104:             errors = errors
105:         });
106:     }
107:     /// <summary>
108:     /// Elimina un archivo del storage
109:     /// </summary>
110:     [HttpDelete("{*filePath}")]
111:     public async Task<IActionResult> DeleteFile(string filePath)
112:     {
113:         try
114:         {
115:             var success = await _storageService.DeleteFileAsync(filePath);
116:             if (success)
117:             {
118:                 return Ok(new { message = "File deleted successfully" });
119:             }
120:             return NotFound(new { error = "File not found" });
121:         }
122:         catch (Exception ex)
123:         {
124:             _logger.LogError(ex, "Error deleting file: {FilePath}", filePath);
125:             return StatusCode(500, new { error = "Error deleting file" });
126:         }
127:     }
128: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Users/UsersProfileController.cs
````csharp
  1: using MediatR;
  2: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
  3: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
  4: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Users.UpdateProfilePhoto;
  5: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Users.UpdateSocialLinks;
  6: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Users.GetPublicProfile;
  7: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Abstractions;
  8: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Users;
  9: [Authorize]
 10: [ApiController]
 11: [Route("api/users")]
 12: public class UsersProfileController : BaseApiController
 13: {
 14:     private readonly IMediator _mediator;
 15:     public UsersProfileController(IMediator mediator)
 16:     {
 17:         _mediator = mediator;
 18:     }
 19:     /// <summary>
 20:     /// Gets a user's public profile data.
 21:     /// Público: cualquier usuario autenticado puede ver perfiles.
 22:     /// </summary>
 23:     [AllowAnonymous]
 24:     [HttpGet("{userId}/profile")]
 25:     public async Task<IActionResult> GetPublicProfile(string userId)
 26:     {
 27:         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(userId))
 28:         {
 29:             return BadRequest(new { error = "User ID is required." });
 30:         }
 31:         try
 32:         {
 33:             var result = await _mediator.Send(new GetPublicProfileQuery(userId));
 34:             return Ok(result);
 35:         }
 36:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex)
 37:         {
 38:             return NotFound(new { error = ex.Message });
 39:         }
 40:         catch (Exception ex)
 41:         {
 42:             Console.WriteLine($"Error getting public profile: {ex.Message}");
 43:             return StatusCode(500, new { error = "Error getting public profile." });
 44:         }
 45:     }
 46:     /// <summary>
 47:     /// Updates the user's profile photo URL.
 48:     /// SEGURIDAD: Solo el dueño del perfil puede cambiar su foto.
 49:     /// </summary>
 50:     [HttpPut("{userId}/photo")]
 51:     public async Task<IActionResult> UpdateProfilePhoto(string userId, [FromBody] UpdatePhotoRequest request)
 52:     {
 53:         // Validación de ownership: solo puedes modificar TU perfil
 54:         if (userId != GetUserId())
 55:         {
 56:             return Forbid("No tienes permiso para modificar este perfil.");
 57:         }
 58:         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request?.FotoUrl))
 59:         {
 60:             return BadRequest(new { error = "Photo URL is required." });
 61:         }
 62:         try
 63:         {
 64:             var result = await _mediator.Send(new UpdateProfilePhotoCommand(userId, request.FotoUrl));
 65:             return Ok(result);
 66:         }
 67:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex)
 68:         {
 69:             return NotFound(new { error = ex.Message });
 70:         }
 71:         catch (Exception ex)
 72:         {
 73:             Console.WriteLine($"Error updating profile photo: {ex.Message}");
 74:             return StatusCode(500, new { error = "Error updating profile photo." });
 75:         }
 76:     }
 77:     /// <summary>
 78:     /// Updates the user's social links.
 79:     /// SEGURIDAD: Solo el dueño del perfil puede cambiar sus redes sociales.
 80:     /// </summary>
 81:     [HttpPut("{userId}/social")]
 82:     public async Task<IActionResult> UpdateSocialLinks(string userId, [FromBody] UpdateSocialLinksRequest request)
 83:     {
 84:         // Validación de ownership: solo puedes modificar TU perfil
 85:         if (userId != GetUserId())
 86:         {
 87:             return Forbid("No tienes permiso para modificar este perfil.");
 88:         }
 89:         if (request?.RedesSociales == null)
 90:         {
 91:             Console.WriteLine("[DEBUG] UpdateSocialLinks: request.RedesSociales is NULL");
 92:             return BadRequest(new { error = "RedesSociales dictionary is required." });
 93:         }
 94:         try
 95:         {
 96:             var result = await _mediator.Send(new UpdateSocialLinksCommand(userId, request.RedesSociales));
 97:             return Ok(new { success = result, message = "Redes sociales actualizadas correctamente" });
 98:         }
 99:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex)
100:         {
101:             return NotFound(new { error = ex.Message });
102:         }
103:         catch (Exception ex)
104:         {
105:             Console.WriteLine($"Error updating social links: {ex.Message}");
106:             return StatusCode(500, new { error = "Error updating social links." });
107:         }
108:     }
109: }
110: public record UpdatePhotoRequest(string FotoUrl);
111: public record UpdateSocialLinksRequest(Dictionary<string, string> RedesSociales);
````

 1: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Enums;
 3: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 4: [FirestoreData]
 5: public class User
 6: {
 7:     [FirestoreDocumentId]
 8:     public string Id { get; set; } = string.Empty;
 9:     [FirestoreProperty("email")]
10:     public string Email { get; set; } = string.Empty;
11:     [FirestoreProperty("nombre")]
12:     public string Nombre { get; set; } = string.Empty;
13:     [FirestoreProperty("apellido_paterno")]
14:     public string ApellidoPaterno { get; set; } = string.Empty;
15:     [FirestoreProperty("apellido_materno")]
16:     public string ApellidoMaterno { get; set; } = string.Empty;

20:     public string? FotoUrl { get; set; }
21:     [FirestoreProperty("rol")]
22:     public string Rol { get; set; } = nameof(UserRole.Invitado);
23:     [FirestoreProperty("grupo_id")]
24:     public string? GrupoId { get; set; }
25:     [FirestoreProperty("carrera_id")]
26:     public string? CarreraId { get; set; } // Para alumnos
27:     [FirestoreProperty("project_id")]
28:     public string? ProjectId { get; set; } // ID del proyecto/equipo al que pertenece (Exclusividad)
29:     // --- Docente ---
30:     [FirestoreProperty("asignaciones")]
31:     public List<AsignacionDocente>? Asignaciones { get; set; } // Asignaciones de Carrera -> Materia -> Grupos
32:     [FirestoreProperty("profesion")]
33:     public string? Profesion { get; set; } // Ej: "Ingeniero en Sistemas"
34:     [FirestoreProperty("especialidad_docente")]
35:     public string? EspecialidadDocente { get; set; }
36:     // --- Invitado ---
37:     [FirestoreProperty("organizacion")]
38:     public string? Organizacion { get; set; } // Ej: "Google", "Freelance"
39:     [FirestoreProperty("created_at")]
40:     public object? CreatedAt { get; set; }
41:     [FirestoreProperty("updated_at")]
42:     public object? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
43:     public string? GetCreatedAtAsString() => CreatedAt switch {
44:         Timestamp t => t.ToDateTime().ToString("o"),
45:         string s => s,
46:         _ => null
47:     };
48:     public string? GetUpdatedAtAsString() => UpdatedAt switch {
49:         Timestamp t => t.ToDateTime().ToString("o"),
50:         string s => s,
51:         _ => null
52:     };
53:     [FirestoreProperty("is_first_login")]
54:     public bool IsFirstLogin { get; set; } = true;
55:     [FirestoreProperty("redes_sociales")]
56:     public Dictionary<string, string>? RedesSociales { get; set; } = new();
57: }
