````markdown
242: # Especificación de Diagramas Técnicos
243: 
244: ## 1. Diagrama de Casos de Uso (Permisos)
245: Define límites de interacción para Alumno (Líder), Docente y Admin. Desde autenticación hasta cierre de ciclo académico.
246: 
247: ## 2. Diagrama de Secuencia (Invitación de Integrante)
248: Detalla la interacción Frontend-Backend-DB durante la búsqueda y adición de miembros con validación de grupo y tooltip de matrícula.
249: 
250: ## 3. Diagrama de Estados (Ciclo de Vida)
251: Transiciones formales: Inicial -> Desarrollo -> Exhibición -> Legado.
252: 
253: ## 4. Diagrama de Arquitectura Física
254: React 18 (Presentación) -> Firebase Auth/Hooks (Servicios) -> Firestore (Datos) -> Storage (Multimedia).
255: 
256: ---
257: 
258: # Arquitectura del Sistema (Implementación Actual)
259: 
260: Este proyecto implementa una arquitectura moderna, desacoplada y escalable, dividida físicamente en dos grandes bloques tecnológicos: un Backend robusto en .NET 8 y un Frontend reactivo en React 19.
261: 
262: ## 1. Stack Tecnológico
263: 
264: | Capa | Tecnología | Versión | Rol Principal |
265: | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
266: | **Backend** | .NET (C#) | 8.0 | API REST, Reglas de Negocio, Orquestación. |
267: | **Frontend** | React | 19.x | Interfaz de Usuario, Estado Global. |
268: | **Build Tool** | Vite | 7.x | Empaquetado y Entorno de Desarrollo Rápido. |
269: | **Estilos** | Tailwind CSS | 4.x | Diseño Atómico y Responsivo. |
270: | **BD** | Google Firestore | NoSQL | Persistencia de Datos Documental. |
271: | **Auth** | Firebase Auth | SDK | Gestión de Identidad y Roles. |
272: | **Patrón** | CQRS + Mediator | MediatR | Separación de Comandos y Consultas. |
273: 
274: ## 2. Arquitectura Backend (.NET 8)
275: 
276: El backend no sigue una arquitectura de capas tradicional (N-Layer), sino que adopta **Vertical Slice Architecture** (Arquitectura de Cortes Verticales). Este enfoque organiza el código por **Features** (Funcionalidades) en lugar de capas técnicas, lo que permite que cada funcionalidad (ej. "Crear Proyecto") sea autónoma y fácil de mantener.
277: 
278: ### Organización del Código
279: *   **Features/**: Es el corazón del sistema. Cada carpeta aquí representa una "Rebanada Vertical" completa.
280:     *   *Ejemplo:* `Features/Projects/Create` contiene:
281:         *   `CreateProjectCommand.cs` (La intención del usuario).
282:         *   `CreateProjectHandler.cs` (La lógica de negocio).
283:         *   `CreateProjectValidator.cs` (Reglas de validación, ej. "Título no vacío").
284:         *   `ProjectsController.cs` (El endpoint HTTP que expone la funcionalidad).
285: *   **Shared/**: Contiene el núcleo común que comparten las features, como las Entidades del Dominio (`User`, `Project`) y la configuración de Infraestructura (`FirestoreContext`).
286: 
287: ### Patrón CQRS (Command Query Responsibility Segregation)
288: Utilizamos la librería **MediatR** para desacoplar totalmente la recepción de una petición HTTP de su procesamiento.
289: *   **Commands (Escritura):** Acciones que modifican el estado del sistema (Create, Update, Delete). Retornan éxito o fallo.
290: *   **Queries (Lectura):** Acciones que solo recuperan datos. Están optimizadas para velocidad y no modifican nada.
291: 
292: ## 3. Arquitectura Frontend (React 19 + Vite)
293: 
294: El frontend refleja la estructura modular del backend para reducir la carga cognitiva del desarrollador. Si existe una Feature de "Proyectos" en el backend, existe una Feature de "Proyectos" en el frontend.
295: 
296: ### Estructura de Componentes
297: *   **src/features/**: Contiene la lógica, hooks y componentes específicos de cada módulo de negocio (Auth, ProjectCanvas, Showcase).
298: *   **src/components/ui/**: Componentes "tontos" y reutilizables (Botones, Inputs, Cards) que siguen un sistema de diseño atómico. No contienen lógica de negocio.
299: *   **src/lib/**: Configuración de infraestructura frontend (Cliente de Axios, Inicialización de Firebase).
300: 
301: ### Flujo de Datos (Data Journey)
302: 1.  **UI:** El usuario interactúa con un componente (ej. clic en "Guardar").
303: 2.  **Hook:** Un Custom Hook (`useProjectOps`) despacha la acción.
304: 3.  **API Layer:** Axios envía la petición HTTP al Backend (.NET).
305: 4.  **CQRS:** El controlador recibe la petición y envía un *Command* a MediatR.
306: 5.  **Handler:** El Handler ejecuta la lógica, valida reglas de negocio y persiste en Firestore.
307: 6.  **Response:** El resultado viaja de vuelta a la UI para actualizar el estado visual.
308: 
309: ## 4. Estructura de Directorios del Proyecto
310: 
311: ```text
312: /IntegradorHub-Root
313: │
314: ├── /backend (Solución .NET 8 - Vertical Slice Architecture)
315: │   ├── /src
316: │   │   ├── /IntegradorHub.API
317: │   │   │   ├── /Features                  <-- LÓGICA DE NEGOCIO (Slices)
318: │   │   │   │   ├── /Auth                  (Login, Identificación de Roles)
319: │   │   │   │   ├── /Projects              (CRUD de Proyectos, Lógica de Squads)
320: │   │   │   │   └── /Evaluations           (Sistema de Feedback Docente)
321: │   │   │   ├── /Shared                    <-- NÚCLEO COMPARTIDO
322: │   │   │   │   ├── /Domain                (Entidades: User, Project)
323: │   │   │   │   └── /Infrastructure        (Conexión a Firestore)
324: │   │   │   └── Program.cs                 (Configuración de Inyección de Dependencias)
325: │
326: ├── /frontend (React 19 + Vite - Feature Based)
327: │   ├── /src
328: │   │   ├── /features                      <-- MÓDULOS DE UI
329: │   │   │   ├── /auth                      (Formularios y Hooks de Sesión)
330: │   │   │   ├── /project-canvas            (Editor de Bloques estilo Notion)
331: │   │   │   └── /showcase                  (Galería Pública)
332: │   │   ├── /components                    <-- SISTEMA DE DISEÑO (Atomic)
333: │   │   ├── /lib                           (Configuración Axios/Firebase)
334: │   │   └── flujos y rutas                 (Router y Layouts)
335: │
336: └── /docs                                  <-- DOCUMENTACIÓN EXTENDIDA
337: ```
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/Update/UpdateProjectHandler.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 4: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 5: using System.Text.Json;
 6: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Update;
 7: public class UpdateProjectHandler : IRequestHandler<UpdateProjectCommand, UpdateProjectResponse>
 8: {
 9:     private readonly IProjectRepository _repository;
10:     public UpdateProjectHandler(IProjectRepository repository)
11:     {
12:         _repository = repository;
13:     }
14:     public async Task<UpdateProjectResponse> Handle(UpdateProjectCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
15:     {
16:         var project = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(request.ProjectId);
17:         if (project == null)
18:             throw new KeyNotFoundException("Proyecto no encontrado");
19:         project.Titulo = request.Titulo;
20:         project.VideoUrl = request.VideoUrl;
21:         project.CanvasBlocks = SanitizeBlocks(request.CanvasBlocks);
22:         if (request.EsPublico.HasValue)
23:             project.EsPublico = request.EsPublico.Value;
24:         project.UpdatedAt = Timestamp.FromDateTime(DateTime.UtcNow);
25:         await _repository.UpdateAsync(project);
26:         return new UpdateProjectResponse(true, "Proyecto actualizado correctamente");
27:     }
28:     private List<CanvasBlock> SanitizeBlocks(List<CanvasBlock> blocks)
29:     {
30:         if (blocks == null) return new List<CanvasBlock>();
31:         foreach (var block in blocks)
32:         {
33:             if (block.Metadata != null && block.Metadata.Count > 0)
34:             {
35:                 block.Metadata = FlattenMetadata(block.Metadata);
36:             }
37:         }
38:         return blocks;
39:     }
40:     // Converts metadata so it can be saved to Firestore.
41:     // Firestore does NOT support arrays-of-arrays (e.g. table rows = string[][]).
42:     // Fix: serialize any nested objects/arrays that are themselves complex 
43:     // (like 'table') into a JSON string. Simple primitives are kept as-is.
44:     private Dictionary<string, object> FlattenMetadata(Dictionary<string, object> metadata)
45:     {
46:         var result = new Dictionary<string, object>();
47:         foreach (var kvp in metadata)
48:         {
49:             if (kvp.Value is JsonElement element)
50:             {
51:                 switch (element.ValueKind)
52:                 {
53:                     case JsonValueKind.String:
54:                         result[kvp.Key] = element.GetString() ?? string.Empty;
55:                         break;
56:                     case JsonValueKind.Number:
57:                         if (element.TryGetInt64(out long l)) result[kvp.Key] = l;
58:                         else if (element.TryGetDouble(out double d)) result[kvp.Key] = d;
59:                         else result[kvp.Key] = 0L;
60:                         break;
61:                     case JsonValueKind.True:
62:                         result[kvp.Key] = true;
63:                         break;
64:                     case JsonValueKind.False:
65:                         result[kvp.Key] = false;
66:                         break;
67:                     case JsonValueKind.Null:
68:                     case JsonValueKind.Undefined:
69:                         // skip nulls — Firestore fields must not be null in a map
70:                         break;
71:                     case JsonValueKind.Object:
72:                     case JsonValueKind.Array:
73:                         // Firestore does not support nested arrays (arrays of arrays).
74:                         // Serialize complex nested structures as a JSON string so they
75:                         // round-trip safely. The frontend already handles this via getTableData.
76:                         result[kvp.Key] = element.GetRawText();
77:                         break;
78:                 }
79:             }
80:             else if (kvp.Value != null)
81:             {
82:                 // Already a native type (bool, long, string) — pass through
83:                 result[kvp.Key] = kvp.Value;
84:             }
85:         }
86:         return result;
87:     }
88: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Shared/Domain/Entities/Evaluation.cs
````csharp
 1: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 2: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: [FirestoreData]
 4: public class Evaluation
 5: {
 6:     [FirestoreDocumentId]
 7:     public string Id { get; set; } = string.Empty;
 8:     [FirestoreProperty("project_id")]
 9:     public string ProjectId { get; set; } = string.Empty;
10:     [FirestoreProperty("docente_id")]
11:     public string DocenteId { get; set; } = string.Empty;
12:     [FirestoreProperty("docente_nombre")]
13:     public string DocenteNombre { get; set; } = string.Empty;
14:     [FirestoreProperty("tipo")]
15:     public string Tipo { get; set; } = "sugerencia"; // "oficial" | "sugerencia"
16:     [FirestoreProperty("contenido")]
17:     public string Contenido { get; set; } = string.Empty;
18:     [FirestoreProperty("calificacion")]
19:     public double? Calificacion { get; set; } // Solo para tipo "oficial", 0-100
20:     [FirestoreProperty("es_publico")]
21:     public bool EsPublico { get; set; } = false; // Control de privacidad por el líder
22:     [FirestoreProperty("puntos_otorgados")]
23:     public object? PuntosOtorgados { get; set; } // Puede ser int o un objeto de rúbrica
24:     [FirestoreProperty("created_at")]
25:     public object? CreatedAt { get; set; }
26:     [FirestoreProperty("updated_at")]
27:     public object? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
28:     public DateTime GetCreatedAtAsDateTime() => CreatedAt switch {
29:         Timestamp t => t.ToDateTime(),
30:         string s when DateTime.TryParse(s, out var dt) => dt,
31:         _ => DateTime.UtcNow
32:     };
33: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/public/pages/RankingPage.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { Trophy, Medal, Star, Crown, ChevronRight, Users, Calendar } from 'lucide-react';
  3: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
  4: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  5: import { ProjectDetailsModal } from '../../projects/components/ProjectDetailsModal';
  6: // --- Particle Background (Canvas Optimized) ---
  7: const ParticleBackground = () => {
  8:     useEffect(() => {
  9:         const canvas = document.getElementById('ranking-particles');
 10:         if (!canvas) return;
 11:         const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
 12:         let animationFrameId;
 13:         let particles = [];
 14:         const particleCount = 40;
 15:         const resize = () => {
 16:             canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
 17:             canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
 18:         };
 19:         class Particle {
 20:             constructor() {
 21:                 this.init();
 22:             }
 23:             init() {
 24:                 this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
 25:                 this.y = Math.random() * canvas.height;
 26:                 this.size = Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5;
 27:                 this.speedX = Math.random() * 0.3 - 0.15;
 28:                 this.speedY = Math.random() * 0.3 - 0.15;
 29:                 this.opacity = Math.random() * 0.4 + 0.1;
 30:             }
 31:             update() {
 32:                 this.x += this.speedX;
 33:                 this.y += this.speedY;
 34:                 if (this.x > canvas.width) this.x = 0;
 35:                 if (this.x < 0) this.x = canvas.width;
 36:                 if (this.y > canvas.height) this.y = 0;
 37:                 if (this.y < 0) this.y = canvas.height;
 38:             }
 39:             draw() {
 40:                 ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${this.opacity})`;
 41:                 ctx.beginPath();
 42:                 ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
 43:                 ctx.fill();
 44:             }
 45:         }
 46:         for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
 47:             particles.push(new Particle());
 48:         }
 49:         const animate = () => {
 50:             ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
 51:             particles.forEach(p => {
 52:                 p.update();
 53:                 p.draw();
 54:             });
 55:             animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
 56:         };
 57:         window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
 58:         resize();
 59:         animate();
 60:         return () => {
 61:             window.removeEventListener('resize', resize);
 62:             cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId);
 63:         };
 64:     }, []);
 65:     return <canvas id="ranking-particles" className="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-40 z-0" />;
 66: };
 67: const Spotlight = () => (
 68:     <div className="absolute top-[30%] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] pointer-events-none z-0">
 69:         <div className="w-full h-full rounded-full bg-white/[0.04] blur-[120px] animate-pulse" />
 70:     </div>
 71: );
 72: export default function RankingPage() {
 73:     const [projects, setProjects] = useState([]);
 74:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 75:     const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null);
 76:     const [filter, setFilter] = useState('all'); // 'all' (placeholder for daily/monthly structure)
 77:     useEffect(() => {
 78:         fetchRanking();
 79:     }, []);
 80:     const fetchRanking = async () => {
 81:         try {
 82:             const response = await api.get('/api/projects/public');
 83:             // Sort by Total Points Descending
 84:             const sorted = response.data.sort((a, b) => (b.puntosTotales || 0) - (a.puntosTotales || 0));
 85:             setProjects(sorted);
 86:         } catch (error) {
 87:             console.error('Error fetching ranking:', error);
 88:         } finally {
 89:             setLoading(false);
 90:         }
 91:     };
 92:     if (loading) return (
 93:         <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-black">
 94:             <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
 95:                 <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-white/10 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
 96:                 <p className="text-white/50 font-medium tracking-widest text-xs uppercase italic">Cargando Ranking</p>
 97:             </div>
 98:         </div>
 99:     );
100:     const top3 = projects.slice(0, 3);
101:     // Determine the position of the projects in the podium: [2nd, 1st, 3rd]
102:     const podiumProjects = [
103:         { project: top3[1], rank: 2 },
104:         { project: top3[0], rank: 1 },
105:         { project: top3[2], rank: 3 }
106:     ].filter(p => p.project);
107:     const rest = projects.slice(3, 30);
108:     return (
109:         <div className="min-h-screen bg-black text-white selection:bg-white selection:text-black pb-20 overflow-x-hidden pt-10">
110:             <ParticleBackground />
111:             <Spotlight />
112:             {/* Header Section */}
113:             <div className="relative pt-20 pb-16 px-4 overflow-hidden">
114:                 {/* Background Decor */}
115:                 <div className="absolute top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full h-full max-w-7xl">
116:                     <div className="absolute top-[-10%] left-[-10%] w-[40%] h-[40%] bg-white/5 blur-[120px] rounded-full"></div>
117:                     <div className="absolute bottom-[-10%] right-[-10%] w-[30%] h-[30%] bg-white/5 blur-[100px] rounded-full"></div>
118:                 </div>
119:                 <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto relative z-10">
120:                     <motion.div 
121:                         initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
122:                         animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
123:                         className="text-center space-y-4"
124:                     >
125:                         <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white/60 text-[10px] font-black tracking-widest uppercase">
126:                             <Trophy size={14} className="text-white" />
127:                             Official Leaderboard
128:                         </div>
129:                         <h1 className="text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-tight">
130:                             <span className="bg-gradient-to-t from-white/10 via-white/80 to-white bg-clip-text text-transparent">RANKING</span> <span className="text-white/20">PROYECTOS</span>
131:                         </h1>
132:                         <p className="text-white/40 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-lg font-medium tracking-tight">
133:                             Explora los proyectos de mayor impacto evaluados por la comunidad académica.
134:                         </p>
135:                     </motion.div>
136:                     {/* Filter Tabs (Structural for future) */}
137:                     <div className="flex justify-center mt-12">
138:                         <div className="inline-flex p-1.5 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl">
139:                             {['all', 'daily', 'monthly'].map((t) => (
140:                                 <button
141:                                     key={t}
142:                                     onClick={() => setFilter(t)}
143:                                     className={`px-10 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-black tracking-widest uppercase transition-all duration-500 ${
144:                                         filter === t 
145:                                         ? 'bg-white text-black shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]' 
146:                                         : 'text-white/40 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'
147:                                     }`}
148:                                 >
149:                                     {t === 'all' ? 'General' : t === 'daily' ? 'Diario' : 'Mensual'}
150:                                 </button>
151:                             ))}
152:                         </div>
153:                     </div>
154:                 </div>
155:             </div>
156:             <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 relative">
157:                 {/* Spotlight focused on #1 */}
158:                 <div className="absolute top-[150px] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] pointer-events-none z-0">
159:                     <div className="w-full h-full rounded-full bg-white/[0.05] blur-[120px] animate-pulse" />
160:                 </div>
161:                 {/* 3D PODIUM */}
162:                 <div className="relative flex flex-col md:flex-row items-end justify-center gap-4 md:gap-0 mt-16 mb-32 min-h-[480px] z-10">
163:                     {podiumProjects.map(({ project, rank }, idx) => (
164:                         <PodiumCard 
165:                             key={project.id}
166:                             project={project} 
167:                             rank={rank} 
168:                             height={rank === 1 ? "h-[380px]" : rank === 2 ? "h-[300px]" : "h-[250px]"} 
169:                             delay={idx * 0.1}
170:                             featured={rank === 1}
171:                             onOpen={() => setSelectedProject(project)}
172:                         />
173:                     ))}
174:                 </div>
175:                 {/* RANKING LIST */}
176:                 <div className="space-y-3 relative">
177:                     {/* Table Header */}
178:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-12 px-8 py-5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-white/20 border-b border-white/5">
179:                         <div className="col-span-1">RANK</div>
180:                         <div className="col-span-8 md:col-span-7">PROYECTO</div>
181:                         <div className="hidden md:block col-span-2">LÍDER</div>
182:                         <div className="col-span-3 md:col-span-2 text-right">SCORE</div>
183:                     </div>
184:                     {rest.map((project, index) => (
185:                         <motion.div
186:                             key={project.id}
187:                             initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
188:                             whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
189:                             viewport={{ once: true }}
190:                             transition={{ delay: index * 0.05 }}
191:                             onClick={() => setSelectedProject(project)}
192:                             className="group grid grid-cols-12 items-center px-8 py-6 bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 rounded-3xl hover:bg-white/[0.05] hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500 cursor-pointer"
193:                         >
194:                             <div className="col-span-1 font-black text-2xl text-white/10 group-hover:text-white/40 transition-colors">
195:                                 {index + 4}
196:                             </div>
197:                             <div className="col-span-8 md:col-span-7 pr-6">
198:                                 <div className="font-black text-xl tracking-tight group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform duration-500 uppercase">{project.titulo}</div>
199:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1.5">
200:                                     <div className="text-[10px] font-black tracking-widest text-white/30 uppercase bg-white/5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-white/5">
201:                                         {project.materia}
202:                                     </div>
203:                                     <div className="md:hidden text-[10px] text-white/40 font-bold uppercase truncate max-w-[150px]">
204:                                         {project.liderNombre}
205:                                     </div>
206:                                 </div>
207:                             </div>
208:                             <div className="hidden md:flex col-span-2 items-center gap-3">
209:                                 <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-800 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 overflow-hidden shrink-0 group-hover:border-white/30 transition-colors">
210:                                     {project.liderFotoUrl ? (
211:                                         <img src={project.liderFotoUrl} alt="" className="w-full h-full object-cover grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all" />
212:                                     ) : (
213:                                         <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-white/40 uppercase">{project.liderNombre?.charAt(0) || 'U'}</span>
214:                                     )}
215:                                 </div>
216:                                 <span className="text-sm font-bold text-white/40 group-hover:text-white/70 transition-colors truncate">{project.liderNombre}</span>
217:                             </div>
218:                             <div className="col-span-3 md:col-span-2 text-right">
219:                                 <div className="text-2xl font-black group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform origin-right">{project.puntosTotales}</div>
220:                                 <div className="text-[9px] text-white/20 font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">puntos</div>
221:                             </div>
222:                         </motion.div>
223:                     ))}
224:                     {projects.length === 0 && (
225:                         <div className="text-center py-20 bg-white/[0.02] rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-white/10">
226:                             <p className="text-white/20 font-black tracking-widest uppercase italic">No hay proyectos registrados aún</p>
227:                         </div>
228:                     )}
229:                 </div>
230:             </div>
231:             {/* Project Details Modal */}
232:             <AnimatePresence>
233:                 {selectedProject && (
234:                     <ProjectDetailsModal
235:                         project={selectedProject}
236:                         onClose={() => setSelectedProject(null)}
237:                     />
238:                 )}
239:             </AnimatePresence>
240:             <style>{`
241:                 @keyframes float {
242:                     0% { transform: translateY(0px); }
243:                     50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
244:                     100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
245:                 }
246:                 .floating {
247:                     animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
248:                 }
249:             `}</style>
250:         </div>
251:     );
252: }
253: function PodiumCard({ project, rank, height, delay, featured = false, onOpen }) {
254:     const Icon = rank === 1 ? Crown : rank === 2 ? Medal : Star;
255:     const borderClass = rank === 1 ? 'border-white/40' : 'border-white/10';
256:     const bgClass = rank === 1 
257:         ? 'bg-gradient-to-b from-white/10 via-white/[0.02] to-transparent' 
258:         : 'bg-white/[0.02]';
259:     return (
260:         <motion.div
261:             initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: 50 }}
262:             animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
263:             transition={{ delay, duration: 1, ease: [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1] }}
264:             className={`relative flex flex-col items-center w-full md:w-72 group cursor-pointer ${featured ? 'z-20 scale-105 md:scale-110 mb-4 md:mb-8' : 'z-10 opacity-70 hover:opacity-100'}`}
265:             onClick={onOpen}
266:         >
267:             {/* Avatar Section */}
268:             <div className="relative mb-10">
269:                 <motion.div 
270:                     whileHover={{ y: -10 }}
271:                     className={`relative w-28 h-28 md:w-36 md:h-36 rounded-full p-1 border-2 transition-all duration-700 shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] ${
272:                         rank === 1 ? 'border-white scale-110 bg-white/10' : 'border-white/20'
273:                     }`}
274:                 >
275:                     <div className="w-full h-full rounded-full bg-slate-800 overflow-hidden relative border border-white/5 flex items-center justify-center">
276:                         {project.liderFotoUrl ? (
277:                             <img src={project.liderFotoUrl} alt={project.liderNombre} className="w-full h-full object-cover grayscale transition-all duration-700 group-hover:grayscale-0" />
278:                         ) : (
279:                             <span className="text-4xl font-black text-white/40 uppercase italic select-none">
280:                                 {project.liderNombre?.charAt(0) || project.titulo?.charAt(0) || 'U'}
281:                             </span>
282:                         )}
283:                         <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500 flex items-end justify-center pb-4">
284:                             <span className="text-[10px] font-black tracking-widest uppercase">Ver Proyecto</span>
285:                         </div>
286:                     </div>
287:                 </motion.div>
288:                 {/* Floating Rank Badge */}
289:                 <div className={`absolute -bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 px-5 py-1.5 rounded-full font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] flex items-center gap-2 shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-xl transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-110 ${
290:                     rank === 1 ? 'bg-white text-black' : 'bg-neutral-900 text-white border border-white/20'
291:                 }`}>
292:                     <Icon size={14} fill={rank === 1 ? "black" : "none"} />
293:                     TOP {rank}
294:                 </div>
295:             </div>
296:             {/* Platform (Structure) */}
297:             <div className={`w-full overflow-hidden transition-all duration-700 rounded-3xl border ${borderClass} ${bgClass} ${height} backdrop-blur-sm shadow-2xl flex flex-col`}>
298:                 <div className="p-8 flex flex-col items-center flex-1">
299:                     <h3 className={`font-black tracking-tighter mb-2 text-center line-clamp-2 uppercase transition-all duration-500 ${rank === 1 ? 'text-2xl' : 'text-xl'}`}>
300:                         {project.titulo}
301:                     </h3>
302:                     <div className="text-white/30 text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em] mb-8 text-center px-4 line-clamp-1">
303:                         {project.liderNombre}
304:                     </div>
305:                     <div className="mt-auto w-full pt-8 border-t border-white/5 space-y-1">
306:                         <div className={`font-black tabular-nums transition-all duration-700 ${rank === 1 ? 'text-5xl group-hover:scale-110' : 'text-4xl'}`}>
307:                             {project.puntosTotales}
308:                         </div>
309:                         <div className="text-[10px] text-white/20 font-black uppercase tracking-[0.4em]">
310:                             PUNTOS
311:                         </div>
312:                     </div>
313:                 </div>
314:                 {/* Aesthetic Detail at bottom */}
315:                 <div className="h-1 w-2/3 mx-auto bg-white/5 rounded-full mb-4"></div>
316:             </div>
317:             {/* Reflection Shadow */}
318:             <div className="absolute -bottom-12 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-4/5 h-8 bg-white/5 blur-2xl rounded-full opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-700"></div>
319:         </motion.div>
320:     );
321: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/GetByTeacher/GetProjectsByTeacherHandler.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 3: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetByTeacher;
 4: // === QUERY ===
 5: public record GetProjectsByTeacherQuery(string TeacherId) : IRequest<List<ProjectDto>>;
 6: public record ProjectDto(
 7:     string Id,
 8:     string Titulo,
 9:     string? Materia,
10:     string Estado,
11:     string LiderId,
12:     string? LiderNombre,
13:     string? LiderFotoUrl,
14:     int MembersCount,
15:     string? ThumbnailUrl,
16:     string? VideoUrl,
17:     string? DocenteId,
18:     bool EsPublico,
19:     DateTime CreatedAt,
20:     double? Calificacion,
21:     double? PuntosTotales,
22:     double? PuntosUIUX,
23:     double? PuntosInovacion,
24:     double? PuntosPresentacion,
25:     double? PuntosImpacto,
26:     List<string> StackTecnologico,
27:     string? Descripcion,
28:     Dictionary<string, object>? Votantes
29: );
30: // === HANDLER ===
31: public class GetProjectsByTeacherHandler : IRequestHandler<GetProjectsByTeacherQuery, List<ProjectDto>>
32: {
33:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
34:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
35:     public GetProjectsByTeacherHandler(IProjectRepository projectRepository, IUserRepository userRepository)
36:     {
37:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
38:         _userRepository = userRepository;
39:     }
40:     public async Task<List<ProjectDto>> Handle(GetProjectsByTeacherQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
41:     {
42:         var projects = await _projectRepository.GetByTeacherIdAsync(request.TeacherId);
43:         var result = new List<ProjectDto>();
44:         foreach (var p in projects)
45:         {
46:             string? liderNombre = null;
47:             string? liderFotoUrl = null;
48:             try
49:             {
50:                 var lider = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(p.LiderId);
51:                 liderNombre = lider?.Nombre;
52:                 liderFotoUrl = lider?.FotoUrl;
53:             }
54:             catch { /* ignore missing leaders */ }
55:             // Extract description from first non-empty text canvas block
56:             string? descripcion = null;
57:             if (p.CanvasBlocks != null)
58:             {
59:                 var textTypes = new[] { "text", "h1", "h2", "h3", "quote", "bullet", "todo" };
60:                 var textBlock = p.CanvasBlocks.FirstOrDefault(b =>
61:                     textTypes.Contains(b.Type?.ToLower()) &&
62:                     !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(b.Content));
63:                 if (textBlock?.Content != null)
64:                 {
65:                     descripcion = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(textBlock.Content, "<[^>]+>", "")
66:                         .Replace("&nbsp;", " ").Trim();
67:                 }
68:             }
69:             result.Add(new ProjectDto(
70:                 p.Id,
71:                 p.Titulo,
72:                 p.Materia,
73:                 p.Estado,
74:                 p.LiderId,
75:                 liderNombre,
76:                 liderFotoUrl,
77:                 p.MiembrosIds?.Count ?? 0,
78:                 p.ThumbnailUrl,
79:                 p.VideoUrl,
80:                 p.DocenteId,
81:                 p.EsPublico,
82:                 p.GetCreatedAtAsDateTime(),
83:                 p.Calificacion,
84:                 p.PuntosTotales,
85:                 p.PuntosUIUX,
86:                 p.PuntosInovacion,
87:                 p.PuntosPresentacion,
88:                 p.PuntosImpacto,
89:                 p.StackTecnologico ?? new List<string>(),
90:                 descripcion,
91:                 p.Votantes
92:             ));
93:         }
94:         return result;
95:     }
96: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/evaluations/pages/EvaluationsPage.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  3: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  4: import { EvaluationPanel } from '../components/EvaluationPanel';
  5: import { BookOpen, Users, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
  6: export default function EvaluationsPage() {
  7:     const { userData } = useAuth();
  8:     const [project, setProject] = useState(null);
  9:     const [teacherProjects, setTeacherProjects] = useState([]);
 10:     const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null);
 11:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 12:     useEffect(() => {
 13:         if (!userData) return;
 14:         if (userData.rol === 'Alumno') {
 15:             fetchStudentProject();
 16:         } else if (userData.rol === 'Docente') {
 17:             fetchTeacherProjects();
 18:         }
 19:     }, [userData]);
 20:     const fetchStudentProject = async () => {
 21:         try {
 22:             const { data } = await api.get(`/api/projects/my-project?userId=${userData.userId}`);
 23:             setProject(data);
 24:         } catch (error) {
 25:             console.log("No project found for student");
 26:         } finally {
 27:             setLoading(false);
 28:         }
 29:     };
 30:     const fetchTeacherProjects = async () => {
 31:         try {
 32:             const { data } = await api.get(`/api/projects/teacher/${userData.userId}`);
 33:             const uniqueProjects = [...new Map(data.map(p => [p.id, p])).values()];
 34:             setTeacherProjects(uniqueProjects);
 35:         } catch (error) {
 36:             console.error("Error fetching teacher projects", error);
 37:         } finally {
 38:             setLoading(false);
 39:         }
 40:     };
 41:     if (loading) return (
 42:         <div className="p-8">
 43:             <div className="animate-pulse h-32 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-3xl" />
 44:         </div>
 45:     );
 46:     // --- STUDENT VIEW ---
 47:     if (userData?.rol === 'Alumno') {
 48:         if (!project) {
 49:             return (
 50:                 <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center p-8">
 51:                     <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
 52:                         <BookOpen size={32} />
 53:                     </div>
 54:                     <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Sin Proyecto Asignado</h2>
 55:                     <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-2">Necesitas unirte a un proyecto para ver sus evaluaciones.</p>
 56:                 </div>
 57:             );
 58:         }
 59:         return (
 60:             <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto p-6">
 61:                 <div className="mb-8">
 62:                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Evaluaciones del Proyecto</h1>
 63:                     <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1">Revisa las calificaciones y comentarios de tus profesores.</p>
 64:                 </div>
 65:                 <EvaluationPanel projectId={project.id} />
 66:             </div>
 67:         );
 68:     }
 69:     // --- TEACHER VIEW ---
 70:     if (userData?.rol === 'Docente') {
 71:         if (selectedProject) {
 72:             return (
 73:                 <div className="h-full flex flex-col p-6 max-w-5xl mx-auto">
 74:                     <button
 75:                         onClick={() => setSelectedProject(null)}
 76:                         className="self-start mb-6 text-sm font-bold text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-white flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors"
 77:                     >
 78:                         ← Volver a la lista
 79:                     </button>
 80:                     <div className="mb-6">
 81:                         <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">{selectedProject.titulo}</h1>
 82:                         <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-400 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase">
 83:                             {selectedProject.materia}
 84:                         </span>
 85:                     </div>
 86:                     <EvaluationPanel projectId={selectedProject.id} />
 87:                 </div>
 88:             );
 89:         }
 90:         return (
 91:             <div className="p-6 max-w-5xl mx-auto">
 92:                 <div className="mb-8">
 93:                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Evaluaciones</h1>
 94:                     <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1">Selecciona un proyecto para evaluar.</p>
 95:                 </div>
 96:                 {teacherProjects.length === 0 ? (
 97:                     <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700">
 98:                         <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">No hay proyectos disponibles en tus grupos asignados.</p>
 99:                     </div>
100:                 ) : (
101:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
102:                         {teacherProjects.map(p => (
103:                             <div
104:                                 key={p.id}
105:                                 onClick={() => setSelectedProject(p)}
106:                                 className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] p-6 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md dark:hover:border-slate-600 transition-all cursor-pointer group"
107:                             >
108:                                 <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-4">
109:                                     <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 flex items-center justify-center text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400">
110:                                         <BookOpen size={20} />
111:                                     </div>
112:                                     <ChevronRight className="text-gray-300 dark:text-slate-600 group-hover:text-blue-500 transition-colors" />
113:                                 </div>
114:                                 <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-2 line-clamp-1">{p.titulo}</h3>
115:                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase mb-4">{p.materia}</p>
116:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">
117:                                     <Users size={16} />
118:                                     <span>{p.membersCount || 0} miembros</span>
119:                                 </div>
120:                             </div>
121:                         ))}
122:                     </div>
123:                 )}
124:             </div>
125:         );
126:     }
127:     return null;
128: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Evaluations/Create/CreateEvaluationHandler.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 4: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 5: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Evaluations.Create;
 6: // === COMMAND ===
 7: public record CreateEvaluationCommand(
 8:     string ProjectId,
 9:     string DocenteId,
10:     string DocenteNombre,
11:     string Tipo,          // "oficial" | "sugerencia"
12:     string Contenido,
13:     int? Calificacion     // Solo para tipo "oficial", 0-100
14: ) : IRequest<CreateEvaluationResponse>;
15: public record CreateEvaluationResponse(bool Success, string Message, string? EvaluationId);
16: // === HANDLER ===
17: public class CreateEvaluationHandler : IRequestHandler<CreateEvaluationCommand, CreateEvaluationResponse>
18: {
19:     private readonly IEvaluationRepository _evaluationRepository;
20:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
21:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
22:     private readonly IMateriaRepository _materiaRepository;
23:     public CreateEvaluationHandler(
24:         IEvaluationRepository evaluationRepository,
25:         IProjectRepository projectRepository,
26:         IUserRepository userRepository,
27:         IMateriaRepository materiaRepository)
28:     {
29:         _evaluationRepository = evaluationRepository;
30:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
31:         _userRepository = userRepository;
32:         _materiaRepository = materiaRepository;
33:     }
34:     public async Task<CreateEvaluationResponse> Handle(CreateEvaluationCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
35:     {
36:         // Validar que el proyecto existe
37:         var project = await _projectRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.ProjectId);
38:         if (project == null)
39:             throw new KeyNotFoundException("Proyecto no encontrado");
40:         // Validar que el usuario existe
41:         var docente = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.DocenteId);
42:         if (docente == null)
43:             throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("Usuario no encontrado");
44:         bool isDocente = docente.Rol == "Docente";
45:         bool isInvitado = docente.Rol == "Invitado";
46:         // Solo Docentes e Invitados pueden evaluar; otros roles no tienen este flujo
47:         if (!isDocente && !isInvitado)
48:             throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("No tienes permiso para evaluar proyectos");
49:         // Los Invitados solo pueden dejar sugerencias, nunca calificaciones oficiales
50:         if (isInvitado && request.Tipo == "oficial")
51:             throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("Los invitados solo pueden dejar sugerencias. Las calificaciones oficiales son exclusivas de los docentes.");
52:         // Validar tipo
53:         if (request.Tipo != "oficial" && request.Tipo != "sugerencia")
54:             throw new ArgumentException("Tipo de evaluación inválido. Debe ser 'oficial' o 'sugerencia'");
55:         // Validar calificación si es oficial (solo aplica a Docentes)
56:         if (request.Tipo == "oficial")
57:         {
58:             bool isTitular = project.DocenteId == request.DocenteId;
59:             bool isAdmin = docente.Rol == "admin" || docente.Rol == "SuperAdmin";
60:             // STRICT CHECK: Only Titular Project Leader or Admin can give Official Grades (0-100).
61:             // Other teachers/advisors can only give "Sugerencia" (or use the Star Rating system).
62:             if (!isTitular && !isAdmin)
63:                 throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("Solo el docente titular asignado al proyecto puede realizar evaluaciones oficiales (calificación 0-100). Otros docentes pueden dejar sugerencias.");
64:             if (!request.Calificacion.HasValue || request.Calificacion < 0 || request.Calificacion > 100)
65:                 throw new ArgumentException("Las evaluaciones oficiales requieren una calificación entre 0 y 100");
66:         }
67:         // Crear evaluación
68:         var evaluation = new Evaluation
69:         {
70:             ProjectId = request.ProjectId,
71:             DocenteId = request.DocenteId,
72:             DocenteNombre = request.DocenteNombre,
73:             Tipo = request.Tipo,
74:             Contenido = request.Contenido,
75:             Calificacion = request.Tipo == "oficial" ? request.Calificacion : null
76:         };
77:         if (request.Tipo == "oficial" && request.Calificacion.HasValue)
78:         {
79:             // Actualizar la calificación oficial del proyecto
80:             project.Calificacion = request.Calificacion.Value;
81:             // Update Project in DB
82:             await _projectRepository.UpdateAsync(project);
83:         }
84:         await _evaluationRepository.CreateAsync(evaluation);
85:         return new CreateEvaluationResponse(true, "Evaluación creada correctamente", evaluation.Id);
86:     }
87: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/GetByGroup/GetProjectsByGroupHandler.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 4: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetByGroup;
 5: // === QUERY ===
 6: public record GetProjectsByGroupQuery(string GroupId) : IRequest<List<ProjectDto>>;
 7: public record ProjectDto(
 8:     string Id,
 9:     string Titulo,
10:     string? Materia,
11:     string Estado,
12:     List<string> StackTecnologico,
13:     string LiderId,
14:     string? LiderNombre,
15:     string? LiderFotoUrl,
16:     int MembersCount,
17:     string? ThumbnailUrl,
18:     string? VideoUrl,
19:     string? DocenteId,
20:     bool EsPublico,
21:     DateTime CreatedAt,
22:     double? Calificacion,
23:     double? PuntosTotales,
24:     double? PuntosUIUX,
25:     double? PuntosInovacion,
26:     double? PuntosPresentacion,
27:     double? PuntosImpacto,
28:     string? Descripcion,
29:     Dictionary<string, object>? Votantes
30: );
31: // === HANDLER ===
32: public class GetProjectsByGroupHandler : IRequestHandler<GetProjectsByGroupQuery, List<ProjectDto>>
33: {
34:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
35:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
36:     public GetProjectsByGroupHandler(IProjectRepository projectRepository, IUserRepository userRepository)
37:     {
38:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
39:         _userRepository = userRepository;
40:     }
41:     public async Task<List<ProjectDto>> Handle(GetProjectsByGroupQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
42:     {
43:         var projects = await _projectRepository.GetByGroupIdAsync(request.GroupId);
44:         var result = new List<ProjectDto>();
45:         foreach (var p in projects)
46:         {
47:             string? liderNombre = null;
48:             string? liderFotoUrl = null;
49:             try
50:             {
51:                 var lider = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(p.LiderId);
52:                 liderNombre = lider?.Nombre;
53:                 liderFotoUrl = lider?.FotoUrl;
54:             }
55:             catch { /* ignore missing leaders */ }
56:             // Extract description from first non-empty text canvas block
57:             string? descripcion = null;
58:             if (p.CanvasBlocks != null)
59:             {
60:                 var textTypes = new[] { "text", "h1", "h2", "h3", "quote", "bullet", "todo" };
61:                 var textBlock = p.CanvasBlocks.FirstOrDefault(b =>
62:                     textTypes.Contains(b.Type?.ToLower()) &&
63:                     !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(b.Content));
64:                 if (textBlock?.Content != null)
65:                 {
66:                     descripcion = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(textBlock.Content, "<[^>]+>", "")
67:                         .Replace("&nbsp;", " ").Trim();
68:                 }
69:             }
70:             result.Add(new ProjectDto(
71:                 p.Id,
72:                 p.Titulo,
73:                 p.Materia,
74:                 p.Estado,
75:                 p.StackTecnologico ?? new List<string>(),
76:                 p.LiderId,
77:                 liderNombre,
78:                 liderFotoUrl,
79:                 p.MiembrosIds.Count,
80:                 p.ThumbnailUrl,
81:                 p.VideoUrl,
82:                 p.DocenteId,
83:                 p.EsPublico,
84:                 p.GetCreatedAtAsDateTime(),
85:                 p.Calificacion,
86:                 p.PuntosTotales,
87:                 p.PuntosUIUX,
88:                 p.PuntosInovacion,
89:                 p.PuntosPresentacion,
90:                 p.PuntosImpacto,
91:                 descripcion,
92:                 p.Votantes
93:             ));
94:         }
95:         return result;
96:     }
97: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Shared/Domain/Entities/Project.cs
````csharp
 1: using Google.Cloud.Firestore;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Enums;
 3: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 4: [FirestoreData]
 5: public class Project
 6: {
 7:     [FirestoreDocumentId]
 8:     public string Id { get; set; } = string.Empty;
 9:     [FirestoreProperty("titulo")]
10:     public string Titulo { get; set; } = string.Empty;
11:     [FirestoreProperty("materia")]
12:     public string Materia { get; set; } = string.Empty;
13:     [FirestoreProperty("materia_id")]
14:     public string MateriaId { get; set; } = string.Empty;
15:     [FirestoreProperty("ciclo")]
16:     public string Ciclo { get; set; } = string.Empty;
17:     [FirestoreProperty("grupo_id")]
18:     public string GrupoId { get; set; } = string.Empty;
19:     [FirestoreProperty("lider_id")]
20:     public string LiderId { get; set; } = string.Empty;
21:     [FirestoreProperty("miembros_ids")]
22:     public List<string> MiembrosIds { get; set; } = new();
23:     [FirestoreProperty("docente_id")]
24:     public string? DocenteId { get; set; }
25:     [FirestoreProperty("estado")]
26:     public string Estado { get; set; } = nameof(ProjectState.Borrador);
27:     [FirestoreProperty("stack_tecnologico")]
28:     public List<string> StackTecnologico { get; set; } = new();
29:     [FirestoreProperty("repositorio_url")]
30:     public string? RepositorioUrl { get; set; }
31:     [FirestoreProperty("video_url")]
32:     public string? VideoUrl { get; set; }
33:     [FirestoreProperty("demo_url")]
34:     public string? DemoUrl { get; set; }
35:     [FirestoreProperty("thumbnail_url")]
36:     public string? ThumbnailUrl { get; set; }
37:     [FirestoreProperty("canvas_blocks")]
38:     public List<CanvasBlock> CanvasBlocks { get; set; } = new();
39:     [FirestoreProperty("created_at")]
40:     public object? CreatedAt { get; set; }
41:     [FirestoreProperty("updated_at")]
42:     public object? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
43:     public DateTime GetCreatedAtAsDateTime()
44:     {
45:         if (CreatedAt is Timestamp ts) return ts.ToDateTime();
46:         if (CreatedAt is string s && DateTime.TryParse(s, out var dt)) return dt;
47:         return DateTime.MinValue;
48:     }
49:     public DateTime GetUpdatedAtAsDateTime()
50:     {
51:         if (UpdatedAt is Timestamp ts) return ts.ToDateTime();
52:         if (UpdatedAt is string s && DateTime.TryParse(s, out var dt)) return dt;
53:         return DateTime.MinValue;
54:     }
55:     // --- Nuevos Campos Requeridos ---
56:     [FirestoreProperty("calificacion")]
57:     public double? Calificacion { get; set; } // 0.0 - 100.0
58:     [FirestoreProperty("comentarios_docente")]
59:     public string? ComentariosDocente { get; set; }
60:     [FirestoreProperty("es_publico")]
61:     public bool EsPublico { get; set; } = false; // Privado por defecto
62:     // --- Ranking System Fields ---
63:     [FirestoreProperty("puntos_totales")]
64:     public double PuntosTotales { get; set; } = 0;
65:     [FirestoreProperty("conteo_votos")]
66:     public int ConteoVotos { get; set; } = 0;
67:     // --- Acumuladores por Criterio (para Dashboard) ---
68:     [FirestoreProperty("puntos_uiux")]
69:     public double PuntosUIUX { get; set; } = 0;
70:     [FirestoreProperty("puntos_inovacion")]
71:     public double PuntosInovacion { get; set; } = 0;
72:     [FirestoreProperty("puntos_presentacion")]
73:     public double PuntosPresentacion { get; set; } = 0;
74:     [FirestoreProperty("puntos_impacto")]
75:     public double PuntosImpacto { get; set; } = 0;
76:     // Votantes: userId -> RubricVote (objeto). Lectura híbrida en el handler.
77:     [FirestoreProperty("votantes")]
78:     public Dictionary<string, object> Votantes { get; set; } = new();
79: }
80: [FirestoreData]
81: public class CanvasBlock
82: {
83:     [FirestoreProperty("id")]
84:     public string Id { get; set; } = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();
85:     [FirestoreProperty("type")]
86:     public string Type { get; set; } = "text"; // text, heading, image, video, code
87:     [FirestoreProperty("content")]
88:     public string Content { get; set; } = string.Empty;
89:     [FirestoreProperty("order")]
90:     public int Order { get; set; }
91:     [FirestoreProperty("metadata")]
92:     public Dictionary<string, object>? Metadata { get; set; }
93: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/StudentDashboard.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useMemo } from 'react';
  2: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3: import { Users, Star, Clock, CheckCircle, ExternalLink, Plus } from 'lucide-react';
  4: import { StatCard } from './StatCard';
  5: import { ProjectTimelineChart } from './ProjectTimelineChart';
  6: import { RubricRadarChart } from './RubricRadarChart';
  7: import { TeamSuggestions } from './TeamSuggestions';
  8: import { ShowcaseCard } from '../../public/components/ShowcaseCard';
  9: export function StudentDashboard({
 10:     userData,
 11:     project,
 12:     suggestedStudents,
 13:     onShowCreateModal,
 14:     onProjectClick
 15: }) {
 16:     // Calcular el estado de la evaluación ("Aprobado" si >= 70)
 17:     const isApproved = project && (project.calificacion ?? 0) >= 70;
 18:     // Calcular si está "Listo para evaluar" (han pasado 2 días desde la creación)
 19:     const isReadyToEvaluate = useMemo(() => {
 20:         if (!project) return false;
 21:         let createdDate;
 22:         if (project.createdAt?._seconds) {
 23:             createdDate = new Date(project.createdAt._seconds * 1000);
 24:         } else if (typeof project.createdAt === 'string') {
 25:             createdDate = new Date(project.createdAt);
 26:         } else {
 27:             createdDate = new Date();
 28:         }
 29:         const now = new Date();
 30:         const diffTime = Math.abs(now - createdDate);
 31:         const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 32:         return diffDays >= 2;
 33:     }, [project]);
 34:     const containerVariants = {
 35:         hidden: { opacity: 0 },
 36:         visible: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } }
 37:     };
 38:     if (!project) {
 39:         return (
 40:             <motion.div
 41:                 variants={containerVariants}
 42:                 initial="hidden"
 43:                 animate="visible"
 44:                 className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 p-12 text-center shadow-sm"
 45:             >
 46:                 <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
 47:                     <Star size={32} />
 48:                 </div>
 49:                 <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-2">¡Hola, {userData?.nombre?.split(' ')[0]}!</h2>
 50:                 <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 max-w-md mx-auto mb-8 text-lg">
 51:                     Aún no formas parte de ningún proyecto integral. Comienza creando tu propio proyecto o únete al de un compañero.
 52:                 </p>
 53:                 <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-6 mt-4">
 54:                     <button
 55:                         onClick={onShowCreateModal}
 56:                         className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-gray-900 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-gray-800 active:bg-gray-950 transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg"
 57:                     >
 58:                         <Plus size={20} />
 59:                         <span>Empezar mi Proyecto</span>
 60:                     </button>
 61:                     {suggestedStudents && suggestedStudents.length > 0 && (
 62:                         <div className="w-full max-w-md mt-4">
 63:                             <TeamSuggestions suggestions={suggestedStudents} />
 64:                         </div>
 65:                     )}
 66:                 </div>
 67:             </motion.div>
 68:         );
 69:     }
 70:     return (
 71:         <motion.div variants={containerVariants} initial="hidden" animate="visible" className="space-y-6">
 72:             {/* Header: Bienvenida y Estado Corto */}
 73:             <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between gap-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-900 to-gray-800 p-8 rounded-2xl text-white shadow-lg overflow-hidden relative">
 74:                 <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 -mr-16 -mt-16 w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-white/5 blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>
 75:                 <div className="relative z-10">
 76:                     <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">Hola, {userData?.nombre?.split(' ')[0]} 👋</h2>
 77:                     <p className="text-gray-300 text-lg">
 78:                         Tu proyecto principal es <span className="font-semibold text-white">{project.titulo}</span>
 79:                     </p>
 80:                 </div>
 81:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 relative z-10">
 82:                     {isApproved ? (
 83:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-green-500/20 text-green-300 border border-green-500/30 px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-medium">
 84:                             <CheckCircle size={18} />
 85:                             <span>Aprobado</span>
 86:                         </div>
 87:                     ) : (
 88:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300 border border-blue-500/30 px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-medium">
 89:                             <Clock size={18} />
 90:                             <span>En Revisión</span>
 91:                         </div>
 92:                     )}
 93:                 </div>
 94:             </div>
 95:             {/* Grid Bento Box */}
 96:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
 97:                 {/* Main Content Area (2/3 width) */}
 98:                 <div className="lg:col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-6">
 99:                     {/* Metrics Row */}
100:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
101:                         <StatCard
102:                             title="Miembros"
103:                             value={`${project.miembrosIds?.length || 1}/5`}
104:                             subtitle={project.miembrosIds?.length === 5 ? "Equipo completo" : "Buscar compañeros"}
105:                             icon={Users}
106:                             color="blue"
107:                         />
108:                         <StatCard
109:                             title="Evaluación"
110:                             value={project.calificacion ? `${project.calificacion.toFixed(1)}%` : "S/N"}
111:                             subtitle={project.calificacion ? "Puntaje oficial" : "Aún sin calificar"}
112:                             icon={Star}
113:                             color={project.calificacion && project.calificacion >= 70 ? "green" : "amber"}
114:                         />
115:                         <StatCard
116:                             title="Listo para evaluar"
117:                             value={isReadyToEvaluate ? "Sí" : "No"}
118:                             subtitle={isReadyToEvaluate ? "Tiempo cumplido" : "Revisando detalles"}
119:                             icon={Clock}
120:                             color={isReadyToEvaluate ? "purple" : "gray"}
121:                         />
122:                     </div>
123:                     <ProjectTimelineChart project={project} />
124:                     <RubricRadarChart project={project} />
125:                 </div>
126:                 {/* Sidebar Content Area (1/3 width) */}
127:                 <div className="lg:col-span-1 flex flex-col gap-6">
128:                     {/* Proyecto Card */}
129:                     <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
130:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-1">
131:                             <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Acceso Rápido</h3>
132:                             <button
133:                                 onClick={onProjectClick}
134:                                 className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 transition-colors bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-lg"
135:                                 title="Abrir Proyecto"
136:                             >
137:                                 <ExternalLink size={18} />
138:                             </button>
139:                         </div>
140:                         <ShowcaseCard
141:                             project={{ ...project, coverUrl: project.videoUrl || project.thumbnailUrl || null }}
142:                             onClick={onProjectClick}
143:                         />
144:                     </div>
145:                     {/* Team Suggestions */}
146:                     <TeamSuggestions suggestions={suggestedStudents} />
147:                 </div>
148:             </div>
149:         </motion.div>
150:     );
151: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/evaluations/components/EvaluationPanel.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { Star, Send, MessageSquare, Eye, EyeOff } from 'lucide-react';
  3: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  4: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  5: export function EvaluationPanel({ projectId }) {
  6:     const { userData } = useAuth();
  7:     const [evaluations, setEvaluations] = useState([]);
  8:     const [project, setProject] = useState(null);
  9:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 10:     const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
 11:     // Form state
 12:     const [tipo, setTipo] = useState('sugerencia');
 13:     const [contenido, setContenido] = useState('');
 14:     const [calificacion, setCalificacion] = useState(80);
 15:     const isDocente = userData?.rol === 'Docente';
 16:     const isAdmin = userData?.rol === 'admin' || userData?.rol === 'SuperAdmin';
 17:     const isInvitado = userData?.rol === 'Invitado';
 18:     const userId = userData?.userId;
 19:     const userName = userData?.nombre;
 20:     useEffect(() => {
 21:         Promise.all([fetchEvaluations(), fetchProject()]);
 22:     }, [projectId, userId]);
 23:     const fetchProject = async () => {
 24:         try {
 25:             const response = await api.get(`/api/projects/${projectId}`);
 26:             setProject(response.data);
 27:         } catch (error) {
 28:             console.error('Error fetching project:', error);
 29:         }
 30:     };
 31:     const fetchEvaluations = async () => {
 32:         try {
 33:             const response = await api.get(`/api/evaluations/project/${projectId}`);
 34:             const sorted = response.data.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt) - new Date(a.createdAt));
 35:             setEvaluations(sorted);
 36:         } catch (error) {
 37:             console.error('Error fetching evaluations:', error);
 38:         } finally {
 39:             setLoading(false);
 40:         }
 41:     };
 42:     const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
 43:         e.preventDefault();
 44:         if (!contenido.trim()) return;
 45:         // Los invitados siempre envían sugerencias
 46:         const tipoFinal = isInvitado ? 'sugerencia' : tipo;
 47:         setSubmitting(true);
 48:         try {
 49:             await api.post('/api/evaluations', {
 50:                 projectId,
 51:                 docenteNombre: userName,
 52:                 tipo: tipoFinal,
 53:                 contenido,
 54:                 calificacion: tipoFinal === 'oficial' ? calificacion : null
 55:             });
 56:             setContenido('');
 57:             setCalificacion(80);
 58:             setTipo('sugerencia');
 59:             fetchEvaluations();
 60:             fetchProject();
 61:         } catch (error) {
 62:             console.error('Error creating evaluation:', error);
 63:             alert('Error al crear la evaluación: ' + (error.response?.data || error.message));
 64:         } finally {
 65:             setSubmitting(false);
 66:         }
 67:     };
 68:     const toggleVisibility = async (evaluation) => {
 69:         try {
 70:             await api.patch(`/api/evaluations/${evaluation.id}/visibility`, {
 71:                 esPublico: !evaluation.esPublico
 72:             });
 73:             setEvaluations(prev => prev.map(e =>
 74:                 e.id === evaluation.id ? { ...e, esPublico: !e.esPublico } : e
 75:             ));
 76:         } catch (error) {
 77:             console.error('Error updating visibility:', error);
 78:             alert('Error al actualizar visibilidad');
 79:         }
 80:     };
 81:     const latestOfficial = evaluations.find(e => e.tipo === 'oficial' && e.calificacion !== null);
 82:     const currentGrade = latestOfficial ? latestOfficial.calificacion : null;
 83:     const docente_id = project?.docenteId || project?.DocenteId;
 84:     const isTitular = docente_id === userId;
 85:     const canGradeOfficially = isDocente && (isTitular || isAdmin);
 86:     return (
 87:         <div className="border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 pt-6 mt-6">
 88:             {/* Header */}
 89:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
 90:                 <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2">
 91:                     <MessageSquare size={20} />
 92:                     Evaluaciones
 93:                 </h3>
 94:                 {currentGrade !== null && (
 95:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-blue-100 dark:border-blue-800 shadow-sm">
 96:                         <Star size={16} className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" />
 97:                         <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-400">{currentGrade}/100</span>
 98:                         <span className="text-[10px] text-blue-400 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide ml-1">Actual</span>
 99:                     </div>
100:                 )}
101:             </div>
102:             {/* Lista de evaluaciones */}
103:             <div className="space-y-4 mb-6 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
104:                 {loading ? (
105:                     <div className="text-center py-4 text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500">Cargando...</div>
106:                 ) : evaluations.length === 0 ? (
107:                     <div className="text-center py-8 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700">
108:                         <MessageSquare className="mx-auto text-gray-300 dark:text-slate-600 mb-2" size={32} />
109:                         <p className="text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 text-sm">No hay evaluaciones aún</p>
110:                     </div>
111:                 ) : (
112:                     evaluations.map(evaluation => (
113:                         <div
114:                             key={evaluation.id}
115:                             className={`group p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all ${evaluation.tipo === 'oficial'
116:                                 ? 'bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/10 border-blue-100 dark:border-blue-900/40 hover:border-blue-200 dark:hover:border-blue-800'
117:                                 : 'bg-gray-50/50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 hover:border-gray-200 dark:hover:border-slate-600'
118:                                 }`}
119:                         >
120:                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
121:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
122:                                     <span className="font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white text-sm">{evaluation.docenteNombre}</span>
123:                                     <span className={`text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide ${evaluation.tipo === 'oficial'
124:                                         ? 'bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/50 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-400'
125:                                         : 'bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300'
126:                                         }`}>
127:                                         {evaluation.tipo === 'oficial' ? 'Oficial' : 'Sugerencia'}
128:                                     </span>
129:                                     {(isDocente || isAdmin) && (
130:                                         <button
131:                                             onClick={() => toggleVisibility(evaluation)}
132:                                             className="ml-2 p-1 text-gray-400 hover:text-indigo-600 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors"
133:                                             title={evaluation.esPublico ? "Hacer Privado" : "Hacer Público"}
134:                                         >
135:                                             {evaluation.esPublico ? <Eye size={14} /> : <EyeOff size={14} />}
136:                                         </button>
137:                                     )}
138:                                     {!(isDocente || isAdmin) && !evaluation.esPublico && (
139:                                         <span className="text-[10px] bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded flex items-center gap-1">
140:                                             <EyeOff size={10} /> Privado
141:                                         </span>
142:                                     )}
143:                                 </div>
144:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
145:                                     {evaluation.calificacion !== null && (
146:                                         <span className="text-sm font-black text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded shadow-sm border border-blue-100 dark:border-blue-900/50">
147:                                             {evaluation.calificacion}/100
148:                                         </span>
149:                                     )}
150:                                     <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500">
151:                                         {new Date(evaluation.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('es-MX', {
152:                                             day: 'numeric', month: 'short', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit'
153:                                         })}
154:                                     </span>
155:                                 </div>
156:                             </div>
157:                             <p className="text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
158:                                 {evaluation.contenido}
159:                             </p>
160:                         </div>
161:                     ))
162:                 )}
163:             </div>
164:             {/* Formulario para docentes e invitados */}
165:             {(isDocente || isInvitado) && (
166:                 <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-800/80 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-4 shadow-sm">
167:                     {/* Header: Title and Type Switcher */}
168:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
169:                         <span className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
170:                             {isInvitado ? 'Dejar Comentario' : 'Nueva Evaluación'}
171:                         </span>
172:                         {/* Los invitados solo pueden dejar sugerencias, no se les muestra el toggle */}
173:                         {isDocente && (
174:                             canGradeOfficially ? (
175:                                 <div className="flex bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 p-1 rounded-lg">
176:                                     <button
177:                                         type="button"
178:                                         onClick={() => setTipo('sugerencia')}
179:                                         className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium transition-all ${tipo === 'sugerencia'
180:                                             ? 'bg-white dark:bg-slate-600 text-gray-900 dark:text-white shadow-sm'
181:                                             : 'text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-gray-700 dark:hover:text-slate-200'
182:                                             }`}
183:                                     >
184:                                         Sugerencia
185:                                     </button>
186:                                     <button
187:                                         type="button"
188:                                         onClick={() => setTipo('oficial')}
189:                                         className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium transition-all ${tipo === 'oficial'
190:                                             ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-sm'
191:                                             : 'text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-gray-700 dark:hover:text-slate-200'
192:                                             }`}
193:                                     >
194:                                         Oficial
195:                                     </button>
196:                                 </div>
197:                             ) : (
198:                                 <span className="text-[10px] bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 px-2 py-1 rounded font-medium">
199:                                     Solo Sugerencias (No titular)
200:                                 </span>
201:                             )
202:                         )}
203:                         {isInvitado && (
204:                             <span className="text-[10px] bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30 text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400 px-2 py-1 rounded font-medium">
205:                                 Solo Sugerencias
206:                             </span>
207:                         )}
208:                     </div>
209:                     {/* Slider de calificación: solo para docentes titulares */}
210:                     {tipo === 'oficial' && canGradeOfficially && isDocente && (
211:                         <div className="bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 p-3 rounded-lg border border-blue-100 dark:border-blue-900/40">
212:                             <label className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
213:                                 <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300">Calificación Final</span>
````
