````javascript
214:                                 <span className="text-xl font-black text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-0.5 rounded border border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-900/50">
215:                                     {calificacion}
216:                                 </span>
217:                             </label>
218:                             <input
219:                                 type="range"
220:                                 min="0"
221:                                 max="100"
222:                                 value={calificacion}
223:                                 onChange={e => setCalificacion(parseInt(e.target.value))}
224:                                 className="w-full accent-blue-600 cursor-pointer"
225:                             />
226:                             <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-blue-400 dark:text-blue-500 mt-1 font-medium">
227:                                 <span>0</span>
228:                                 <span>50</span>
229:                                 <span>100</span>
230:                             </div>
231:                         </div>
232:                     )}
233:                     <div className="relative">
234:                         <textarea
235:                             value={contenido}
236:                             onChange={e => setContenido(e.target.value)}
237:                             placeholder={
238:                                 isInvitado
239:                                     ? 'Escribe tu comentario o sugerencia para este proyecto...'
240:                                     : (tipo === 'oficial' ? 'Justificación de la calificación...' : 'Escribe una sugerencia constructiva...')
241:                             }
242:                             className="w-full p-3 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-600 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 text-gray-900 dark:text-white placeholder:text-gray-400 dark:placeholder:text-slate-500 rounded-lg resize-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent text-sm min-h-[100px]"
243:                         />
244:                     </div>
245:                     <button
246:                         type="submit"
247:                         disabled={!contenido.trim() || submitting}
248:                         className="w-full bg-gray-900 dark:bg-slate-700 dark:hover:bg-slate-600 text-white py-2.5 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-md active:scale-[0.98]"
249:                     >
250:                         <Send size={16} />
251:                         {submitting ? 'Enviando...' : (isInvitado || tipo === 'sugerencia' ? 'Enviar Comentario' : 'Publicar Calificación')}
252:                     </button>
253:                 </form>
254:             )}
255:         </div>
256:     );
257: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Program.cs
````csharp
  1: using MediatR;
  2: using FluentValidation;
  3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
  4: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Infrastructure.Repositories;
  5: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Infrastructure.Services;
  6: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer;
  7: using Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens;
  8: using System.Threading.RateLimiting;
  9: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.RateLimiting;
 10: var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);
 11: // === KESTREL: Aumentar límite global a 500MB para subida de videos ===
 12: builder.WebHost.ConfigureKestrel(options =>
 13: {
 14:     options.Limits.MaxRequestBodySize = 524288000; // 500 MB
 15: });
 16: // === SERVICES ===
 17: // Controllers
 18: builder.Services.AddControllers();
 19: // Form options globales para multipart (500MB)
 20: builder.Services.Configure<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.Features.FormOptions>(options =>
 21: {
 22:     options.MultipartBodyLengthLimit = 524288000; // 500 MB
 23:     options.ValueLengthLimit = int.MaxValue;
 24:     options.MultipartHeadersLengthLimit = int.MaxValue;
 25: });
 26: // === SECURITY: Rate Limiting (Protección contra DoS/Script Kiddies) ===
 27: builder.Services.AddRateLimiter(options =>
 28: {
 29:     options.RejectionStatusCode = StatusCodes.Status429TooManyRequests;
 30:     // Límite Global de 100 peticiones por minuto por IP
 31:     options.GlobalLimiter = PartitionedRateLimiter.Create<HttpContext, string>(httpContext =>
 32:         RateLimitPartition.GetFixedWindowLimiter(
 33:             partitionKey: httpContext.Connection.RemoteIpAddress?.ToString() ?? httpContext.Request.Headers.Host.ToString(),
 34:             factory: partition => new FixedWindowRateLimiterOptions
 35:             {
 36:                 AutoReplenishment = true,
 37:                 PermitLimit = 100,
 38:                 QueueLimit = 2,
 39:                 Window = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(1)
 40:             }));
 41: });
 42: // Authentication (Firebase JWT)
 43: var projectId = builder.Configuration["Firebase:ProjectId"] ?? "integradorhub-dsm";
 44: // Cache para las signing keys de Google (se refrescan cada hora)
 45: IList<SecurityKey>? _cachedSigningKeys = null;
 46: DateTime _keysCachedAt = DateTime.MinValue;
 47: var _keysLock = new object();
 48: IEnumerable<SecurityKey> ResolveSigningKeys(string token, SecurityToken securityToken, string kid, TokenValidationParameters parameters)
 49: {
 50:     lock (_keysLock)
 51:     {
 52:         if (_cachedSigningKeys == null || DateTime.UtcNow - _keysCachedAt > TimeSpan.FromHours(1))
 53:         {
 54:             try
 55:             {
 56:                 using var httpClient = new HttpClient();
 57:                 var json = httpClient.GetStringAsync(
 58:                     "https://www.googleapis.com/service_accounts/v1/jwk/securetoken@system.gserviceaccount.com"
 59:                 ).ConfigureAwait(false).GetAwaiter().GetResult();
 60:                 _cachedSigningKeys = new JsonWebKeySet(json).Keys.Cast<SecurityKey>().ToList();
 61:                 _keysCachedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
 62:             }
 63:             catch (Exception)
 64:             {
 65:                 if (_cachedSigningKeys != null) return _cachedSigningKeys;
 66:                 throw;
 67:             }
 68:         }
 69:         return _cachedSigningKeys;
 70:     }
 71: }
 72: builder.Services.AddAuthentication(JwtBearerDefaults.AuthenticationScheme)
 73:     .AddJwtBearer(options =>
 74:     {
 75:         options.Authority = null;
 76:         options.RequireHttpsMetadata = false;
 77:         options.TokenValidationParameters = new TokenValidationParameters
 78:         {
 79:             ValidateIssuer = true,
 80:             ValidIssuer = $"https://securetoken.google.com/{projectId}",
 81:             ValidateAudience = true,
 82:             ValidAudience = projectId,
 83:             ValidateLifetime = true,
 84:             IssuerSigningKeyResolver = ResolveSigningKeys
 85:         };
 86:     });
 87: // Swagger
 88: builder.Services.AddEndpointsApiExplorer();
 89: builder.Services.AddSwaggerGen();
 90: // MediatR (CQRS)
 91: builder.Services.AddMediatR(cfg => 
 92:     cfg.RegisterServicesFromAssembly(typeof(Program).Assembly));
 93: // FluentValidation
 94: builder.Services.AddValidatorsFromAssembly(typeof(Program).Assembly);
 95: // Repositories (Firestore)
 96: builder.Services.AddSingleton<IUserRepository, UserRepository>();
 97: builder.Services.AddScoped<IProjectRepository, ProjectRepository>();
 98: builder.Services.AddScoped<IEvaluationRepository, EvaluationRepository>();
 99: builder.Services.AddScoped<IGroupRepository, GroupRepository>();
100: builder.Services.AddScoped<IMateriaRepository, MateriaRepository>();
101: builder.Services.AddScoped<ICarreraRepository, CarreraRepository>();
102: // Storage Service (Supabase)
103: builder.Services.AddSingleton<IStorageService, SupabaseStorageService>();
104: // CORS (Dinámico para Producción y Desarrollo)
105: var allowedOrigins = builder.Configuration.GetSection("AllowedOrigins").Get<string[]>() ?? Array.Empty<string>();
106: var fixedOrigins = new[]
107: {
108:     "http://localhost:5173",
109:     "http://localhost:5174",
110:     "http://localhost:3000",
111:     "https://integradorhub-frontend.vercel.app",
112:     "https://integradorhub.onrender.com"
113: };
114: var allOrigins = allowedOrigins.Concat(fixedOrigins).Distinct().ToArray();
115: builder.Services.AddCors(options =>
116: {
117:     options.AddPolicy("AllowFrontend", policy =>
118:     {
119:         policy.SetIsOriginAllowed(origin =>
120:             {
121:                 if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(origin)) return false;
122:                 var uri = new Uri(origin);
123:                 // Permitir todos los subdominios de vercel.app (preview + producción)
124:                 if (uri.Host.EndsWith(".vercel.app", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return true;
125:                 // Permitir orígenes locales y fijos
126:                 return allOrigins.Contains(origin, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
127:             })
128:               .AllowAnyHeader()
129:               .AllowAnyMethod()
130:               .AllowCredentials();
131:     });
132: });
133: var app = builder.Build();
134: // === MIDDLEWARE ===
135: if (app.Environment.IsDevelopment())
136: {
137:     app.UseSwagger();
138:     app.UseSwaggerUI();
139: }
140: app.UseCors("AllowFrontend");
141: // Aplicar el Rate Limiter antes de rutas Auth
142: app.UseRateLimiter();
143: app.UseAuthentication();
144: app.UseAuthorization();
145: app.MapControllers();
146: // Endpoint de prueba
147: app.MapGet("/api/health", () => new { status = "ok", timestamp = DateTime.UtcNow })
148:    .WithName("HealthCheck")
149:    .WithOpenApi();
150: app.Run();
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/pages/TeamPage.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { Search, Mail, User, Plus, Users } from 'lucide-react';
  3: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  4: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  5: import { UserAvatar } from '../../../components/UserAvatar';
  6: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  7: import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
  8: export default function TeamPage() {
  9:     const { userData } = useAuth();
 10:     const navigate = useNavigate();
 11:     const [students, setStudents] = useState([]);
 12:     const [project, setProject] = useState(null);
 13:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 14:     const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
 15:     useEffect(() => {
 16:         if (userData?.grupoId) {
 17:             fetchData();
 18:         }
 19:     }, [userData]);
 20:     const fetchData = async () => {
 21:         setLoading(true);
 22:         try {
 23:             // 1. Fetch Classmates
 24:             const studentsPromise = api.get(`/api/teams/available-students?groupId=${userData.grupoId}`);
 25:             // 2. Fetch My Project (gracefully handle 404)
 26:             const projectPromise = api.get(`/api/projects/my-project?userId=${userData.userId}`)
 27:                 .then(res => res.data)
 28:                 .catch(() => null);
 29:             const [studentsRes, projectData] = await Promise.all([studentsPromise, projectPromise]);
 30:             setStudents(studentsRes.data);
 31:             // Normalize project data keys to lowercase to avoid case sensitivity issues
 32:             if (projectData) {
 33:                 // Helper to normalize keys of an object
 34:                 const normalize = (obj) => {
 35:                     if (!obj) return null;
 36:                     const newObj = {};
 37:                     Object.keys(obj).forEach(key => {
 38:                         newObj[key.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + key.slice(1)] = obj[key];
 39:                     });
 40:                     return newObj;
 41:                 };
 42:                 const normalizedProject = normalize(projectData);
 43:                 // Also normalize members array if it exists as 'Members' or 'members'
 44:                 const rawMembers = projectData.Members || projectData.members || [];
 45:                 normalizedProject.members = rawMembers.map(normalize);
 46:                 setProject(normalizedProject);
 47:             } else {
 48:                 setProject(null);
 49:             }
 50:         } catch (error) {
 51:             console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
 52:         } finally {
 53:             setLoading(false);
 54:         }
 55:     };
 56:     // Filter classmates: Remove current project members if project exists
 57:     const availableStudents = students.filter(s => {
 58:         // Remove if in my project
 59:         if (project && project.miembrosIds?.includes(s.id)) return false;
 60:         // Search filter
 61:         return (
 62:             s.nombreCompleto.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
 63:             s.matricula.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
 64:         );
 65:     });
 66:     const containerVariants = {
 67:         hidden: { opacity: 0 },
 68:         visible: {
 69:             opacity: 1,
 70:             transition: { staggerChildren: 0.05 }
 71:         }
 72:     };
 73:     const itemVariants = {
 74:         hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
 75:         visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }
 76:     };
 77:     return (
 78:         <div className="space-y-8 p-4 md:p-8 pb-24">
 79:             {/* Header */}
 80:             <div>
 81:                 <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight">Mi Equipo</h1>
 82:                 <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400">Gestiona tu equipo y encuentra compañeros.</p>
 83:             </div>
 84:             {/* MY TEAM SECTION */}
 85:             <section className="shrink-0">
 86:                 <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
 87:                     <Users className="text-blue-600" size={20} />
 88:                     Mi Proyecto
 89:                 </h2>
 90:                 {loading ? (
 91:                     <div className="h-32 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl animate-pulse" />
 92:                 ) : project ? (
 93:                     <motion.div
 94:                         initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
 95:                         animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
 96:                         className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-sm"
 97:                     >
 98:                         <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4 mb-6">
 99:                             <div>
100:                                 <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white break-words">{project.titulo}</h3>
101:                                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2">
102:                                     <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">
103:                                         {project.materia}
104:                                     </span>
105:                                     <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">
106:                                         {project.estado}
107:                                     </span>
108:                                 </div>
109:                             </div>
110:                             <button
111:                                 onClick={() => navigate(`/project/${project.id}/editor`)}
112:                                 className="w-full md:w-auto px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-sm hover:bg-blue-700 transition"
113:                             >
114:                                 Ir al Proyecto
115:                             </button>
116:                         </div>
117:                         {/* Members Grid - Ensure it renders and has content */}
118:                         {project.members && project.members.length > 0 ? (
119:                             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
120:                                 {project.members.map(member => (
121:                                     <div key={member.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-2xl bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50">
122:                                         <Link to={`/profile/${member.id}`} className="shrink-0 rounded-full hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-500 transition-all" title="Ver perfil">
123:                                             <UserAvatar src={member.fotoUrl} name={(member.nombre && member.nombre !== 'Usuario') ? member.nombre : member.email} size="md" className="w-12 h-12 border-2 border-white shadow-sm" />
124:                                         </Link>
125:                                         <div className="min-w-0">
126:                                             <p className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white truncate">
127:                                                 {(member.nombre && member.nombre !== 'Usuario') ? member.nombre : (member.email || 'Miembro')}
128:                                             </p>
129:                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase font-bold truncate">{member.rol}</p>
130:                                         </div>
131:                                     </div>
132:                                 ))}
133:                             </div>
134:                         ) : (
135:                             <div className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 italic p-4 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl">
136:                                 No se encontraron miembros en este proyecto.
137:                             </div>
138:                         )}
139:                     </motion.div>
140:                 ) : (
141:                     // EMPTY STATE
142:                     <motion.div
143:                         initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
144:                         animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
145:                         className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 dark:from-blue-900/20 to-indigo-50 dark:to-indigo-900/20 border-2 border-dashed border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-700/50 rounded-3xl p-8 text-center"
146:                     >
147:                         <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 shadow-sm text-blue-500">
148:                             <Plus size={32} />
149:                         </div>
150:                         <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-2">No tienes proyecto activo</h3>
151:                         <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400 mb-6 max-w-sm mx-auto">
152:                             Ve al apartado de "Mis Proyectos" para crear uno nuevo e invitar a tus compañeros.
153:                         </p>
154:                         <button
155:                             onClick={() => navigate('/projects')} // Navigate where Create Project Modal can be opened
156:                             className="px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl font-bold hover:shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-all"
157:                         >
158:                             Crear Proyecto
159:                         </button>
160:                     </motion.div>
161:                 )}
162:             </section>
163:             <hr className="border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50" />
164:             {/* CLASSMATES SECTION */}
165:             <section className="flex-1 min-h-0 flex flex-col">
166:                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
167:                     <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2">
168:                         <User className="text-gray-400" size={20} />
169:                         Compañeros de Clase ({availableStudents.length})
170:                     </h2>
171:                     {/* Search */}
172:                     <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] p-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-sm w-full max-w-sm flex items-center">
173:                         <Search className="ml-2 text-gray-400" size={18} />
174:                         <input
175:                             type="text"
176:                             placeholder="Buscar compañero..."
177:                             value={searchQuery}
178:                             onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
179:                             className="w-full px-3 bg-transparent dark:text-white outline-none text-sm dark:placeholder:text-slate-500"
180:                         />
181:                     </div>
182:                 </div>
183:                 {/* Students Grid */}
184:                 {loading ? (
185:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
186:                         {[1, 2, 3].map(i => <div key={i} className="h-40 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl animate-pulse" />)}
187:                     </div>
188:                 ) : availableStudents.length > 0 ? (
189:                     <motion.div
190:                         variants={containerVariants}
191:                         initial="hidden"
192:                         animate="visible"
193:                         className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 pb-10"
194:                     >
195:                         {availableStudents.map((student) => (
196:                             <motion.div
197:                                 key={student.id}
198:                                 variants={itemVariants}
199:                                 whileHover={{ y: -4 }}
200:                                 className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all group"
201:                             >
202:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
203:                                     <Link to={`/profile/${student.id}`} className="shrink-0 rounded-full hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-500 transition-all" title="Ver perfil">
204:                                         <UserAvatar src={student.fotoUrl} name={student.nombreCompleto} size="md" className="w-12 h-12 group-hover:bg-blue-100" />
205:                                     </Link>
206:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
207:                                         <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white truncate">{student.nombreCompleto}</h3>
208:                                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">{student.matricula}</p>
209:                                     </div>
210:                                 </div>
211:                                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
212:                                     <span className={`text-[10px] uppercase font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full ${student.hasProject ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' : 'bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700'
213:                                         }`}>
214:                                         {student.hasProject ? 'En Proyecto' : 'Disponible'}
215:                                     </span>
216:                                     <button className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-white transition-colors">
217:                                         Contactar
218:                                     </button>
219:                                 </div>
220:                             </motion.div>
221:                         ))}
222:                     </motion.div>
223:                 ) : (
224:                     <div className="text-center py-10 text-gray-400">
225:                         No se encontraron compañeros con ese nombre.
226:                     </div>
227:                 )}
228:             </section>
229:         </div>
230:     );
231: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/GetByMember/GetProjectByMemberHandler.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 4: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetDetails; // Resusing DTOs
 5: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetByMember;
 6: // === QUERY ===
 7: public record GetProjectByMemberQuery(string UserId) : IRequest<ProjectDetailsDto?>;
 8: // === HANDLER ===
 9: public class GetProjectByMemberHandler : IRequestHandler<GetProjectByMemberQuery, ProjectDetailsDto?>
10: {
11:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
12:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
13:     public GetProjectByMemberHandler(IProjectRepository projectRepository, IUserRepository userRepository)
14:     {
15:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
16:         _userRepository = userRepository;
17:     }
18:     public async Task<ProjectDetailsDto?> Handle(GetProjectByMemberQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
19:     {
20:         var projects = await _projectRepository.GetByMemberIdAsync(request.UserId);
21:         var project = projects.FirstOrDefault();
22:         if (project == null) return null;
23:         // Populate members logic
24:         var members = new List<MemberDto>();
25:         if (project.MiembrosIds != null)
26:         {
27:             foreach (var memberId in project.MiembrosIds)
28:             {
29:                 var user = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(memberId);
30:                 if (user != null)
31:                 {
32:                     members.Add(new MemberDto(
33:                         user.Id,
34:                         user.Nombre,
35:                         user.Email,
36:                         user.FotoUrl,
37:                         memberId == project.LiderId ? "Líder" : "Miembro"
38:                     ));
39:                 }
40:             }
41:         }
42:         // Handle potentially null EsPublico in DB (though default is false in entity)
43:         // Project entity has it.
44:         return new ProjectDetailsDto(
45:             project.Id,
46:             project.Titulo,
47:             project.Materia,
48:             project.MateriaId,
49:             project.Ciclo,
50:             project.GrupoId,
51:             project.Estado,
52:             project.LiderId,
53:             project.DocenteId,
54:             project.MiembrosIds ?? new List<string>(),
55:             project.StackTecnologico,
56:             project.RepositorioUrl,
57:             project.VideoUrl,
58:             project.CanvasBlocks,
59:             members,
60:             project.GetCreatedAtAsDateTime(),
61:             project.EsPublico,
62:             project.PuntosTotales,
63:             project.PuntosUIUX,
64:             project.PuntosInovacion,
65:             project.PuntosPresentacion,
66:             project.PuntosImpacto,
67:             project.ConteoVotos,
68:             project.Votantes ?? new Dictionary<string, object>(),
69:             project.Calificacion
70:         );
71:     }
72: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/ProjectsController.cs
````csharp
  1: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Delete;
  2: using MediatR;
  3: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
  4: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Create;
  5: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetByGroup;
  6: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.AddMember;
  7: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.RemoveMember;
  8: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetDetails;
  9: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.UpdateCanvas;
 10: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Update;
 11: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.Rate; 
 12: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 13: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetPublic;
 14: using IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetByMember;
 15: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Abstractions;
 16: using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
 17: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects;
 18: [Authorize]
 19: [ApiController]
 20: [Route("api/[controller]")]
 21: public class ProjectsController : BaseApiController
 22: {
 23:     private readonly IMediator _mediator;
 24:     public ProjectsController(IMediator mediator)
 25:     {
 26:         _mediator = mediator;
 27:     }
 28:     /// <summary>
 29:     /// Obtiene todos los proyectos públicos para la galería.
 30:     /// </summary>
 31:     [AllowAnonymous]
 32:     [HttpGet("public")]
 33:     public async Task<ActionResult<IEnumerable<PublicProjectDto>>> GetPublic()
 34:     {
 35:         var query = new GetPublicProjectsQuery();
 36:         var projects = await _mediator.Send(query);
 37:         return Ok(projects);
 38:     }
 39:     /// <summary>
 40:     /// Crea un nuevo proyecto. Requiere rol de Alumno.
 41:     /// </summary>
 42:     [HttpPost]
 43:     public async Task<ActionResult<CreateProjectResponse>> Create([FromBody] CreateProjectRequest request)
 44:     {
 45:         var command = new CreateProjectCommand(
 46:             request.Titulo,
 47:             request.Materia,
 48:             request.MateriaId,
 49:             request.Ciclo,
 50:             request.StackTecnologico,
 51:             request.RepositorioUrl,
 52:             request.VideoUrl,
 53:             GetUserId(), // Previene ID Spoofing
 54:             request.UserGroupId,
 55:             request.DocenteId,
 56:             request.MiembrosIds ?? new List<string>()
 57:         );
 58:         try 
 59:         {
 60:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
 61:             return CreatedAtAction(nameof(GetById), new { id = response.ProjectId }, response);
 62:         }
 63:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex)
 64:         {
 65:             return Forbid(ex.Message);
 66:         }
 67:     }
 68:     /// <summary>
 69:     /// Obtiene proyectos de un grupo específico.
 70:     /// </summary>
 71:     [HttpGet("group/{groupId}")]
 72:     public async Task<ActionResult<List<ProjectDto>>> GetByGroup(string groupId)
 73:     {
 74:         var query = new GetProjectsByGroupQuery(groupId);
 75:         var response = await _mediator.Send(query);
 76:         return Ok(response);
 77:     }
 78:     /// <summary>
 79:     /// Obtiene proyectos asignados a un docente.
 80:     /// </summary>
 81:     [HttpGet("teacher/{teacherId}")]
 82:     public async Task<ActionResult<List<GetByTeacher.ProjectDto>>> GetByTeacher(string teacherId)
 83:     {
 84:         var query = new GetByTeacher.GetProjectsByTeacherQuery(teacherId);
 85:         var response = await _mediator.Send(query);
 86:         return Ok(response);
 87:     }
 88:     /// <summary>
 89:     /// Obtiene detalles completos del proyecto.
 90:     /// </summary>
 91:     [HttpGet("{id}")]
 92:     public async Task<ActionResult<ProjectDetailsDto>> GetById(string id)
 93:     {
 94:         var query = new GetProjectDetailsQuery(id);
 95:         try
 96:         {
 97:             var response = await _mediator.Send(query);
 98:             return Ok(response);
 99:         }
100:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex)
101:         {
102:             return NotFound(ex.Message);
103:         }
104:     }
105:     /// <summary>
106:     /// Agrega un miembro al proyecto (Solo Líder).
107:     /// </summary>
108:     [HttpPost("{id}/members")]
109:     public async Task<ActionResult<AddMemberResponse>> AddMember(string id, [FromBody] AddMemberRequest request)
110:     {
111:         var command = new AddMemberCommand(id, request.EmailOrMatricula, GetUserId());
112:         try 
113:         {
114:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
115:             if (!response.Success) return BadRequest(response);
116:             return Ok(response);
117:         }
118:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex) { return Forbid(ex.Message); }
119:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
120:     }
121:     /// <summary>
122:     /// Elimina un miembro del proyecto.
123:     /// </summary>
124:     [HttpDelete("{id}/members/{memberId}")]
125:     public async Task<ActionResult<RemoveMemberResponse>> RemoveMember(string id, string memberId)
126:     {
127:         var command = new RemoveMemberCommand(id, memberId, GetUserId());
128:         try
129:         {
130:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
131:             if (!response.Success) return BadRequest(response);
132:             return Ok(response);
133:         }
134:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex) { return Forbid(ex.Message); }
135:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
136:     }
137:     /// <summary>
138:     /// Actualiza el contenido del canvas del proyecto.
139:     /// </summary>
140:     [HttpPut("{id}/canvas")]
141:     public async Task<ActionResult<UpdateCanvasResponse>> UpdateCanvas(string id, [FromBody] UpdateCanvasRequest request)
142:     {
143:         var command = new UpdateProjectCanvasCommand(id, request.Blocks, GetUserId());
144:         try
145:         {
146:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
147:             return Ok(response);
148:         }
149:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex) { return Forbid(ex.Message); }
150:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
151:     }
152:     /// <summary>
153:     /// Elimina un proyecto completamente y libera a sus miembros. (Solo Líder)
154:     /// </summary>
155:     [HttpDelete("{id}")]
156:     public async Task<ActionResult<DeleteProjectResponse>> Delete(string id)
157:     {
158:         var command = new DeleteProjectCommand(id, GetUserId());
159:         try
160:         {
161:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
162:             if (!response.Success) return BadRequest(response);
163:             return Ok(response);
164:         }
165:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex) { return Forbid(ex.Message); }
166:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
167:     }
168:     /// <summary>
169:     /// Actualiza un proyecto (Título, Video, Canvas).
170:     /// </summary>
171:     [HttpPut("{id}")]
172:     public async Task<ActionResult<UpdateProjectResponse>> Update(string id, [FromBody] UpdateProjectRequest request)
173:     {
174:         var command = new UpdateProjectCommand(
175:             id,
176:             request.Titulo,
177:             request.VideoUrl,
178:             request.CanvasBlocks ?? new List<CanvasBlock>(), 
179:             request.EsPublico,
180:             GetUserId()
181:         );
182:         try
183:         {
184:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
185:             if (!response.Success) return BadRequest(response);
186:             return Ok(response);
187:         }
188:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
189:         catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex) { return Forbid(ex.Message); }
190:     }
191:     /// <summary>
192:     /// Obtiene el proyecto del usuario actual (si tiene).
193:     /// </summary>
194:     [HttpGet("my-project")]
195:     public async Task<ActionResult<ProjectDetailsDto>> GetMyProject()
196:     {
197:         var query = new GetProjectByMemberQuery(GetUserId());
198:         var response = await _mediator.Send(query);
199:         if (response == null) 
200:             return NotFound("No tienes un proyecto asignado.");
201:         return Ok(response);
202:     }
203:     /// <summary>
204:     /// Califica un proyecto con rúbrica (UI/UX, Innovación, Presentación, Impacto).
205:     /// </summary>
206:     [HttpPost("{id}/rate")]
207:     public async Task<ActionResult<RateProjectResponse>> RateProject(string id, [FromBody] RateProjectRequest request)
208:     {
209:         var command = new RateProjectCommand(id, GetUserId(), request.UIUX, request.Inovacion, request.Presentacion, request.Impacto);
210:         try
211:         {
212:             var response = await _mediator.Send(command);
213:             return Ok(response);
214:         }
215:         catch (KeyNotFoundException ex) { return NotFound(ex.Message); }
216:         catch (InvalidOperationException ex) { return BadRequest(ex.Message); }
217:         catch (ArgumentException ex) { return BadRequest(ex.Message); }
218:     }
219: }
220: public record RateProjectRequest(int UIUX, int Inovacion, int Presentacion, int Impacto);
221: public record UpdateProjectRequest(
222:     string Titulo,
223:     string? VideoUrl,
224:     List<CanvasBlock>? CanvasBlocks,
225:     bool? EsPublico
226: );
227: public record UpdateCanvasRequest(List<CanvasBlock> Blocks);
228: public record CreateProjectRequest(
229:     string Titulo,
230:     string Materia,
231:     string MateriaId,
232:     string Ciclo,
233:     List<string> StackTecnologico,
234:     string? RepositorioUrl,
235:     string? VideoUrl,
236:     string UserGroupId,
237:     string? DocenteId,
238:     List<string>? MiembrosIds 
239: );
240: public record AddMemberRequest(string EmailOrMatricula);
````

## File: frontend/src/features/profile/pages/ProfilePage.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom';
  3: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  4: import { UserAvatar } from '../../../components/UserAvatar';
  5: import { GlobeBanner } from '../components/GlobeBanner';
  6: import { Mail, Phone, MapPin, Calendar, Camera, Edit2, Shield, User as UserIcon, BookOpen, GraduationCap, Briefcase, Building, Loader2, Link as LinkIcon, Github, Linkedin, Twitter, Globe, Plus, Trash2, X, Save, Youtube } from 'lucide-react';
  7: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  8: export default function ProfilePage() {
  9:     const { userData: authData, refreshUserData } = useAuth();
 10:     const { userId } = useParams();
 11:     const isOwnProfile = !userId || (authData && userId === authData.userId);
 12:     const [publicData, setPublicData] = useState(null);
 13:     const [loadingPublic, setLoadingPublic] = useState(false);
 14:     useEffect(() => {
 15:         if (!isOwnProfile && userId) {
 16:             setLoadingPublic(true);
 17:             api.get(`/api/users/${userId}/profile`)
 18:                 .then(res => {
 19:                     const data = res.data;
 20:                     setPublicData({
 21:                         userId: data.id,
 22:                         email: data.email,
 23:                         nombre: data.nombre,
 24:                         apellidoPaterno: data.apellidoPaterno,
 25:                         apellidoMaterno: data.apellidoMaterno,
 26:                         fotoUrl: data.fotoUrl,
 27:                         rol: data.rol,
 28:                         matricula: data.matricula,
 29:                         grupoId: data.grupoId,
 30:                         carreraId: data.carreraId,
 31:                         profesion: data.profesion,
 32:                         especialidadDocente: data.especialidadDocente,
 33:                         organizacion: data.organizacion,
 34:                         createdAt: data.createdAt,
 35:                         redesSociales: data.redesSociales || {}
 36:                     });
 37:                 })
 38:                 .catch(err => {
 39:                     console.error("Error fetching public profile:", err);
 40:                     setPublicData(null);
 41:                 })
 42:                 .finally(() => setLoadingPublic(false));
 43:         }
 44:     }, [userId, isOwnProfile]);
 45:     const userData = isOwnProfile ? authData : publicData;
 46:     const fileInputRef = useRef(null);
 47:     const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
 48:     const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0);
 49:     // --- Social Links State ---
 50:     const [isEditingSocial, setIsEditingSocial] = useState(false);
 51:     const [socialLinks, setSocialLinks] = useState(userData?.redesSociales || {});
 52:     const [savingSocial, setSavingSocial] = useState(false);
 53:     const [newPlatform, setNewPlatform] = useState('github');
 54:     const [newUrl, setNewUrl] = useState('');
 55:     const [carreraNombre, setCarreraNombre] = useState('Cargando...');
 56:     useEffect(() => {
 57:         if (userData?.redesSociales) {
 58:             setSocialLinks(userData.redesSociales);
 59:         }
 60:     }, [userData]);
 61:     useEffect(() => {
 62:         if (!userData) return;
 63:         const rawId = userData.carreraId;
 64:         if (!rawId) {
 65:             setCarreraNombre('Sin carrera');
 66:             return;
 67:         }
 68:         const carreraNamesAbbr = {
 69:             'IDGS': 'Ing. Desarrollo y Gestión de Software',
 70:             'IDGSI': 'Ing. Desarrollo y Gestión de Software',
 71:             'IMT': 'Ing. Mecatrónica',
 72:             'IER': 'Ing. Energías Renovables',
 73:             'IMTC': 'Ing. Mecatrónica',
 74:             'IERE': 'Ing. Energías Renovables',
 75:             'IIND': 'Ing. Industrial',
 76:             'IGAE': 'Ing. Gestión y Automatización',
 77:         };
 78:         const upper = rawId.toUpperCase();
 79:         if (carreraNamesAbbr[upper]) {
 80:             setCarreraNombre(carreraNamesAbbr[upper]);
 81:             return;
 82:         }
 83:         // Si parece un ID generado por Firebase (largo > 10) consultamos el backend
 84:         if (rawId.length > 10) {
 85:             api.get('/api/admin/carreras')
 86:                 .then(res => {
 87:                     const carrera = res.data?.find(c => c.id === rawId);
 88:                     if (carrera) {
 89:                         setCarreraNombre(carrera.nombre);
 90:                     } else {
 91:                         setCarreraNombre('Carrera asignada');
 92:                     }
 93:                 })
 94:                 .catch(() => setCarreraNombre('Carrera asignada'));
 95:         } else {
 96:             setCarreraNombre(rawId);
 97:         }
 98:     }, [userData?.carreraId]);
 99:     if (loadingPublic) {
100:         return (
101:             <div className="flex justify-center items-center py-20 min-h-[50vh]">
102:                 <Loader2 size={40} className="animate-spin text-blue-600" />
103:             </div>
104:         );
105:     }
106:     if (!userData) {
107:         return (
108:             <div className="flex justify-center flex-col items-center py-20 min-h-[50vh]">
109:                 <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-800">Perfil no encontrado</h2>
110:                 <p className="text-slate-500 mt-2">El usuario que buscas no existe o no tienes permisos para verlo.</p>
111:             </div>
112:         );
113:     }
114:     // Higher quality name resolution for the header
115:     const hasRealName = userData.nombre && userData.nombre !== 'Usuario';
116:     const displayNombre = hasRealName ? userData.nombre.replace(/^\d+\s+/, '') : (userData.email ? userData.email.split('@')[0] : 'Usuario');
117:     const fullName = `${displayNombre} ${userData.apellidoPaterno || ''} ${userData.apellidoMaterno || ''}`.trim();
118:     // --- "Miembro desde" dynamic formatting ---
119:     const memberSince = (() => {
120:         if (!userData.createdAt) return 'Fecha no disponible';
121:         try {
122:             const date = new Date(userData.createdAt);
123:             if (isNaN(date.getTime())) return 'Fecha no disponible';
124:             const months = ['Enero', 'Febrero', 'Marzo', 'Abril', 'Mayo', 'Junio',
125:                 'Julio', 'Agosto', 'Septiembre', 'Octubre', 'Noviembre', 'Diciembre'];
126:             return `${months[date.getMonth()]} ${date.getFullYear()}`;
127:         } catch {
128:             return 'Fecha no disponible';
129:         }
130:     })();
131:     // --- Profile Photo Upload ---
132:     const handlePhotoUpload = async (e) => {
133:         const file = e.target.files?.[0];
134:         if (!file) return;
135:         // Validate
136:         if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
137:             return alert('Por favor, selecciona una imagen (JPG, PNG, WebP).');
138:         }
139:         if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
140:             return alert('La imagen no puede pesar más de 5MB.');
141:         }
142:         setUploading(true);
143:         setUploadProgress(0);
144:         try {
145:             // Step 1: Upload to Supabase Storage via existing endpoint
146:             const formData = new FormData();
147:             formData.append('file', file);
148:             const uploadResponse = await api.post('/api/storage/upload?folder=avatars', formData, {
149:                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
150:                 onUploadProgress: (progressEvent) => {
151:                     const percent = Math.round((progressEvent.loaded * 100) / progressEvent.total);
152:                     setUploadProgress(percent);
153:                 }
154:             });
155:             const photoUrl = uploadResponse.data.url;
156:             if (!photoUrl) throw new Error('No URL returned from storage');
157:             // Step 2: Persist URL to Firestore via new endpoint
158:             await api.put(`/api/users/${userData.userId}/photo`, {
159:                 fotoUrl: photoUrl
160:             });
161:             // Step 3: Refresh user data globally so all components update
162:             await refreshUserData();
163:         } catch (error) {
164:             console.error('Error uploading profile photo:', error);
165:             const msg = error.response?.data?.error || error.message || 'Error al subir la foto';
166:             alert(`Error: ${msg}`);
167:         } finally {
168:             setUploading(false);
169:             setUploadProgress(0);
170:             // Reset file input
171:             if (fileInputRef.current) fileInputRef.current.value = '';
172:         }
173:     };
174:     // --- Social Links Upload ---
175:     const handleSaveSocialLinks = async () => {
176:         setSavingSocial(true);
177:         let finalLinks = { ...socialLinks };
178:         // Auto-agregar si el usuario escribió un enlace pero olvidó presionar '+'
179:         if (newUrl.trim()) {
180:             let urlValue = newUrl.trim();
181:             if (!/^https?:\/\//i.test(urlValue)) {
182:                 urlValue = `https://${urlValue}`; // Auto-append https
183:             }
184:             finalLinks[newPlatform] = urlValue;
185:             setSocialLinks(finalLinks);
186:             setNewUrl(''); // limpiar input
187:         }
188:         try {
189:             await api.put(`/api/users/${userData.userId}/social`, {
190:                 redesSociales: finalLinks
191:             });
192:             await refreshUserData();
193:             setIsEditingSocial(false);
194:         } catch (error) {
195:             console.error('Error saving social links:', error);
196:             alert('Error al guardar las redes sociales.');
197:         } finally {
198:             setSavingSocial(false);
199:         }
200:     };
201:     const handleAddSocialLink = () => {
202:         if (!newUrl.trim()) return;
203:         // Basic URL validation
204:         let urlValue = newUrl.trim();
205:         if (!/^https?:\/\//i.test(urlValue)) {
206:             urlValue = `https://${urlValue}`; // Auto-append https
207:         }
208:         setSocialLinks(prev => ({
209:             ...prev,
210:             [newPlatform]: urlValue
211:         }));
212:         setNewUrl('');
213:     };
214:     const handleRemoveSocialLink = (platformToRemove) => {
215:         setSocialLinks(prev => {
216:             const copy = { ...prev };
217:             delete copy[platformToRemove];
218:             return copy;
219:         });
220:     };
221:     const getSocialIconAndColor = (platform) => {
222:         const size = 20;
223:         let icon;
224:         let colorClass;
225:         let bgClass = 'bg-white border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:shadow-sm text-slate-700';
226:         switch (platform.toLowerCase()) {
227:             case 'github':
228:                 icon = <Github size={size} />;
229:                 colorClass = 'text-slate-800 group-hover:text-black';
230:                 break;
231:             case 'linkedin':
232:                 icon = <Linkedin size={size} />;
233:                 colorClass = 'text-[#0A66C2] group-hover:text-[#004182]';
234:                 break;
235:             case 'twitter':
236:             case 'x':
237:                 icon = <Twitter size={size} />;
238:                 colorClass = 'text-slate-800 group-hover:text-black';
239:                 break;
240:             case 'youtube':
241:                 icon = <Youtube size={size} />;
242:                 colorClass = 'text-[#FF0000] group-hover:text-[#cc0000]';
243:                 break;
244:             default:
245:                 icon = <LinkIcon size={size} />;
246:                 colorClass = 'text-blue-500 group-hover:text-blue-600';
247:                 break;
248:         }
249:         return { icon, colorClass, bgClass };
250:     };
251:     // --- Cancel Edit Social ---
252:     const handleCancelEditSocial = () => {
253:         setSocialLinks(userData.redesSociales || {});
254:         setIsEditingSocial(false);
255:         setNewUrl('');
256:     };
257:     return (
258:         <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 pb-10">
259:             {/* Hidden File Input */}
260:             <input
261:                 ref={fileInputRef}
262:                 type="file"
263:                 accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp,image/gif"
264:                 className="hidden"
265:                 onChange={handlePhotoUpload}
266:             />
267:             {/* Main Neumorphic Card */}
268:             <div className="neu-flat rounded-[3rem] overflow-hidden relative dark:bg-[#1a1d27]">
269:                 {/* Cover with Animated Geometric Pattern and Gradients */}
270:                 <div className="h-72 w-full relative overflow-hidden group bg-slate-900">
271:                     {/* Modern mesh gradient background */}
272:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-slate-950"></div>
273:                     {/* Animated gradient orbs */}
274:                     <div className="absolute -top-32 -left-20 w-[30rem] h-[30rem] bg-blue-600/20 rounded-full mix-blend-screen filter blur-[80px] group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-1000"></div>
275:                     <div className="absolute top-10 right-0 w-[25rem] h-[25rem] bg-indigo-500/10 rounded-full mix-blend-screen filter blur-[60px] group-hover:-translate-x-10 transition-transform duration-1000"></div>
276:                     {/* Geometric Hexagon Grid overlay (CSS only approach) */}
277:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-[0.08]" style={{
278:                         backgroundImage: `url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M30 0l25.98 15v30L30 60 4.02 45V15z' fill-rule='evenodd' stroke='%23ffffff' stroke-width='1' fill='none'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")`,
279:                         backgroundSize: '40px 40px'
280:                     }}></div>
281:                     <GlobeBanner />
282:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-950/90 to-transparent"></div>
283:                 </div>
284:                 {/* Profile Header Content */}
285:                 <div className="px-8 sm:px-12 lg:px-16 pb-12 relative">
286:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6 items-start -mt-20">
287:                         {/* Avatar with upload */}
288:                         <div className="relative group shrink-0">
289:                             <div className="w-44 h-44 rounded-full neu-flat p-2 bg-[#e0e5ec] dark:bg-slate-800 flex items-center justify-center">
290:                                 <UserAvatar
291:                                     src={userData.fotoUrl}
292:                                     name={userData.nombre}
293:                                     size="xl"
294:                                     className="shadow-inner"
295:                                 />
296:                             </div>
297:                             {isOwnProfile && (
298:                                 <button
299:                                     onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
300:                                     disabled={uploading}
301:                                     className="absolute bottom-2 right-2 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 bg-[#e0e5ec] text-slate-900 shadow-lg border border-white/40 hover:bg-white transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
302:                                 >
303:                                     {uploading ? (
304:                                         <Loader2 size={18} className="animate-spin" />
305:                                     ) : (
306:                                         <Camera size={18} />
307:                                     )}
308:                                 </button>
309:                             )}
310:                             {/* Upload progress ring */}
311:                             {uploading && uploadProgress > 0 && (
312:                                 <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
313:                                     <svg className="w-44 h-44 rotate-[-90deg]" viewBox="0 0 44 44">
314:                                         <circle cx="22" cy="22" r="20" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" strokeWidth="2" />
315:                                         <circle cx="22" cy="22" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" strokeWidth="2.5"
316:                                             strokeDasharray={`${uploadProgress * 1.256}, 125.6`} strokeLinecap="round"
317:                                             className="transition-all duration-300"
318:                                         />
319:                                     </svg>
320:                                 </div>
321:                             )}
322:                         </div>
323:                         {/* Name & Role */}
324:                         <div className="flex-1 mt-4 md:mt-20 flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
325:                             <div>
326:                                 <h1 className="text-4xl font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight">
327:                                     {fullName}
328:                                 </h1>
329:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-2">
330:                                     <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-slate-900 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-slate-800 dark:ring-white/20">
331:                                         {userData.rol}
332:                                     </span>
333:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold">
334:                                         <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse"></span>
335:                                         En línea
336:                                     </div>
337:                                 </div>
338:                             </div>
339:                             {/* Edit Button */}
340:                             {isOwnProfile && (
341:                                 <button className="px-6 py-3 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl font-black text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200 shadow-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white transition-all flex items-center gap-2 uppercase text-[10px] tracking-widest shrink-0">
342:                                     <Edit2 size={16} />
343:                                     <span>Configurar</span>
344:                                 </button>
345:                             )}
346:                         </div>
347:                     </div>
348:                 </div>
349:             </div>
350:             {/* 2-Column Social/Portfolio Layout */}
351:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-12 gap-8">
352:                 {/* Left Column (Contact & Social) */}
353:                 <div className="xl:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-6">
354:                     {/* Social Links Card */}
355:                     <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm">
356:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
357:                             <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2 uppercase tracking-tighter">
358:                                 <span className="w-1 h-5 bg-blue-600 rounded-full"></span>
359:                                 Redes y Enlaces
360:                             </h2>
361:                             {!isEditingSocial && isOwnProfile && (
362:                                 <button onClick={() => setIsEditingSocial(true)} className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors" title="Editar enlaces">
363:                                     <Edit2 size={16} />
364:                                 </button>
365:                             )}
366:                         </div>
367:                         {isEditingSocial ? (
368:                             <div className="space-y-4">
369:                                 {/* Formulario para agregar */}
370:                                 <div className="flex gap-2">
371:                                     <select
372:                                         value={newPlatform}
373:                                         onChange={(e) => setNewPlatform(e.target.value)}
374:                                         className="bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-sm rounded-xl px-2 py-2 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
375:                                     >
376:                                         <option value="github">GitHub</option>
377:                                         <option value="linkedin">LinkedIn</option>
378:                                         <option value="twitter">X (Twitter)</option>
379:                                         <option value="portfolio">Portafolio</option>
380:                                         <option value="youtube">YouTube</option>
381:                                         <option value="otro">Otro</option>
382:                                     </select>
383:                                     <input
384:                                         type="url"
385:                                         placeholder="https://..."
386:                                         value={newUrl}
387:                                         onChange={(e) => setNewUrl(e.target.value)}
388:                                         className="flex-1 min-w-0 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 text-sm rounded-xl px-3 py-2 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 placeholder:text-slate-400"
389:                                     />
390:                                     <button
391:                                         onClick={handleAddSocialLink}
392:                                         className="bg-slate-900 text-white p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-600 transition-colors shrink-0"
393:                                     >
394:                                         <Plus size={20} />
395:                                     </button>
396:                                 </div>
397:                                 {/* Lista de links en edición */}
398:                                 <div className="space-y-2 mt-4 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto pr-1">
399:                                     {Object.entries(socialLinks).map(([platform, url]) => {
400:                                         const { icon, colorClass, bgClass } = getSocialIconAndColor(platform);
401:                                         return (
402:                                             <div key={platform} className={`flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg border transition-all group ${bgClass}`}>
403:                                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden">
404:                                                     <div className={`p-1.5 bg-slate-950 rounded-md shadow-sm transition-colors ${colorClass}`}>
405:                                                         {icon}
406:                                                     </div>
407:                                                     <div className="flex flex-col min-w-0">
408:                                                         <span className={`text-xs font-bold capitalize transition-colors text-white group-hover:text-slate-200`}>{platform}</span>
409:                                                         <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 truncate">{url}</span>
410:                                                     </div>
411:                                                 </div>
412:                                                 <button
413:                                                     onClick={() => handleRemoveSocialLink(platform)}
414:                                                     className="text-red-400 hover:text-red-500 p-1.5 hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md transition-colors shrink-0"
415:                                                     title="Eliminar"
416:                                                 >
417:                                                     <Trash2 size={14} />
418:                                                 </button>
419:                                             </div>
420:                                         );
421:                                     })}
422:                                     {Object.keys(socialLinks).length === 0 && (
423:                                         <p className="text-center text-slate-400 text-xs py-4">No hay enlaces agregados aún.</p>
424:                                     )}
425:                                 </div>
426:                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2 pt-4 border-t border-slate-100 mt-4">
427:                                     <button
428:                                         onClick={handleCancelEditSocial}
429:                                         className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700 transition-colors"
430:                                     >
431:                                         Cancelar
432:                                     </button>
433:                                     <button
434:                                         onClick={handleSaveSocialLinks}
435:                                         disabled={savingSocial}
436:                                         className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"
437:                                     >
438:                                         {savingSocial ? <Loader2 size={14} className="animate-spin" /> : <Save size={14} />}
439:                                         Guardar
440:                                     </button>
441:                                 </div>
442:                             </div>
443:                         ) : (
444:                             <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
445:                                 {Object.entries(socialLinks).length > 0 ? (
446:                                     Object.entries(socialLinks).map(([platform, url]) => {
447:                                         const { icon, colorClass, bgClass } = getSocialIconAndColor(platform);
448:                                         return (
449:                                             <a
450:                                                 key={platform}
451:                                                 href={url}
452:                                                 target="_blank"
453:                                                 rel="noopener noreferrer"
454:                                                 className={`flex items-center justify-center p-3 rounded-xl border transition-all shadow-sm group ${bgClass}`}
455:                                                 title={url}
456:                                             >
457:                                                 <div className={`group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform ${colorClass}`}>
458:                                                     {icon}
459:                                                 </div>
460:                                             </a>
461:                                         );
462:                                     })
463:                                 ) : (
464:                                     <div className="w-full text-center py-6 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 rounded-xl bg-slate-50/50">
465:                                         <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm mb-2">Sin redes sociales</p>
466:                                         {isOwnProfile && (
467:                                             <button
468:                                                 onClick={() => setIsEditingSocial(true)}
469:                                                 className="text-xs font-bold text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700"
470:                                             >
471:                                                 + Agregar Enlaces
472:                                             </button>
473:                                         )}
474:                                     </div>
475:                                 )}
476:                             </div>
477:                         )}
478:                     </div>
479:                     {/* Contact Info Card */}
480:                     <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm">
481:                         <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 uppercase tracking-tighter">
482:                             <span className="w-1 h-5 bg-slate-800 rounded-full"></span>
483:                             Contacto
484:                         </h2>
485:                         <div className="space-y-4">
486:                             <ContactRow icon={<Mail size={16} />} label="Email" value={userData.email} />
487:                             {userData.telefono && <ContactRow icon={<Phone size={16} />} label="Teléfono" value={userData.telefono} />}
488:                             {userData.direccion && <ContactRow icon={<MapPin size={16} />} label="Ubicación" value={userData.direccion} />}
489:                             <ContactRow icon={<Calendar size={16} />} label="Miembro" value={memberSince} />
490:                         </div>
491:                     </div>
492:                 </div>
493:                 {/* Right Column (Academic/Professional Info) */}
494:                 <div className="xl:col-span-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
495:                     <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-sm h-full">
496:                         <h2 className="text-xl font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white mb-8 flex items-center gap-3 uppercase tracking-tighter">
497:                             <span className="w-1.5 h-6 bg-slate-900 rounded-full"></span>
498:                             Información Académica / Profesional
499:                         </h2>
500:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 pb-8">
501:                             {/* Academic/Professional Fields based on Role */}
502:                             {userData.rol === 'Alumno' && (
503:                                 <>
504:                                     <InfoCard icon={<UserIcon size={20} />} label="Matrícula" value={userData.matricula || 'N/A'} color="text-blue-600 bg-blue-50" />
505:                                     <InfoCard icon={<GraduationCap size={20} />} label="Carrera" value={carreraNombre} color="text-indigo-600 bg-indigo-50" />
506:                                     {userData.grupoNombre && <InfoCard icon={<BookOpen size={20} />} label="Grupo" value={userData.grupoNombre} color="text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-50" />}
507:                                 </>
508:                             )}
509:                             {userData.rol === 'Docente' && (
510:                                 <>
511:                                     <InfoCard icon={<Briefcase size={20} />} label="Profesión" value={userData.profesion || 'No especificado'} color="text-purple-600 bg-purple-50" />
512:                                     {userData.especialidadDocente && <InfoCard icon={<Shield size={20} />} label="Especialidad" value={userData.especialidadDocente} color="text-indigo-600 bg-indigo-50" />}
513:                                     <InfoCard icon={<UserIcon size={20} />} label="Nómina / ID" value={userData.matricula || 'N/A'} color="text-blue-600 bg-blue-50" />
514:                                 </>
515:                             )}
516:                             {userData.rol === 'Invitado' && userData.organizacion && (
517:                                 <InfoCard icon={<Building size={20} />} label="Organización" value={userData.organizacion} color="text-slate-700 bg-slate-100" />
518:                             )}
519:                         </div>
520:                         {/* Premium Status Inside Academic */}
521:                         <div className="mt-8 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center sm:items-start gap-6 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-[#1e2230] border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 rounded-3xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden">
522:                             <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl opacity-50 -translate-y-10 translate-x-10 pointer-events-none"></div>
523:                             <div className="w-20 h-20 shrink-0 relative flex items-center justify-center bg-white dark:bg-[#0f111a] rounded-full shadow-sm z-10 p-1 transition-colors">
524:                                 <svg className="w-full h-full rotate-[-90deg]" viewBox="0 0 36 36">
525:                                     <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="16" fill="none" className="stroke-slate-100 dark:stroke-slate-800" strokeWidth="3" />
526:                                     <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="16" fill="none" stroke="#2563eb" strokeWidth="3" strokeDasharray="95, 100" strokeLinecap="round" />
527:                                 </svg>
528:                                 <span className="absolute text-base font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white">95%</span>
529:                             </div>
530:                             <div className="text-center sm:text-left z-10 w-full">
531:                                 <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight flex items-center gap-2 justify-center sm:justify-start">
532:                                     Perfil Premium <Shield size={16} className="text-blue-600" />
533:                                 </h3>
534:                                 <p className="text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-2 text-sm max-w-lg">
535:                                     Tu perfil casi está completo. Agregar redes sociales públicas aumentará tu visibilidad y te permitirá conectar de mejor forma dentro de la plataforma.
536:                                 </p>
537:                             </div>
538:                         </div>
539:                     </div>
540:                 </div>
541:             </div>
542:         </div>
543:     );
544: }
545: function ContactRow({ icon, label, value }) {
546:     if (!value) return null;
547:     return (
548:         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 group">
549:             <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 shrink-0 group-hover:bg-blue-50 dark:group-hover:bg-blue-900/30 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">
550:                 {icon}
551:             </div>
552:             <div className="flex flex-col min-w-0">
553:                 <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider">{label}</span>
554:                 <span className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 truncate" title={value}>{value}</span>
555:             </div>
556:         </div>
557:     );
558: }
559: function InfoCard({ icon, label, value, color, fullWidth = false }) {
560:     return (
561:         <div className={`bg-white dark:bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4 group hover:border-slate-200 dark:hover:border-slate-600 transition-all ${fullWidth ? 'md:col-span-2' : ''}`}>
562:             <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 ${color}`}>
563:                 {icon}
564:             </div>
565:             <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
566:                 <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase tracking-widest">{label}</p>
567:                 <p className={`text-slate-900 dark:text-white font-bold ${fullWidth ? 'break-all text-sm' : 'break-words text-sm'}`} title={value}>
568:                     {value}
569:                 </p>
570:             </div>
571:         </div>
572:     );
573: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Auth/Login/LoginHandler.cs
````csharp
  1: using MediatR;
  2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
  3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Enums;
  4: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
  5: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.ValueObjects;
  6: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Auth.Login;
  7: // === COMMAND ===
  8: public record LoginCommand(
  9:     string FirebaseUid,
 10:     string Email,
 11:     string DisplayName,
 12:     string? PhotoUrl
 13: ) : IRequest<LoginResponse>;
 14: public record LoginResponse(
 15:     string UserId,
 16:     string Email,
 17:     string Nombre,
 18:     string Rol,
 19:     bool IsFirstLogin,
 20:     string? GrupoId,
 21:     string? GrupoNombre,
 22:     string? Matricula,
 23:     string? CarreraId,
 24:     string? ApellidoPaterno,
 25:     string? ApellidoMaterno,
 26:     string? FotoUrl,
 27:     string? Profesion,
 28:     string? EspecialidadDocente,
 29:     string? Organizacion,
 30:     string? CreatedAt,
 31:     Dictionary<string, string>? RedesSociales
 32: );
 33: // === HANDLER ===
 34: public class LoginHandler : IRequestHandler<LoginCommand, LoginResponse>
 35: {
 36:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
 37:     private readonly IGroupRepository _groupRepository;
 38:     public LoginHandler(IUserRepository userRepository, IGroupRepository groupRepository)
 39:     {
 40:         _userRepository = userRepository;
 41:         _groupRepository = groupRepository;
 42:     }
 43:     public async Task<LoginResponse> Handle(LoginCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 44:     {
 45:         try
 46:         {
 47:             // 1. Buscar usuario existente
 48:             var existingUser = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.FirebaseUid);
 49:             if (existingUser != null)
 50:             {
 51:                 // --- ROLE CORRECTION LOGIC ---
 52:                 // 1. Force SuperAdmin for personal account (Specific Exception)
 53:                 if (existingUser.Email.Equals("uzielisaac28@gmail.com", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 54:                 {
 55:                     if (existingUser.Rol != "SuperAdmin")
 56:                     {
 57:                         existingUser.Rol = "SuperAdmin";
 58:                         await _userRepository.UpdateAsync(existingUser);
 59:                         Console.WriteLine($"[FIX] Set SuperAdmin role for {existingUser.Email}");
 60:                     }
 61:                 }
 62:                 // 2. Specific Exception for YOUR Teacher Account
 63:                 else if (existingUser.Email.Equals("Uziel.Pech@utmetropolitana.edu.mx", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 64:                 {
 65:                     if (existingUser.Rol != "Docente")
 66:                     {
 67:                         existingUser.Rol = "Docente";
 68:                         await _userRepository.UpdateAsync(existingUser);
 69:                         Console.WriteLine($"[FIX-URGENT] Forced Docente role for {existingUser.Email}");
 70:                     }
 71:                 }
 72:                 // 3. GENERAL FIX: Auto-correct any OTHER Docente
 73:                 else
 74:                 {
 75:                     var reEvaluatedEmail = Email.From(existingUser.Email);
 76:                     if (reEvaluatedEmail.DetectedRole == UserRole.Docente && existingUser.Rol != "Docente")
 77:                     {
 78:                         existingUser.Rol = "Docente";
 79:                         await _userRepository.UpdateAsync(existingUser);
 80:                         Console.WriteLine($"[AUTO-FIX] Corrected {existingUser.Email} to Docente role.");
 81:                     }
 82:                 }
 83:                 // --- SYNC PROFILE DATA IMPROVED ---
 84:                 // Si el nombre en la DB es el genérico "Usuario" pero Firebase trae uno real, actualizar.
 85:                 bool needsUpdate = false;
 86:                 if ((existingUser.Nombre == "Usuario" || string.IsNullOrEmpty(existingUser.Nombre)) && 
 87:                     !string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.DisplayName) && request.DisplayName != "Usuario")
````
