````csharp
 88:                 {
 89:                     existingUser.Nombre = request.DisplayName;
 90:                     needsUpdate = true;
 91:                 }
 92:                 // Sincronizar foto si no tiene una
 93:                 if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(existingUser.FotoUrl) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.PhotoUrl))
 94:                 {
 95:                     existingUser.FotoUrl = request.PhotoUrl;
 96:                     needsUpdate = true;
 97:                 }
 98:                 if (needsUpdate)
 99:                 {
100:                     await _userRepository.UpdateAsync(existingUser);
101:                     Console.WriteLine($"[SYNC] Updated name/photo for {existingUser.Email}");
102:                 }
103:                 // -----------------------------
104:                 // -----------------------------
105:                 // Resolver nombre del grupo si existe
106:                 string? grupoNombre = null;
107:                 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(existingUser.GrupoId))
108:                 {
109:                     var group = await _groupRepository.GetByIdAsync(existingUser.GrupoId);
110:                     grupoNombre = group?.Nombre;
111:                 }
112:                 // Usuario ya registrado, devolver datos
113:                 return new LoginResponse(
114:                     existingUser.Id,
115:                     existingUser.Email,
116:                     existingUser.Nombre,
117:                     existingUser.Rol,
118:                     existingUser.IsFirstLogin,
119:                     existingUser.GrupoId,
120:                     grupoNombre,
121:                     existingUser.Matricula,
122:                     existingUser.CarreraId,
123:                     existingUser.ApellidoPaterno,
124:                     existingUser.ApellidoMaterno,
125:                     existingUser.FotoUrl,
126:                     existingUser.Profesion,
127:                     existingUser.EspecialidadDocente,
128:                     existingUser.Organizacion,
129:                     existingUser.GetCreatedAtAsString(),
130:                     existingUser.RedesSociales
131:                 );
132:             }
133:             // 2. Usuario nuevo - detectar rol automáticamente
134:             Email email;
135:             try
136:             {
137:                 email = Email.From(request.Email);
138:             }
139:             catch (Exception ex)
140:             {
141:                 Console.WriteLine($"Error parsing email {request.Email}: {ex.Message}");
142:                 // Fallback: crear email como Invitado si falla la detección
143:                 email = Email.From("guest@external.com"); // Esto siempre retorna Invitado
144:             }
145:             var newUser = new User
146:             {
147:                 Id = request.FirebaseUid,
148:                 Email = request.Email, // Usar el email original, no el parseado
149:                 Nombre = request.DisplayName ?? "Usuario",
150:                 FotoUrl = request.PhotoUrl,
151:                 Rol = email.DetectedRole.ToString(),
152:                 Matricula = email.ExtractedMatricula,
153:                 IsFirstLogin = true // Necesita seleccionar grupo
154:             };
155:             await _userRepository.CreateIfNotExistsAsync(newUser);
156:             Console.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] LoginHandler: Attempting to create new user {newUser.Email} with Role {newUser.Rol} (Safe from race conditions)");
157:             return new LoginResponse(
158:                 newUser.Id,
159:                 newUser.Email,
160:                 newUser.Nombre,
161:                 newUser.Rol,
162:                 newUser.IsFirstLogin,
163:                 newUser.GrupoId,
164:                 null, // Nuevo usuario no tiene grupo aún
165:                 newUser.Matricula,
166:                 newUser.CarreraId,
167:                 newUser.ApellidoPaterno,
168:                 newUser.ApellidoMaterno,
169:                 newUser.FotoUrl,
170:                 newUser.Profesion,
171:                 newUser.EspecialidadDocente,
172:                 newUser.Organizacion,
173:                 newUser.GetCreatedAtAsString(),
174:                 newUser.RedesSociales
175:             );
176:         }
177:         catch (Exception ex)
178:         {
179:             Console.WriteLine($"FATAL ERROR in LoginHandler: {ex.Message}");
180:             Console.WriteLine($"Stack trace: {ex.StackTrace}");
181:             throw; // Re-throw para que el controller lo maneje
182:         }
183:     }
184: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/GetPublic/GetPublicProjectsHandler.cs
````csharp
  1: using MediatR;
  2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
  3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
  4: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetPublic;
  5: // === QUERY ===
  6: public record GetPublicProjectsQuery() : IRequest<IEnumerable<PublicProjectDto>>;
  7: // === HANDLER ===
  8: public class GetPublicProjectsHandler : IRequestHandler<GetPublicProjectsQuery, IEnumerable<PublicProjectDto>>
  9: {
 10:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
 11:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
 12:     public GetPublicProjectsHandler(IProjectRepository projectRepository, IUserRepository userRepository)
 13:     {
 14:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
 15:         _userRepository = userRepository;
 16:     }
 17:     public async Task<IEnumerable<PublicProjectDto>> Handle(GetPublicProjectsQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 18:     {
 19:         var projects = await _projectRepository.GetPublicProjectsAsync();
 20:         // Extract unique user IDs for Leaders and Teachers to prevent N+1 queries
 21:         var userIds = projects.Select(p => p.LiderId)
 22:                               .Concat(projects.Where(p => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.DocenteId)).Select(p => p.DocenteId!))
 23:                               .Distinct()
 24:                               .ToList();
 25:         // Fetch users in parallel
 26:         var userTasks = userIds.Select(id => _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(id));
 27:         var usersArr = await Task.WhenAll(userTasks);
 28:         var usersDict = usersArr.Where(u => u != null).ToDictionary(u => u!.Id, u => u);
 29:         var result = new List<PublicProjectDto>();
 30:         foreach (var project in projects)
 31:         {
 32:             usersDict.TryGetValue(project.LiderId, out var leader);
 33:             User? teacher = null;
 34:             if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(project.DocenteId))
 35:             {
 36:                 usersDict.TryGetValue(project.DocenteId, out teacher);
 37:             }
 38:             // Extract description from first non-empty text block if available
 39:             var description = "";
 40:             var textBlock = project.CanvasBlocks?.FirstOrDefault(b => 
 41:                 b.Type == "text" && 
 42:                 !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(b.Content ?? "", "<[^>]*>", "")));
 43:             if (textBlock != null)
 44:             {
 45:                 description = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(textBlock.Content ?? "", "<[^>]*>", "").Trim();
 46:             }
 47:             result.Add(new PublicProjectDto(
 48:                 project.Id,
 49:                 project.Titulo,
 50:                 project.Materia,
 51:                 project.Ciclo,
 52:                 project.StackTecnologico,
 53:                 project.ThumbnailUrl,
 54:                 project.RepositorioUrl,
 55:                 project.DemoUrl,
 56:                 project.VideoUrl,
 57:                 leader?.Nombre ?? "Usuario",
 58:                 leader?.FotoUrl,
 59:                 project.MiembrosIds ?? new List<string>(),
 60:                 teacher?.Nombre,
 61:                 project.Estado,
 62:                 description,
 63:                 project.CanvasBlocks ?? new List<CanvasBlock>(),
 64:                 project.GetCreatedAtAsDateTime(),
 65:                 project.Calificacion,
 66:                 project.LiderId,
 67:                 project.PuntosTotales,
 68:                 project.PuntosUIUX,
 69:                 project.PuntosInovacion,
 70:                 project.PuntosPresentacion,
 71:                 project.PuntosImpacto,
 72:                 project.ConteoVotos,
 73:                 project.Votantes ?? new Dictionary<string, object>()
 74:             ));
 75:         }
 76:         return result.OrderByDescending(p => p.CreatedAt);
 77:     }
 78: }
 79: public record PublicProjectDto(
 80:     string Id,
 81:     string Titulo,
 82:     string Materia,
 83:     string Ciclo,
 84:     List<string> StackTecnologico,
 85:     string? ThumbnailUrl,
 86:     string? RepositorioUrl,
 87:     string? DemoUrl,
 88:     string? VideoUrl,
 89:     string LiderNombre,
 90:     string? LiderFotoUrl,
 91:     List<string> MiembrosIds,
 92:     string? DocenteNombre,
 93:     string Estado,
 94:     string Descripcion,
 95:     List<CanvasBlock> Canvas,
 96:     DateTime CreatedAt,
 97:     double? Calificacion,
 98:     string LiderId,
 99:     double PuntosTotales,
100:     double PuntosUIUX,
101:     double PuntosInovacion,
102:     double PuntosPresentacion,
103:     double PuntosImpacto,
104:     int ConteoVotos,
105:     Dictionary<string, object> Votantes
106: );
````

## File: frontend/src/features/auth/hooks/useAuth.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react';
  2: import {
  3:     signInWithPopup,
  4:     signOut,
  5:     onAuthStateChanged
  6: } from 'firebase/auth';
  7: import { doc, getDoc, setDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
  8: import { auth, googleProvider, db } from '../../../lib/firebase';
  9: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
 10: import { useIdleTimeout } from '../../../hooks/useIdleTimeout';
 11: const AuthContext = createContext(null);
 12: export function AuthProvider({ children }) {
 13:     const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
 14:     const [userData, setUserData] = useState(null);
 15:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 16:     const fetchIdRef = useRef(0);
 17:     useEffect(() => {
 18:         const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (firebaseUser) => {
 19:             if (firebaseUser) {
 20:                 setUser(firebaseUser);
 21:                 const currentFetchId = ++fetchIdRef.current;
 22:                 try {
 23:                     // Siempre obtener datos del backend (source of truth)
 24:                     const response = await api.post('/api/auth/login', {
 25:                         firebaseUid: firebaseUser.uid,
 26:                         email: firebaseUser.email,
 27:                         displayName: firebaseUser.displayName || 'Usuario',
 28:                         photoUrl: firebaseUser.photoURL || ''
 29:                     });
 30:                     console.log('Backend user data:', response.data);
 31:                     // NORMALIZATION: Map backend PascalCase to camelCase to match app standards
 32:                     const d = response.data;
 33:                     // Priority logic for name: Backend > Firebase > Default
 34:                     // If backend returns "Usuario", try to use Firebase display name instead.
 35:                     let finalNombre = d.nombre || d.Nombre;
 36:                     if ((!finalNombre || finalNombre === 'Usuario') && firebaseUser.displayName && firebaseUser.displayName !== 'Usuario') {
 37:                         finalNombre = firebaseUser.displayName;
 38:                     }
 39:                     const normalizedUser = {
 40:                         userId: d.userId || d.UserId || firebaseUser.uid,
 41:                         email: d.email || d.Email || firebaseUser.email || '',
 42:                         nombre: finalNombre || 'Usuario',
 43:                         apellidoPaterno: d.apellidoPaterno || d.ApellidoPaterno || null,
 44:                         apellidoMaterno: d.apellidoMaterno || d.ApellidoMaterno || null,
 45:                         fotoUrl: d.fotoUrl || d.FotoUrl || firebaseUser.photoURL || null,
 46:                         rol: d.rol || d.Rol || 'Invitado',
 47:                         isFirstLogin: d.isFirstLogin ?? d.IsFirstLogin ?? false,
 48:                         grupoId: d.grupoId || d.GrupoId || null,
 49:                         grupoNombre: d.grupoNombre || d.GrupoNombre || null,
 50:                         matricula: d.matricula || d.Matricula || null,
 51:                         carreraId: d.carreraId || d.CarreraId || null,
 52:                         profesion: d.profesion || d.Profesion || null,
 53:                         especialidadDocente: d.especialidadDocente || d.EspecialidadDocente || null,
 54:                         organizacion: d.organizacion || d.Organizacion || null,
 55:                         createdAt: d.createdAt || d.CreatedAt || null,
 56:                         redesSociales: d.redesSociales || d.RedesSociales || {}
 57:                     };
 58:                     if (currentFetchId !== fetchIdRef.current) return;
 59:                     setUserData(normalizedUser);
 60:                     // Removed SMART SYNC direct Firestore writes from the frontend.
 61:                     // The backend is the single source of truth and handles database creation securely.
 62:                 } catch (error) {
 63:                     console.error('Error loading user data:', error);
 64:                     // Fallback: usar datos de Firebase
 65:                     // NORMALIZATION: Always use camelCase for userData keys to match backend response
 66:                     // This prevents issues with case sensitivity in other components (e.g., Sidebar, EvaluationPanel)
 67:                     if (currentFetchId === fetchIdRef.current) {
 68:                         setUserData({
 69:                             userId: firebaseUser.uid,
 70:                             email: firebaseUser.email,
 71:                             nombre: firebaseUser.displayName || 'Usuario',
 72:                             rol: 'Invitado',
 73:                             isFirstLogin: true
 74:                         });
 75:                     }
 76:                 }
 77:             } else {
 78:                 setUser(null);
 79:                 setUserData(null);
 80:             }
 81:             setLoading(false);
 82:         });
 83:         return () => unsubscribe();
 84:     }, []);
 85:     const loginWithGoogle = async () => {
 86:         try {
 87:             const result = await signInWithPopup(auth, googleProvider);
 88:             return result.user;
 89:         } catch (error) {
 90:             console.error('Error en login:', error);
 91:             throw error;
 92:         }
 93:     };
 94:     const logout = async () => {
 95:         try {
 96:             await signOut(auth);
 97:             setUser(null);
 98:             setUserData(null);
 99:         } catch (error) {
100:             console.error('Error en logout:', error);
101:             throw error;
102:         }
103:     };
104:     // Monitor de inactividad
105:     useIdleTimeout({
106:         enabled: !!user,
107:         timeoutMin: 30, // 30 minutos
108:         onTimeout: () => {
109:             console.log('Cerrando sesión por inactividad...');
110:             alert('Tu sesión ha expirado por inactividad por tu seguridad.');
111:             logout();
112:         }
113:     });
114:     const refreshUserData = async () => {
115:         const currentUser = auth.currentUser;
116:         if (!currentUser) return;
117:         const currentFetchId = ++fetchIdRef.current;
118:         try {
119:             const response = await api.post('/api/auth/login', {
120:                 firebaseUid: currentUser.uid,
121:                 email: currentUser.email,
122:                 displayName: currentUser.displayName || 'Usuario',
123:                 photoUrl: currentUser.photoURL || ''
124:             });
125:             const d = response.data;
126:             let finalNombre = d.nombre || d.Nombre;
127:             if ((!finalNombre || finalNombre === 'Usuario') && currentUser.displayName && currentUser.displayName !== 'Usuario') {
128:                 finalNombre = currentUser.displayName;
129:             }
130:             const normalizedUser = {
131:                 userId: d.userId || d.UserId || currentUser.uid,
132:                 email: d.email || d.Email || currentUser.email || '',
133:                 nombre: finalNombre || 'Usuario',
134:                 apellidoPaterno: d.apellidoPaterno || d.ApellidoPaterno || null,
135:                 apellidoMaterno: d.apellidoMaterno || d.ApellidoMaterno || null,
136:                 fotoUrl: d.fotoUrl || d.FotoUrl || currentUser.photoURL || null,
137:                 rol: d.rol || d.Rol || 'Invitado',
138:                 isFirstLogin: d.isFirstLogin ?? d.IsFirstLogin ?? false,
139:                 grupoId: d.grupoId || d.GrupoId || null,
140:                 grupoNombre: d.grupoNombre || d.GrupoNombre || null,
141:                 matricula: d.matricula || d.Matricula || null,
142:                 carreraId: d.carreraId || d.CarreraId || null,
143:                 profesion: d.profesion || d.Profesion || null,
144:                 especialidadDocente: d.especialidadDocente || d.EspecialidadDocente || null,
145:                 organizacion: d.organizacion || d.Organizacion || null,
146:                 createdAt: d.createdAt || d.CreatedAt || null,
147:                 redesSociales: d.redesSociales || d.RedesSociales || {}
148:             };
149:             if (currentFetchId !== fetchIdRef.current) return;
150:             setUserData(normalizedUser);
151:             return normalizedUser;
152:         } catch (error) {
153:             console.error('Error refreshing user data:', error);
154:         }
155:     };
156:     const value = {
157:         user,
158:         userData,
159:         loading,
160:         loginWithGoogle,
161:         logout,
162:         refreshUserData,
163:         isAuthenticated: !!user,
164:         isFirstLogin: userData?.isFirstLogin ?? false,
165:         rol: userData?.rol ?? 'Invitado'
166:     };
167:     return (
168:         <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>
169:             {children}
170:         </AuthContext.Provider>
171:     );
172: }
173: export function useAuth() {
174:     const context = useContext(AuthContext);
175:     if (!context) {
176:         throw new Error('useAuth debe usarse dentro de AuthProvider');
177:     }
178:     return context;
179: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/projects/components/CanvasEditor.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import {
  3:     Plus, Image as ImageIcon, Type, Heading1, Heading2, Heading3,
  4:     List, CheckSquare, Code, Quote, MoreVertical, X,
  5:     GripVertical, Video, MonitorPlay,
  6:     ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Play, Trash2, Bold, Italic,
  7:     Table as TableIcon, ChevronDown
  8: } from 'lucide-react';
  9: import { motion, Reorder, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
 10: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
 11: import { FONTS } from '../constants/editorFonts';
 12: // ─── Block Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 13: const BLOCK_TYPES = {
 14:     TEXT: 'text', H1: 'h1', H2: 'h2', H3: 'h3',
 15:     BULLET: 'bullet', TODO: 'todo',
 16:     IMAGE: 'image', VIDEO: 'video',
 17:     CODE: 'code', QUOTE: 'quote', DIVIDER: 'divider', TABLE: 'table',
 18: };
 19: const BLOCK_MENU = [
 20:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT, icon: Type, label: 'Texto Normal' },
 21:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.H1, icon: Heading1, label: 'Título Grande' },
 22:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.H2, icon: Heading2, label: 'Título Mediano' },
 23:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.H3, icon: Heading3, label: 'Título Pequeño' },
 24:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.BULLET, icon: List, label: 'Lista con viñetas' },
 25:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.TODO, icon: CheckSquare, label: 'Lista de tareas' },
 26:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.QUOTE, icon: Quote, label: 'Cita' },
 27:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.DIVIDER, icon: MoreVertical, label: 'Separador' },
 28:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.IMAGE, icon: ImageIcon, label: 'Imagen' },
 29:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO, icon: Video, label: 'Video' },
 30:     { type: BLOCK_TYPES.TABLE, icon: TableIcon, label: 'Tabla' },
 31: ];
 32: const TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES = [
 33:     BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT, BLOCK_TYPES.H1, BLOCK_TYPES.H2, BLOCK_TYPES.H3,
 34:     BLOCK_TYPES.BULLET, BLOCK_TYPES.TODO, BLOCK_TYPES.QUOTE, BLOCK_TYPES.CODE,
 35: ];
 36: // ─── Utility Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 37: const createDefaultTable = () => ({
 38:     rows: [
 39:         ['Encabezado 1', 'Encabezado 2', 'Encabezado 3'],
 40:         ['Celda', 'Celda', 'Celda'],
 41:         ['Celda', 'Celda', 'Celda'],
 42:     ],
 43:     hasHeader: true,
 44: });
 45: const getNormalizedMetadata = (metadata) => {
 46:     if (!metadata) return {};
 47:     if (typeof metadata === 'string') {
 48:         try { return JSON.parse(metadata); } catch { return {}; }
 49:     }
 50:     return metadata;
 51: };
 52: const getTableData = (block) => {
 53:     const meta = getNormalizedMetadata(block.metadata);
 54:     let raw = meta?.table || meta?.Table;
 55:     // Handle case where 'table' was stored as a JSON string by the old backend
 56:     if (typeof raw === 'string') {
 57:         try { raw = JSON.parse(raw); } catch { raw = null; }
 58:     }
 59:     if (!raw) return createDefaultTable();
 60:     let rows = raw.rows || raw.Rows;
 61:     const hasHeader = raw.hasHeader ?? raw.HasHeader ?? true;
 62:     // Each row might itself be a JSON string in heavily corrupted Firestore docs
 63:     if (Array.isArray(rows)) {
 64:         rows = rows.map(row => {
 65:             if (typeof row === 'string') { try { return JSON.parse(row); } catch { return [row]; } }
 66:             return Array.isArray(row) ? row : [String(row)];
 67:         });
 68:     }
 69:     if (!Array.isArray(rows) || rows.length === 0) return createDefaultTable();
 70:     return { rows, hasHeader };
 71: };
 72: // ─── Styles Map ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 73: const BLOCK_STYLES = {
 74:     [BLOCK_TYPES.H1]: 'text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white leading-tight',
 75:     [BLOCK_TYPES.H2]: 'text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-100 mt-6 mb-2',
 76:     [BLOCK_TYPES.H3]: 'text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200 mt-4 mb-2',
 77:     [BLOCK_TYPES.QUOTE]: 'border-l-4 border-gray-900 dark:border-slate-400 pl-4 italic text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 my-4 text-lg',
 78:     [BLOCK_TYPES.CODE]: 'font-mono text-sm bg-gray-900 dark:bg-slate-900 text-gray-100 p-4 rounded-xl my-2',
 79:     [BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT]: 'text-base text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 leading-relaxed',
 80:     [BLOCK_TYPES.BULLET]: 'text-base text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 leading-relaxed',
 81:     [BLOCK_TYPES.TODO]: 'text-base text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 leading-relaxed',
 82: };
 83: // ─── CanvasEditor ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 84: export function CanvasEditor({ project, readOnly = false, mode = 'all', onSaveStatusChange }) {
 85:     const [title, setTitle] = useState(project?.titulo || '');
 86:     const [videoUrl, setVideoUrl] = useState(project?.videoUrl || null);
 87:     const [videoUploadProgress, setVideoUploadProgress] = useState(0);
 88:     const [blocks, setBlocks] = useState(() => {
 89:         const c = project?.canvas || project?.canvasBlocks;
 90:         if (c && c.length > 0) return c;
 91:         return [{ id: crypto.randomUUID(), type: BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT, content: '', metadata: {} }];
 92:     });
 93:     const [activeBlock, setActiveBlock] = useState(null);
 94:     const [showMenu, setShowMenu] = useState(null);
 95:     const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
 96:     const [lightboxOpen, setLightboxOpen] = useState(false);
 97:     const [lightboxIndex, setLightboxIndex] = useState(0);
 98:     const [lightboxItems, setLightboxItems] = useState([]);
 99:     // Close menu when clicking outside
100:     useEffect(() => {
101:         if (!showMenu) return;
102:         const handler = (e) => {
103:             if (!e.target.closest('[data-block-menu]')) setShowMenu(null);
104:         };
105:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler);
106:         return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler);
107:     }, [showMenu]);
108:     useEffect(() => {
109:         if (project) {
110:             setTitle(project.titulo || '');
111:             setVideoUrl(project.videoUrl || null);
112:             const c = project.canvas || project.canvasBlocks;
113:             setBlocks(c && c.length > 0
114:                 ? c
115:                 : [{ id: crypto.randomUUID(), type: BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT, content: '', metadata: {} }]
116:             );
117:         }
118:     }, [project]);
119:     // Debounced auto-save
120:     useEffect(() => {
121:         if (readOnly) return;
122:         const t = setTimeout(saveContent, 2000);
123:         return () => clearTimeout(t);
124:     }, [blocks, title, videoUrl]);
125:     const saveContent = async () => {
126:         if (readOnly) return;
127:         setSaving(true);
128:         onSaveStatusChange?.(true);
129:         const sanitized = blocks.map(b => {
130:             const meta = getNormalizedMetadata(b.metadata);
131:             const { uploading, progress, error, ...rest } = meta;
132:             return { ...b, metadata: rest };
133:         });
134:         try {
135:             await api.put(`/api/projects/${project.id}`, {
136:                 titulo: title,
137:                 videoUrl,
138:                 canvasBlocks: sanitized,
139:             });
140:         } catch (e) {
141:             console.error('Error saving project:', e);
142:         } finally {
143:             setSaving(false);
144:             onSaveStatusChange?.(false);
145:         }
146:     };
147:     // ─── Block Management ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
148:     const addBlock = (type, index) => {
149:         const meta = type === BLOCK_TYPES.TABLE ? { table: createDefaultTable() } : {};
150:         const nb = { id: crypto.randomUUID(), type, content: '', metadata: meta };
151:         setBlocks(prev => {
152:             const next = [...prev];
153:             next.splice(index + 1, 0, nb);
154:             return next;
155:         });
156:         setActiveBlock(nb.id);
157:         setShowMenu(null);
158:     };
159:     const updateBlock = (id, content) =>
160:         setBlocks(prev => prev.map(b => b.id === id ? { ...b, content } : b));
161:     const removeBlock = (id) =>
162:         setBlocks(prev => prev.length > 1 ? prev.filter(b => b.id !== id) : prev);
163:     const handleBlockMetadataChange = (id, metadataUpdates) =>
164:         setBlocks(prev => prev.map(b => b.id === id
165:             ? { ...b, metadata: { ...getNormalizedMetadata(b.metadata), ...metadataUpdates } }
166:             : b
167:         ));
168:     const handleFontChange = (id, fontFamily) => handleBlockMetadataChange(id, { fontFamily });
169:     // ─── File Uploads ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
170:     const uploadFile = async (file, folder = 'project-assets', onProgress) => {
171:         const fd = new FormData();
172:         fd.append('file', file);
173:         const res = await api.post(`/api/storage/upload?folder=${folder}`, fd, {
174:             headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
175:             onUploadProgress: e => onProgress?.(Math.round((e.loaded * 100) / e.total)),
176:         });
177:         return res.data.url;
178:     };
179:     const handleVideoPitchUpload = async (file) => {
180:         if (!file) return;
181:         if (file.type && !file.type.startsWith('video/')) return alert('Por favor sube un video válido (MP4, WebM, MOV).');
182:         if (file.size > 500 * 1024 * 1024) return alert('El video no puede pesar más de 500MB');
183:         try {
184:             setVideoUploadProgress(1);
185:             const url = await uploadFile(file, 'project-promos', setVideoUploadProgress);
186:             if (!url) throw new Error('Backend returned empty URL');
187:             setVideoUrl(url);
188:         } catch (e) {
189:             console.error('Video pitch upload error:', e);
190:             alert(`Error: ${e.response?.data?.error || e.message}`);
191:         } finally {
192:             setVideoUploadProgress(0);
193:         }
194:     };
195:     const handleBlockFileUpload = async (file, blockId, type) => {
196:         if (!file) return;
197:         if (type === 'image' && file.type.startsWith('video/')) return alert('Este bloque es para IMÁGENES.');
198:         if (type === 'video' && file.type.startsWith('image/')) return alert('Este bloque es para VIDEOS.');
199:         if (file.size > 500 * 1024 * 1024) return alert('El archivo no puede superar los 500MB');
200:         handleBlockMetadataChange(blockId, { uploading: true, progress: 0, error: null });
201:         try {
202:             const folder = type === 'video' ? 'videos' : 'images';
203:             const url = await uploadFile(file, folder, p => handleBlockMetadataChange(blockId, { progress: p }));
204:             if (!url) throw new Error('Backend returned empty URL');
205:             updateBlock(blockId, url);
206:         } catch (e) {
207:             handleBlockMetadataChange(blockId, { error: e.response?.data?.error || e.message || 'Error al subir archivo' });
208:         } finally {
209:             handleBlockMetadataChange(blockId, { uploading: false });
210:         }
211:     };
212:     // ─── Table Updates ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
213:     const updateTableCell = (blockId, ri, ci, value) => setBlocks(prev => prev.map(b => {
214:         if (b.id !== blockId) return b;
215:         const { rows, hasHeader } = getTableData(b);
216:         const newRows = rows.map((row, r) =>
217:             r === ri ? row.map((cell, c) => c === ci ? value : cell) : row
218:         );
219:         return { ...b, metadata: { ...getNormalizedMetadata(b.metadata), table: { rows: newRows, hasHeader } } };
220:     }));
221:     const addTableRow = (blockId) => setBlocks(prev => prev.map(b => {
222:         if (b.id !== blockId) return b;
223:         const { rows, hasHeader } = getTableData(b);
224:         const cols = rows[0]?.length || 3;
225:         return { ...b, metadata: { ...getNormalizedMetadata(b.metadata), table: { rows: [...rows, Array(cols).fill('')], hasHeader } } };
226:     }));
227:     const addTableCol = (blockId) => setBlocks(prev => prev.map(b => {
228:         if (b.id !== blockId) return b;
229:         const { rows, hasHeader } = getTableData(b);
230:         const newRows = rows.map(r => [...r, '']);
231:         return { ...b, metadata: { ...getNormalizedMetadata(b.metadata), table: { rows: newRows, hasHeader } } };
232:     }));
233:     const removeTableRow = (blockId, ri) => setBlocks(prev => prev.map(b => {
234:         if (b.id !== blockId) return b;
235:         const { rows, hasHeader } = getTableData(b);
236:         if (rows.length <= 1) return b;
237:         const newRows = rows.filter((_, i) => i !== ri);
238:         return { ...b, metadata: { ...getNormalizedMetadata(b.metadata), table: { rows: newRows, hasHeader } } };
239:     }));
240:     const removeTableCol = (blockId, ci) => setBlocks(prev => prev.map(b => {
241:         if (b.id !== blockId) return b;
242:         const { rows, hasHeader } = getTableData(b);
243:         if ((rows[0]?.length || 0) <= 1) return b;
244:         const newRows = rows.map(r => r.filter((_, i) => i !== ci));
245:         return { ...b, metadata: { ...getNormalizedMetadata(b.metadata), table: { rows: newRows, hasHeader } } };
246:     }));
247:     // ─── Lightbox ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
248:     const handleOpenLightbox = (items, index) => {
249:         setLightboxItems(items);
250:         setLightboxIndex(index);
251:         setLightboxOpen(true);
252:     };
253:     // ─── Render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
254:     const renderReadOnlyBlocks = () => {
255:         const filteredBlocks = blocks.filter(block => {
256:             if (mode === 'media') return block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.IMAGE || block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO;
257:             if (mode === 'text') return block.type !== BLOCK_TYPES.IMAGE && block.type !== BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO;
258:             return true;
259:         });
260:         const groupedGroups = [];
261:         let mediaGroup = [];
262:         filteredBlocks.forEach(block => {
263:             if (block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.IMAGE || block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO) {
264:                 mediaGroup.push(block);
265:             } else {
266:                 if (mediaGroup.length) {
267:                     groupedGroups.push({ id: `g-${mediaGroup[0].id}`, type: 'media_gallery', items: [...mediaGroup] });
268:                     mediaGroup = [];
269:                 }
270:                 groupedGroups.push(block);
271:             }
272:         });
273:         if (mediaGroup.length) groupedGroups.push({ id: `g-${mediaGroup[0].id}`, type: 'media_gallery', items: mediaGroup });
274:         return groupedGroups.map(item => item.type === 'media_gallery'
275:             ? <MediaGallery key={item.id} items={item.items} onOpenLightbox={i => handleOpenLightbox(item.items, i)} />
276:             : <Block key={item.id} block={item} readOnly onToggleTodo={checked => handleBlockMetadataChange(item.id, { checked })} />
277:         );
278:     };
279:     return (
280:         <div className={mode === 'all' ? 'max-w-4xl mx-auto py-8 px-4 lg:px-0' : 'w-full h-full flex flex-col gap-4'}>
281:             {!readOnly && (
282:                 <div className="mb-12 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 pb-8">
283:                     <input
284:                         type="text"
285:                         value={title}
286:                         onChange={e => setTitle(e.target.value)}
287:                         placeholder="Título del Proyecto"
288:                         className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white placeholder-gray-300 dark:placeholder-slate-600 w-full outline-none bg-transparent mb-8"
289:                     />
290:                     <div className="space-y-4">
291:                         <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2">
292:                             <Video size={20} className="text-blue-600" />
293:                             Video Pitch
294:                         </h3>
295:                         {!videoUrl ? (
296:                             <div className="relative border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors group cursor-pointer text-center">
297:                                 <input type="file" className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full opacity-0 cursor-pointer" onChange={e => handleVideoPitchUpload(e.target.files[0])} />
298:                                 <div className="space-y-3">
299:                                     <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
300:                                         <MonitorPlay size={24} />
301:                                     </div>
302:                                     <div>
303:                                         <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Haz clic para subir tu Video Pitch</p>
304:                                         <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">MP4, WebM hasta 500MB</p>
305:                                     </div>
306:                                 </div>
307:                                 {videoUploadProgress > 0 && (
308:                                     <div className="absolute inset-x-8 bottom-4">
309:                                         <div className="h-1 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
310:                                             <div className="h-full bg-blue-600 transition-all duration-300" style={{ width: `${videoUploadProgress}%` }} />
311:                                         </div>
312:                                     </div>
313:                                 )}
314:                             </div>
315:                         ) : (
316:                             <div className="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-black aspect-video group">
317:                                 <video src={videoUrl} className="w-full h-full object-contain" controls />
318:                                 <button
319:                                     onClick={() => confirm('¿Eliminar video pitch?') && setVideoUrl(null)}
320:                                     className="absolute top-4 right-4 p-2 bg-black/50 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-red-500 transition-colors opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100"
321:                                 >
322:                                     <X size={16} />
323:                                 </button>
324:                             </div>
325:                         )}
326:                     </div>
327:                 </div>
328:             )}
329:             <div className="space-y-2">
330:                 {readOnly
331:                     ? renderReadOnlyBlocks()
332:                     : (
333:                         <Reorder.Group axis="y" values={blocks} onReorder={setBlocks}>
334:                             {blocks.map((block, index) => (
335:                                 <Block
336:                                     key={block.id}
337:                                     block={block}
338:                                     active={activeBlock === block.id}
339:                                     menuOpen={showMenu === block.id}
340:                                     onFocus={() => setActiveBlock(block.id)}
341:                                     onChange={content => updateBlock(block.id, content)}
342:                                     onRemove={() => removeBlock(block.id)}
343:                                     onAddBlock={type => addBlock(type, index)}
344:                                     onToggleMenu={() => setShowMenu(prev => prev === block.id ? null : block.id)}
345:                                     onFileUpload={(file, type) => handleBlockFileUpload(file, block.id, type)}
346:                                     onFontChange={f => handleFontChange(block.id, f)}
347:                                     onUpdateTableCell={(ri, ci, v) => updateTableCell(block.id, ri, ci, v)}
348:                                     onAddTableRow={() => addTableRow(block.id)}
349:                                     onAddTableCol={() => addTableCol(block.id)}
350:                                     onRemoveTableRow={ri => removeTableRow(block.id, ri)}
351:                                     onRemoveTableCol={ci => removeTableCol(block.id, ci)}
352:                                     onToggleTodo={checked => handleBlockMetadataChange(block.id, { checked })}
353:                                 />
354:                             ))}
355:                         </Reorder.Group>
356:                     )
357:                 }
358:             </div>
359:             {!readOnly && (
360:                 <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-3">
361:                     {[
362:                         { type: BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT, icon: Type, label: 'Texto', cls: 'bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300' },
363:                         { type: BLOCK_TYPES.IMAGE, icon: ImageIcon, label: 'Imagen', cls: 'bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 hover:bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400' },
364:                         { type: BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO, icon: Video, label: 'Video', cls: 'bg-purple-50 dark:bg-purple-900/30 hover:bg-purple-100 text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400' },
365:                         { type: BLOCK_TYPES.H2, icon: Heading2, label: 'Título', cls: 'bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300' },
366:                         { type: BLOCK_TYPES.TABLE, icon: TableIcon, label: 'Tabla', cls: 'bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 hover:bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400' },
367:                     ].map(({ type, icon: Icon, label, cls }) => (
368:                         <button
369:                             key={type}
370:                             onClick={() => addBlock(type, blocks.length - 1)}
371:                             className={`px-4 py-3 ${cls} rounded-xl font-medium transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 text-sm`}
372:                         >
373:                             <Icon size={18} />
374:                             {label}
375:                         </button>
376:                     ))}
377:                 </div>
378:             )}
379:             <AnimatePresence>
380:                 {lightboxOpen && (
381:                     <Lightbox
382:                         items={lightboxItems}
383:                         currentIndex={lightboxIndex}
384:                         onClose={() => setLightboxOpen(false)}
385:                         onChangeIndex={setLightboxIndex}
386:                     />
387:                 )}
388:             </AnimatePresence>
389:         </div>
390:     );
391: }
392: // ─── TextToolbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
393: function TextToolbar({ block, onFontChange }) {
394:     const [fontOpen, setFontOpen] = useState(false);
395:     const meta = getNormalizedMetadata(block.metadata);
396:     const currentFont = FONTS.find(f => f.value === meta.fontFamily) || FONTS[0];
397:     return (
398:         <div
399:             className="absolute -top-12 left-0 z-50 flex items-center gap-1 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl shadow-lg px-2 py-1.5"
400:             onMouseDown={e => e.preventDefault()}
401:         >
402:             <div className="relative" data-block-menu>
403:                 <button
404:                     onClick={() => setFontOpen(v => !v)}
405:                     className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-200 text-xs font-medium transition-colors min-w-[130px] justify-between"
406:                     style={{ fontFamily: currentFont.value }}
407:                 >
408:                     <span>{currentFont.label}</span>
409:                     <ChevronDown size={12} />
410:                 </button>
411:                 <AnimatePresence>
412:                     {fontOpen && (
413:                         <motion.div
414:                             initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -6 }}
415:                             animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
416:                             exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -6 }}
417:                             className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1.5 w-52 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 z-50 overflow-hidden"
418:                         >
419:                             {FONTS.map(font => (
420:                                 <button
421:                                     key={font.value}
422:                                     onMouseDown={e => { e.preventDefault(); onFontChange(font.value); setFontOpen(false); }}
423:                                     className={`w-full text-left px-3 py-2.5 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors text-sm ${meta.fontFamily === font.value ? 'bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-600' : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-300'}`}
424:                                     style={{ fontFamily: font.value }}
425:                                 >
426:                                     {font.label}
427:                                 </button>
428:                             ))}
429:                         </motion.div>
430:                     )}
431:                 </AnimatePresence>
432:             </div>
433:             <div className="w-px h-5 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-600 mx-0.5" />
434:             <button onMouseDown={e => { e.preventDefault(); document.execCommand('bold', false, null); }} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 font-bold transition-colors">
435:                 <Bold size={14} />
436:             </button>
437:             <button onMouseDown={e => { e.preventDefault(); document.execCommand('italic', false, null); }} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 italic transition-colors">
438:                 <Italic size={14} />
439:             </button>
440:             <button onMouseDown={e => { e.preventDefault(); document.execCommand('underline', false, null); }} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 underline transition-colors text-xs font-bold">
441:                 U
442:             </button>
443:         </div>
444:     );
445: }
446: // ─── TableBlock ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
447: function TableBlock({ block, readOnly, onUpdateCell, onAddRow, onAddCol, onRemoveRow, onRemoveCol }) {
448:     const { rows, hasHeader } = getTableData(block);
449:     if (readOnly) {
450:         return (
451:             <div className="overflow-x-auto my-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700">
452:                 <table className="w-full text-sm text-left border-collapse">
453:                     <tbody>
454:                         {rows.map((row, ri) => (
455:                             <tr key={ri} className={hasHeader && ri === 0 ? 'bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800' : 'hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50'}>
456:                                 {row.map((cell, ci) => (
457:                                     <td key={ci} className={`px-4 py-3 border-b border-r border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 last:border-r-0 ${hasHeader && ri === 0 ? 'font-semibold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-100 border-b-2 border-b-gray-300 dark:border-b-slate-600' : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-300'}`}>
458:                                         {cell || <span className="text-gray-300 dark:text-slate-600">—</span>}
459:                                     </td>
460:                                 ))}
461:                             </tr>
462:                         ))}
463:                     </tbody>
464:                 </table>
465:             </div>
466:         );
467:     }
468:     return (
469:         <div className="my-2 group/table">
470:             <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700">
471:                 <table className="w-full text-sm border-collapse">
472:                     <tbody>
473:                         {rows.map((row, ri) => (
474:                             <tr key={ri} className={`group/row ${hasHeader && ri === 0 ? 'bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800' : 'hover:bg-gray-50/50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/30'}`}>
475:                                 {row.map((cell, ci) => (
476:                                     <td key={ci} className="border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 relative">
477:                                         {ri === 0 && row.length > 1 && (
478:                                             <button onClick={() => onRemoveCol(ci)} className="hidden absolute -top-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-5 h-5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-full group-hover/table:flex items-center justify-center text-xs z-10 hover:bg-red-600">×</button>
479:                                         )}
480:                                         <input
481:                                             value={cell || ''}
482:                                             onChange={e => onUpdateCell(ri, ci, e.target.value)}
483:                                             placeholder={hasHeader && ri === 0 ? `Col ${ci + 1}` : ''}
484:                                             className={`w-full px-3 py-2.5 bg-transparent outline-none text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200 placeholder-gray-300 dark:placeholder-slate-600 min-w-[80px] ${hasHeader && ri === 0 ? 'font-semibold' : ''}`}
485:                                         />
486:                                     </td>
487:                                 ))}
488:                                 {rows.length > 1 && (
489:                                     <td className="border-0 pl-1 w-6">
490:                                         <button onClick={() => onRemoveRow(ri)} className="hidden w-5 h-5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-full group-hover/row:flex items-center justify-center text-xs hover:bg-red-600">×</button>
491:                                     </td>
492:                                 )}
493:                             </tr>
494:                         ))}
495:                     </tbody>
496:                 </table>
497:             </div>
498:             <div className="flex gap-2 mt-2 opacity-0 group-hover/table:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
499:                 <button onClick={onAddRow} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-600 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 rounded-lg transition-colors">
500:                     <Plus size={12} /> Fila
501:                 </button>
502:                 <button onClick={onAddCol} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-600 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 rounded-lg transition-colors">
503:                     <Plus size={12} /> Columna
504:                 </button>
505:             </div>
506:         </div>
507:     );
508: }
509: // ─── Block ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
510: function Block({
511:     block, active, menuOpen,
512:     onFocus, onChange, onRemove, onAddBlock, onToggleMenu, onFileUpload, onFontChange,
513:     onUpdateTableCell, onAddTableRow, onAddTableCol, onRemoveTableRow, onRemoveTableCol,
514:     onToggleTodo, readOnly,
515: }) {
516:     const editableRef = useRef(null);
517:     const isTextBlock = TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES.includes(block.type);
518:     const meta = getNormalizedMetadata(block.metadata);
519:     const fontFamily = meta?.fontFamily || FONTS[0].value;
520:     useEffect(() => {
521:         if (!editableRef.current || !isTextBlock) return;
522:         if (editableRef.current.innerHTML !== (block.content || '')) {
523:             editableRef.current.innerHTML = block.content || '';
524:         }
525:     }, [block.id]);
526:     useEffect(() => {
527:         if (active && editableRef.current) editableRef.current.focus();
528:     }, [active]);
529:     const handleInput = (e) => {
530:         onChange(e.currentTarget.innerHTML);
531:     };
532:     const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
533:         if (e.key === 'Enter' && e.shiftKey) {
534:             e.preventDefault();
535:             onAddBlock?.(BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT);
536:             return;
537:         }
538:         if (e.key === 'Backspace') {
539:             const isEmpty = !editableRef.current?.textContent?.trim() && !editableRef.current?.innerHTML?.includes('<img');
540:             if (isEmpty) { e.preventDefault(); onRemove?.(); }
541:         }
542:     };
543:     const renderContent = () => {
544:         if (block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.DIVIDER) return <div className="h-px bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 my-8" />;
545:         if (block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.TABLE) {
546:             return (
547:                 <TableBlock
548:                     block={block}
549:                     readOnly={readOnly}
550:                     onUpdateCell={onUpdateTableCell}
551:                     onAddRow={onAddTableRow}
552:                     onAddCol={onAddTableCol}
553:                     onRemoveRow={onRemoveTableRow}
554:                     onRemoveCol={onRemoveTableCol}
555:                 />
556:             );
557:         }
558:         if (block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.IMAGE || block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO) {
559:             const isVideo = block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO;
560:             return (
561:                 <div className="py-2">
562:                     {block.content ? (
563:                         <div className="relative group/media rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700">
564:                             {isVideo
565:                                 ? <video src={block.content} controls className="w-full h-auto max-h-[600px] object-contain bg-black" />
566:                                 : <img src={block.content} alt="Content" className="w-full h-auto max-h-[600px] object-contain" />
567:                             }
568:                             {!readOnly && (
569:                                 <button onClick={onRemove} className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1.5 bg-black/50 text-white rounded-lg opacity-0 group-hover/media:opacity-100 transition-opacity hover:bg-red-500">
570:                                     <Trash2 size={14} />
571:                                 </button>
572:                             )}
573:                         </div>
574:                     ) : (
575:                         <div className="relative border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl p-8 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 hover:border-blue-200 transition-colors group cursor-pointer text-center">
576:                             <input type="file" className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full opacity-0 cursor-pointer" onChange={e => onFileUpload?.(e.target.files[0], block.type)} disabled={readOnly} />
577:                             {meta?.uploading ? (
578:                                 <div className="space-y-3">
579:                                     <div className="animate-spin w-6 h-6 border-2 border-blue-600 border-t-transparent rounded-full mx-auto" />
580:                                     <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">Subiendo... {meta?.progress || 0}%</p>
581:                                 </div>
582:                             ) : (
583:                                 <div className="space-y-2">
584:                                     <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto text-gray-400 group-hover:bg-blue-50 group-hover:text-blue-500 transition-colors">
585:                                         {isVideo ? <Video size={20} /> : <ImageIcon size={20} />}
586:                                     </div>
587:                                     <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400">Haz clic para subir {isVideo ? 'video' : 'imagen'}</p>
588:                                     {meta?.error && <p className="text-xs text-red-500 bg-red-50 px-2 py-1 rounded">{meta.error}</p>}
589:                                 </div>
590:                             )}
591:                         </div>
592:                     )}
593:                 </div>
594:             );
595:         }
596:         if (readOnly) {
597:             return <div className={`w-full bg-transparent ${BLOCK_STYLES[block.type] || BLOCK_STYLES[BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT]}`} style={{ fontFamily, whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', wordBreak: 'break-word' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: block.content || '' }} />;
598:         }
599:         return (
600:             <div
601:                 ref={editableRef}
602:                 contentEditable
603:                 suppressContentEditableWarning
604:                 onInput={handleInput}
605:                 onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
606:                 onFocus={onFocus}
607:                 data-placeholder={active ? "Escribe… Shift+Enter p/ nuevo bloque" : ''}
608:                 className={`w-full bg-transparent outline-none min-h-[1.5em] empty:before:content-[attr(data-placeholder)] empty:before:text-gray-300 dark:empty:before:text-slate-600 ${BLOCK_STYLES[block.type] || BLOCK_STYLES[BLOCK_TYPES.TEXT]}`}
609:                 style={{ fontFamily, whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', wordBreak: 'break-word' }}
610:             />
611:         );
612:     };
613:     const Wrapper = readOnly ? 'div' : Reorder.Item;
614:     const wrapperProps = readOnly ? {} : { value: block, id: block.id, dragListener: false };
615:     const handleVisible = menuOpen || active;
616:     return (
617:         <Wrapper {...wrapperProps} className={`group/block relative flex items-start gap-2 py-0.5 ${active ? 'z-10' : ''}`}>
618:             {!readOnly && (
619:                 <div data-block-menu className={`absolute -left-12 top-1 flex items-center gap-0.5 transition-opacity ${handleVisible ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0 group-hover/block:opacity-100'}`}>
620:                     <button className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 rounded text-gray-400 cursor-grab"><GripVertical size={16} /></button>
621:                     <div className="relative" data-block-menu>
622:                         <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onToggleMenu(); }} className={`p-1 rounded text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors ${menuOpen ? 'bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-200' : ''}`}><MoreVertical size={16} /></button>
623:                         <AnimatePresence>
624:                             {menuOpen && (
625:                                 <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 6 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 6 }} className="absolute left-0 top-8 z-50 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 w-56 overflow-hidden">
626:                                     <div className="p-2 space-y-0.5 max-h-72 overflow-y-auto">
627:                                         {BLOCK_MENU.map(item => (
628:                                             <button key={item.type} onClick={() => onAddBlock(item.type)} className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 rounded-lg text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-200 text-sm transition-colors w-full text-left">
629:                                                 <span className="p-1.5 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 rounded-md text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300"><item.icon size={14} /></span>
630:                                                 <span>{item.label}</span>
631:                                             </button>
632:                                         ))}
633:                                     </div>
634:                                     <div className="border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 p-2">
635:                                         <button onClick={onRemove} className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-900/20 rounded-lg text-red-500 text-sm transition-colors w-full text-left">
636:                                             <span className="p-1.5 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 rounded-md"><Trash2 size={14} /></span>
637:                                             Eliminar bloque
638:                                         </button>
639:                                     </div>
640:                                 </motion.div>
641:                             )}
642:                         </AnimatePresence>
643:                     </div>
644:                 </div>
645:             )}
646:             {!readOnly && active && isTextBlock && <TextToolbar block={block} onFontChange={onFontChange} />}
647:             <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
648:                 {block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.BULLET
649:                     ? <div className="flex gap-2 items-start"><span className="text-gray-400 mt-1 select-none">•</span>{renderContent()}</div>
650:                     : block.type === BLOCK_TYPES.TODO
651:                         ? (
652:                             <div className="flex gap-3 items-start">
653:                                 <button
654:                                     className={`mt-1 w-5 h-5 rounded border-2 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 transition-colors ${meta?.checked ? 'bg-blue-500 border-blue-500' : 'border-gray-300 dark:border-slate-600 hover:border-blue-400'}`}
655:                                     onClick={() => !readOnly && onToggleTodo(!meta?.checked)}
656:                                 >
657:                                     {meta?.checked && <span className="text-white text-xs">✓</span>}
658:                                 </button>
659:                                 <div className={meta?.checked ? 'line-through opacity-50 flex-1' : 'flex-1'}>{renderContent()}</div>
660:                             </div>
661:                         )
662:                         : renderContent()
663:                 }
664:             </div>
665:         </Wrapper>
666:     );
667: }
668: // ─── MediaGallery / MediaItem / Lightbox ──────────────────────────────────────
669: function MediaGallery({ items, onOpenLightbox }) {
670:     if (!items?.length) return null;
671:     if (items.length === 1) return <div className="py-4 cursor-pointer" onClick={() => onOpenLightbox(0)}><MediaItem item={items[0]} className="w-full rounded-2xl max-h-[600px] object-contain hover:opacity-95 transition-opacity" /></div>;
672:     if (items.length === 2) return <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 h-[300px] py-4">{items.map((item, i) => <div key={item.id} className="relative h-full cursor-pointer overflow-hidden rounded-xl" onClick={() => onOpenLightbox(i)}><MediaItem item={item} className="w-full h-full object-cover hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300" /></div>)}</div>;
673:     const remaining = items.length - 3;
674:     return (
675:         <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 h-[400px] py-4">
676:             <div onClick={() => onOpenLightbox(0)} className="cursor-pointer rounded-xl overflow-hidden h-full"><MediaItem item={items[0]} className="w-full h-full object-cover" /></div>
677:             <div className="grid grid-rows-2 gap-2">
678:                 <div onClick={() => onOpenLightbox(1)} className="cursor-pointer rounded-xl overflow-hidden"><MediaItem item={items[1]} className="w-full h-full object-cover" /></div>
679:                 <div onClick={() => onOpenLightbox(2)} className="relative cursor-pointer rounded-xl overflow-hidden group">
680:                     <MediaItem item={items[2]} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
681:                     {remaining > 0 && <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:bg-black/70 transition-colors"><span className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">+{remaining}</span></div>}
682:                 </div>
683:             </div>
684:         </div>
685:     );
686: }
687: function MediaItem({ item, className }) {
688:     if (item.type === BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO) return (
689:         <div className={`relative ${className} bg-black flex items-center justify-center group`}>
690:             <video src={item.content} className="w-full h-full object-contain pointer-events-none" />
691:             <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/20 group-hover:bg-black/10 transition-colors"><div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white/20 backdrop-blur rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white"><Play fill="white" size={20} className="ml-0.5" /></div></div>
692:         </div>
693:     );
694:     return <img src={item.content} alt="" className={className} />;
695: }
696: function Lightbox({ items, currentIndex, onClose, onChangeIndex }) {
697:     const current = items[currentIndex];
698:     const isVideo = current?.type === BLOCK_TYPES.VIDEO;
699:     useEffect(() => {
700:         const h = (e) => {
701:             if (e.key === 'Escape') onClose();
702:             if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') onChangeIndex(p => Math.max(0, p - 1));
703:             if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') onChangeIndex(p => Math.min(items.length - 1, p + 1));
704:         };
705:         window.addEventListener('keydown', h);
706:         return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', h);
707:     }, [items.length, onChangeIndex, onClose]);
708:     return (
709:         <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose}>
710:             <button onClick={onClose} className="absolute top-6 right-6 p-2 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white z-50"><X size={24} /></button>
711:             {currentIndex > 0 && <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onChangeIndex(currentIndex - 1); }} className="absolute left-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white z-50"><ChevronLeft size={32} /></button>}
712:             {currentIndex < items.length - 1 && <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onChangeIndex(currentIndex + 1); }} className="absolute right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white z-50"><ChevronRight size={32} /></button>}
713:             <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center p-8 md:p-16" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
714:                 {isVideo ? <video src={current.content} controls autoPlay className="max-w-full max-h-full rounded-lg shadow-2xl" /> : <img src={current.content} alt="" className="max-w-full max-h-full object-contain rounded-lg shadow-2xl" />}
715:             </div>
716:             {items.length > 1 && <div className="absolute bottom-6 left-0 right-0 text-center text-white/50 text-sm">{currentIndex + 1} / {items.length}</div>}
717:         </motion.div>
718:     );
719: }
````

## File: backend/src/IntegradorHub.API/Features/Projects/GetDetails/GetProjectDetailsHandler.cs
````csharp
 1: using MediatR;
 2: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Entities;
 3: using IntegradorHub.API.Shared.Domain.Interfaces;
 4: namespace IntegradorHub.API.Features.Projects.GetDetails;
 5: // === QUERY ===
 6: public record GetProjectDetailsQuery(string ProjectId) : IRequest<ProjectDetailsDto>;
 7: // === HANDLER ===
 8: public class GetProjectDetailsHandler : IRequestHandler<GetProjectDetailsQuery, ProjectDetailsDto>
 9: {
10:     private readonly IProjectRepository _projectRepository;
11:     private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
12:     public GetProjectDetailsHandler(IProjectRepository projectRepository, IUserRepository userRepository)
13:     {
14:         _projectRepository = projectRepository;
15:         _userRepository = userRepository;
16:     }
17:     public async Task<ProjectDetailsDto> Handle(GetProjectDetailsQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
18:     {
19:         var project = await _projectRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.ProjectId);
20:         if (project == null) throw new KeyNotFoundException("Proyecto no encontrado");
21:         var members = new List<MemberDto>();
22:         if (project.MiembrosIds != null)
23:         {
24:             foreach (var memberId in project.MiembrosIds)
25:             {
26:                 var user = await _userRepository.GetByIdAsync(memberId);
27:                 if (user != null)
28:                 {
29:                     members.Add(new MemberDto(
30:                         user.Id,
31:                         user.Nombre,
32:                         user.Email,
33:                         user.FotoUrl,
34:                         memberId == project.LiderId ? "Líder" : "Miembro"
35:                     ));
36:                 }
37:             }
38:         }
39:         return new ProjectDetailsDto(
40:             project.Id,
41:             project.Titulo,
42:             project.Materia,
43:             project.MateriaId,
44:             project.Ciclo,
45:             project.GrupoId,
46:             project.Estado,
47:             project.LiderId,
48:             project.DocenteId,
49:             project.MiembrosIds ?? new List<string>(),
50:             project.StackTecnologico,
51:             project.RepositorioUrl,
52:             project.VideoUrl,
53:             project.CanvasBlocks,
54:             members,
55:             project.GetCreatedAtAsDateTime(),
56:             project.EsPublico,
57:             project.PuntosTotales,
58:             project.PuntosUIUX,
59:             project.PuntosInovacion,
60:             project.PuntosPresentacion,
61:             project.PuntosImpacto,
62:             project.ConteoVotos,
63:             project.Votantes ?? new Dictionary<string, object>(),
64:             project.Calificacion
65:         );
66:     }
67: }
68: public record ProjectDetailsDto(
69:     string Id,
70:     string Titulo,
71:     string Materia,
72:     string MateriaId,
73:     string Ciclo,
74:     string GrupoId,
75:     string Estado,
76:     string LiderId,
77:     string? DocenteId,
78:     List<string> MiembrosIds,
79:     List<string> StackTecnologico,
80:     string? RepositorioUrl,
81:     string? VideoUrl,
82:     List<CanvasBlock> Canvas,
83:     List<MemberDto> Members,
84:     DateTime CreatedAt,
85:     bool EsPublico,
86:     double PuntosTotales,
87:     double PuntosUIUX,
88:     double PuntosInovacion,
89:     double PuntosPresentacion,
90:     double PuntosImpacto,
91:     int ConteoVotos,
92:     Dictionary<string, object> Votantes,
93:     double? Calificacion
94: );
95: public record MemberDto(string Id, string Nombre, string Email, string? FotoUrl, string Rol);
````

## File: frontend/src/features/auth/pages/LoginPage.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Navigate, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
  3: import {
  4:     signInWithEmailAndPassword,
  5:     signInWithPopup
  6: } from 'firebase/auth';
  7: import { doc, setDoc, getDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
  8: import { auth, googleProvider, db } from '../../../lib/firebase';
  9: import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth';
 10: // Helper para auto-configurar admin
 11: const checkAdminSetup = async (user) => {
 12:     if (user.email === 'uzielisaac28@gmail.com') {
 13:         try {
 14:             const userDocRef = doc(db, 'users', user.uid);
 15:             const userDocSnap = await getDoc(userDocRef);
 16:             const existingData = userDocSnap.exists() ? userDocSnap.data() : {};
 17:             await setDoc(userDocRef, {
 18:                 email: user.email,
 19:                 nombre: existingData.nombre || 'Admin',
 20:                 rol: 'admin',
 21:                 is_first_login: false,
 22:                 created_at: existingData.created_at || new Date().toISOString()
 23:             }, { merge: true });
 24:             console.log('🚀 Admin privileges granted automatically for:', user.email);
 25:         } catch (e) {
 26:             console.error('Error granting admin privileges:', e);
 27:         }
 28:     }
 29: };
 30: import { GraduationCap, User, UserCheck, AlertCircle, Eye, EyeOff, Sun, Moon } from 'lucide-react';
 31: import { useTheme } from '../../../context/ThemeContext';
 32: // Regex para detectar rol
 33: const REGEX_ALUMNO = /^(\d{8})@alumno\.utmetropolitana\.edu\.mx$/;
 34: const REGEX_DOCENTE = /^[a-zA-Z.]+@utmetropolitana\.edu\.mx$/;
 35: // Detectar rol por correo
 36: const detectarRol = (email) => {
 37:     if (REGEX_ALUMNO.test(email)) return 'Alumno';
 38:     if (REGEX_DOCENTE.test(email)) return 'Docente';
 39:     return 'Invitado';
 40: };
 41: export default function LoginPage() {
 42:     const { isAuthenticated, loading, rol } = useAuth();
 43:     const { isDark, toggleTheme } = useTheme();
 44:     const styles = getStyles(isDark);
 45:     const navigate = useNavigate();
 46:     const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
 47:     const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
 48:     const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
 49:     const [detectedRole, setDetectedRole] = useState(null);
 50:     const [error, setError] = useState('');
 51:     const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
 52:     if (loading) return <div style={styles.loadingContainer}><div style={styles.spinner}></div></div>;
 53:     // Redirect based on role
 54:     // Only redirect if authenticated
 55:     if (isAuthenticated) {
 56:         if (rol === 'admin' || rol === 'SuperAdmin') {
 57:             return <Navigate to="/admin" replace />;
 58:         }
 59:         if (rol === 'Alumno') {
 60:             return <Navigate to="/projects" replace />;
 61:         }
 62:         return <Navigate to="/dashboard" replace />;
 63:     }
 64:     // Detectar rol y validar email
 65:     const handleEmailChange = (e) => {
 66:         const value = e.target.value;
 67:         setEmail(value);
 68:         setError('');
 69:         if (value.includes('@')) {
 70:             const rol = detectarRol(value);
 71:             setDetectedRole(rol);
 72:         } else {
 73:             setDetectedRole(null);
 74:         }
 75:     };
 76:     // Login con email/password
 77:     const handleLogin = async (e) => {
 78:         e.preventDefault();
 79:         setError('');
 80:         setSubmitting(true);
 81:         try {
 82:             const result = await signInWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password);
 83:             await checkAdminSetup(result.user);
 84:         } catch (err) {
 85:             console.error('Login error:', err);
 86:             if (err.code === 'auth/invalid-credential' || err.code === 'auth/user-not-found' || err.code === 'auth/wrong-password') {
 87:                 setError('Correo o contraseña incorrectos. Si eres nuevo, utiliza la pestaña de Registrarse arriba.');
 88:             } else if (err.code === 'auth/too-many-requests') {
 89:                 setError('Demasiados intentos fallidos. Espera unos minutos antes de intentar de nuevo.');
 90:             } else {
 91:                 setError(err.message);
 92:             }
 93:         } finally {
 94:             setSubmitting(false);
 95:         }
 96:     };
 97:     // Login con Google
 98:     const handleGoogleLogin = async () => {
 99:         setError('');
100:         setSubmitting(true);
101:         try {
102:             const result = await signInWithPopup(auth, googleProvider);
103:             await checkAdminSetup(result.user);
104:             const userEmail = result.user.email;
105:             const rol = detectarRol(userEmail);
106:             if (rol === 'Invitado') {
107:                 setError('Has ingresado como Invitado. Solo puedes ver la galería pública.');
108:             }
109:         } catch (err) {
110:             console.error('Google login error:', err);
111:             if (err.code !== 'auth/popup-closed-by-user') {
112:                 setError('Error al iniciar sesión con Google');
113:             }
114:         } finally {
115:             setSubmitting(false);
116:         }
117:     };
118:     // Icono de rol
119:     const RoleIcon = ({ role, size = 20 }) => {
120:         if (role === 'Alumno') return <GraduationCap size={size} />;
121:         if (role === 'Docente') return <UserCheck size={size} />;
122:         return <User size={size} />;
123:     };
124:     return (
125:         <div style={styles.pageContainer}>
126:             {/* Theme Toggle Button */}
127:             <button
128:                 onClick={toggleTheme}
129:                 style={styles.themeToggleBtn}
130:                 aria-label="Toggle theme"
131:             >
132:                 {isDark ? <Sun size={20} color="#facc15" /> : <Moon size={20} color="#6b7280" />}
133:             </button>
134:             <div style={styles.cardContainer}>
135:                 {/* Logo */}
136:                 <div style={styles.logoSection}>
137:                     <div style={styles.logoIcon}>
138:                         <img src="/byfrost-icon.png" alt="Byfrost" style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', objectFit: 'cover', borderRadius: '16px' }} />
139:                     </div>
140:                     <h1 style={styles.title}>Byfrost®</h1>
141:                     <p style={styles.subtitle}>DSM Edition</p>
142:                 </div>
143:                 {/* Card */}
144:                 <div style={styles.card}>
145:                     {/* Auth Tabs */}
146:                     <div style={styles.tabBar}>
147:                         <button style={styles.tabActive} disabled>
148:                             Iniciar Sesión
149:                         </button>
150:                         <button style={styles.tabInactive} onClick={() => navigate('/register')}>
151:                             Registrarse
152:                         </button>
153:                     </div>
154:                     <form onSubmit={handleLogin} style={styles.form}>
155:                         {/* Email */}
156:                         <div style={styles.inputGroup}>
157:                             <label style={styles.label}>Correo Electrónico</label>
158:                             <input
159:                                 type="email"
160:                                 value={email}
161:                                 onChange={handleEmailChange}
162:                                 placeholder="tu.correo@utmetropolitana.edu.mx"
163:                                 style={styles.input}
164:                                 required
165:                             />
166:                             {detectedRole && detectedRole !== 'Invitado' && (
167:                                 <div style={{
168:                                     ...styles.rolBadge,
169:                                     backgroundColor: detectedRole === 'Alumno' ? '#dbeafe' : '#dcfce7',
170:                                     color: detectedRole === 'Alumno' ? '#1d4ed8' : '#15803d'
171:                                 }}>
172:                                     <RoleIcon role={detectedRole} size={16} />
173:                                     <span style={{ marginLeft: '8px' }}>Rol detectado: {detectedRole}</span>
174:                                 </div>
175:                             )}
176:                         </div>
177:                         {/* Password */}
178:                         <div style={styles.inputGroup}>
179:                             <label style={styles.label}>Contraseña</label>
180:                             <div style={styles.passwordWrapper}>
181:                                 <input
182:                                     type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
````
