183:                                     value={password}
184:                                     onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
185:                                     placeholder="••••••••"
186:                                     style={{ ...styles.input, paddingRight: '48px' }}
187:                                     required
188:                                     minLength={6}
189:                                 />
190:                                 <button
191:                                     type="button"
192:                                     onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
193:                                     style={styles.passwordToggle}
194:                                     tabIndex={-1}
195:                                     aria-label={showPassword ? 'Ocultar contraseña' : 'Mostrar contraseña'}
196:                                 >
197:                                     {showPassword ? <EyeOff size={18} /> : <Eye size={18} />}
198:                                 </button>
199:                             </div>
200:                         </div>
201:                         {/* Error */}
202:                         {error && (
203:                             <div style={styles.error}>
204:                                 <AlertCircle size={16} style={{ flexShrink: 0 }} />
205:                                 <span style={{ marginLeft: '8px' }}>{error}</span>
206:                             </div>
207:                         )}
208:                         {/* Submit Login */}
209:                         <button
210:                             type="submit"
211:                             disabled={submitting}
212:                             style={{
213:                                 ...styles.primaryBtn,
214:                                 opacity: submitting ? 0.7 : 1,
215:                             }}
216:                         >
217:                             {submitting ? 'Procesando...' : 'Iniciar Sesión'}
218:                         </button>
219:                     </form>
220:                     {/* Divider */}
221:                     <div style={styles.divider}>
222:                         <div style={styles.dividerLine}></div>
223:                         <span style={styles.dividerText}>o</span>
224:                         <div style={styles.dividerLine}></div>
225:                     </div>
226:                     {/* Google */}
227:                     <button
228:                         type="button"
229:                         onClick={handleGoogleLogin}
230:                         disabled={submitting}
231:                         style={styles.googleBtn}
232:                     >
233:                         <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" style={{ marginRight: '10px' }}>
234:                             <path fill="#4285F4" d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92c-.26 1.37-1.04 2.53-2.21 3.31v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.09z" />
235:                             <path fill="#34A853" d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z" />
236:                             <path fill="#FBBC05" d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l2.85-2.22.81-.62z" />
237:                             <path fill="#EA4335" d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z" />
238:                         </svg>
239:                         Continuar con Google
240:                     </button>
241:                 </div>
242:             </div>
243:             {/* Footer */}
244:             <p style={styles.footer}>Universidad Tecnológica Metropolitana</p>
245:         </div>
246:     );
247: }

## File: frontend/src/features/projects/components/CreateProjectForm.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { X, Search, Check, ArrowRight, Layout, Video } from 'lucide-react';
  3: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  4: import { UserAvatar } from '../../../components/UserAvatar';
  5: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  6: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
  7: export function CreateProjectForm({ onClose, onSuccess }) {
  8:     const { userData } = useAuth();
  9:     const [step, setStep] = useState(1);
 10:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 11:     const [error, setError] = useState('');
 12:     // Data Sources
 13:     const [availableTeachers, setAvailableTeachers] = useState([]);
 14:     const [availableStudents, setAvailableStudents] = useState([]);
 15:     const [isLoadingResources, setIsLoadingResources] = useState(true);
 16:     // Form State
 17:     const [form, setForm] = useState({
 18:         titulo: '',
 19:         materia: '',
 20:         materiaId: '',
 21:         docenteId: '',
 22:         ciclo: '2026-1',
 23:         stackTecnologico: '',
 24:         miembrosIds: []
 25:     });
 26:     const [videoFile, setVideoFile] = useState(null);
 27:     const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0);
 28:     const [studentSearch, setStudentSearch] = useState('');
 29:     const [teacherSearch, setTeacherSearch] = useState('');
 30:     useEffect(() => {
 31:         if (userData?.grupoId) {
 32:             fetchResources();
 33:         } else {
 34:             setIsLoadingResources(false);
 35:             setError('Debe estar asignado a un grupo para crear proyectos.');
 36:         }
 37:     }, [userData]);
 38:     const fetchResources = async () => {
 39:         try {
 40:             setIsLoadingResources(true);
 41:             // Construir query params para filtrar docentes por carrera si está disponible
 42:             const teacherParams = new URLSearchParams({ groupId: userData.grupoId });
 43:             if (userData.carreraId) {
 44:                 teacherParams.append('carreraId', userData.carreraId);
 45:             }
 46:             const [teachersRes, studentsRes] = await Promise.all([
 47:                 api.get(`/api/teams/available-teachers?${teacherParams.toString()}`),
 48:                 api.get(`/api/teams/available-students?groupId=${userData.grupoId}`)
 49:             ]);
 50:             setAvailableTeachers(teachersRes.data);
 51:             setAvailableStudents(studentsRes.data);
 52:         } catch (err) {
 53:             console.error('Error fetching resources:', err);
 54:             setError('Error al cargar listas.');
 55:         } finally {
 56:             setIsLoadingResources(false);
 57:         }
 58:     };
 59:     const toggleStudent = (studentId) => {
 60:         setForm(prev => {
 61:             const currentMembers = prev.miembrosIds;
 62:             if (currentMembers.includes(studentId)) {
 63:                 return { ...prev, miembrosIds: currentMembers.filter(id => id !== studentId) };
 64:             } else {
 65:                 if (currentMembers.length >= 4) return prev;
 66:                 return { ...prev, miembrosIds: [...currentMembers, studentId] };
 67:             }
 68:         });
 69:     };
 70:     const handleSubmit = async () => {
 71:         setLoading(true);
 72:         setError('');
 73:         if (!form.docenteId) {
 74:             setError('Debes seleccionar un docente asesor.');
 75:             setLoading(false);
 76:             return;
 77:         }
 78:         try {
 79:             let videoUrl = null;
 80:             if (videoFile) {
 81:                 const formData = new FormData();
 82:                 formData.append('file', videoFile);
 83:                 const uploadRes = await api.post('/api/storage/upload?folder=project-promos', formData, {
 84:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' },
 85:                     onUploadProgress: (progressEvent) => {
 86:                         const percentCompleted = Math.round((progressEvent.loaded * 100) / progressEvent.total);
 87:                         setUploadProgress(percentCompleted);
 88:                     }
 89:                 });
 90:                 videoUrl = uploadRes.data.url;
 91:             }
 92:             const selectedTeacher = availableTeachers.find(t => t.id === form.docenteId);
 93:             // Fix: Map fields to match Backend 'CreateProjectRequest' DTO
 94:             // userId is no longer sent — backend extracts it from JWT
 95:             await api.post('/api/projects', {
 96:                 titulo: form.titulo,
 97:                 materia: selectedTeacher?.asignatura || form.materia,
 98:                 materiaId: selectedTeacher?.materiaId || 'MAT-DEFAULT',
 99:                 docenteId: form.docenteId,
100:                 ciclo: form.ciclo,
101:                 userGroupId: userData.grupoId,
102:                 stackTecnologico: form.stackTecnologico.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean),
103:                 miembrosIds: form.miembrosIds,
104:                 videoUrl: videoUrl,
105:                 repositorioUrl: '' // Added explicitly to avoid null issues if strict
106:             });
107:             onSuccess();
108:         } catch (err) {
109:             console.error('Error creating project:', err);
110:             setError(err.response?.data?.message || err.response?.data?.error || 'Error al crear proyecto');
111:         } finally {
112:             setLoading(false);
113:             setUploadProgress(0);
114:         }
115:     };
116:     const nextStep = () => {
117:         if (!form.titulo) {
118:             setError('El título es obligatorio');
119:             return;
120:         }
121:         setError('');
122:         setStep(2);
123:     };
124:     const filteredStudents = availableStudents
125:         .filter(s => s.id !== userData.userId)
126:         .filter(s => s.nombreCompleto.toLowerCase().includes(studentSearch.toLowerCase()) ||
127:             s.matricula.toLowerCase().includes(studentSearch.toLowerCase()));
128:     const filteredTeachers = availableTeachers.filter(t =>
129:         t.nombreCompleto.toLowerCase().includes(teacherSearch.toLowerCase()) &&
130:         (!form.materia || t.asignatura === form.materia)
131:     );
132:     return (
133:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
134:             {/* Header */}
135:             <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-900/50">
136:                 <div>
137:                     <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">
138:                         {step === 1 ? 'Nuevo Proyecto' : 'Selecciona tu Equipo'}
139:                     </h2>
140:                     <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-2 font-medium">
141:                         {step === 1 ? 'Información del proyecto y docente asesor' : 'Busca e invita a tus compañeros'}
142:                     </p>
143:                 </div>
144:                 <button
145:                     onClick={onClose}
146:                     className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 transition-colors"
147:                 >
148:                     <X size={22} />
149:                 </button>
150:             </div>
151:             <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-8 py-8">
152:                 <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
153:                     {step === 1 ? (
154:                         <motion.div
155:                             key="step1"
156:                             initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
157:                             animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
158:                             exit={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
159:                             className="space-y-8 max-w-2xl"
160:                         >
161:                             {/* Project Name */}
162:                             <div>
163:                                 <label className="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-3">Nombre del Proyecto</label>
164:                                 <div className="relative">
165:                                     <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-4 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
166:                                         <Layout size={18} className="text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500" />
167:                                     </div>
168:                                     <input
169:                                         type="text"
170:                                         value={form.titulo}
171:                                         onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, titulo: e.target.value })}
172:                                         placeholder="Ej: Sistema de Gestión Empresarial"
173:                                         className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-gray-900 dark:focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-900/10 dark:focus:ring-blue-500/10 transition-all duration-200 text-base dark:text-white"
174:                                         autoFocus
175:                                     />
176:                                 </div>
177:                             </div>
178:                             {/* Subject & Teacher Mapping */}
179:                             {/* Logic: Get unique subjects from available teachers to filter the list */}
180:                             {(() => {
181:                                 const uniqueSubjects = [...new Set(availableTeachers.map(t => t.asignatura))].sort();
182:                                 return (
183:                                     <div>
184:                                         <label className="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-3">Materia</label>
185:                                         <div className="relative">
186:                                             <select
187:                                                 value={form.materia}
188:                                                 onChange={e => {
189:                                                     setForm({
190:                                                         ...form,
191:                                                         materia: e.target.value,
192:                                                         docenteId: '' // Reset teacher when subject changes
193:                                                     });
194:                                                 }}
195:                                                 className="w-full px-4 py-3 border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 focus:outline-none focus:border-gray-900 dark:focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-900/10 dark:focus:ring-blue-500/10 transition-all duration-200 text-base dark:text-white appearance-none"
196:                                             >
197:                                                 <option value="">Selecciona una materia...</option>
198:                                                 {uniqueSubjects.map(subject => (
199:                                                     <option key={subject} value={subject}>{subject}</option>
200:                                                 ))}
201:                                             </select>
202:                                             <div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center px-4 pointer-events-none text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">
203:                                                 <svg className="w-4 h-4 fill-current" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
204:                                                     <path d="M5.293 7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 10.586l3.293-3.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414l-4 4a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 010-1.414z" clipRule="evenodd" fillRule="evenodd"></path>
205:                                                 </svg>
206:                                             </div>
207:                                         </div>
208:                                     </div>
209:                                 );
210:                             })()}
211:                             {/* Video Upload */}
212:                             <div>
213:                                 <label className="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-3">Video Pitch <span className="font-normal text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">(Opcional)</span></label>
214:                                 <div className="flex justify-center px-6 pt-8 pb-8 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer relative group">
215:                                     <div className="space-y-3 text-center">
216:                                         <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto group-hover:bg-blue-50 dark:group-hover:bg-blue-900/20 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500">
217:                                             <Video size={24} />
218:                                         </div>
219:                                         <div className="text-sm">
220:                                             <label htmlFor="file-upload" className="relative cursor-pointer font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white hover:text-gray-700 dark:hover:text-slate-200 focus-within:outline-none focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-offset-2 focus-within:ring-blue-500">
221:                                                 <span>Haz clic para subir un video</span>
222:                                                 <input
223:                                                     id="file-upload"
224:                                                     name="file-upload"
225:                                                     type="file"
226:                                                     className="sr-only"
227:                                                     accept="video/*"
228:                                                     onChange={(e) => {
229:                                                         const file = e.target.files[0];
230:                                                         if (!file) return;
231:                                                         if (!file.type.startsWith('video/')) {
232:                                                             alert('Por favor sube un archivo de video válido');
233:                                                             return;
234:                                                         }
235:                                                         if (file.size > 100 * 1024 * 1024) { // 100MB
236:                                                             alert('El video no puede superar los 100MB');
237:                                                             return;
238:                                                         }
239:                                                         setVideoFile(file);
240:                                                     }}
241:                                                 />
242:                                             </label>
243:                                             <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1">o arrastra y suelta</p>
244:                                         </div>
245:                                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-500 mt-1 font-medium">MP4, WebM, MOV hasta 100MB</p>
246:                                     </div>
247:                                     {videoFile && (
248:                                         <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white/95 dark:bg-slate-900/95 backdrop-blur-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-xl border-2 border-green-500">
249:                                             <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-green-100 text-green-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-2">
250:                                                 <Check size={20} />
251:                                             </div>
252:                                             <p className="text-green-700 font-semibold text-sm max-w-[80%] truncate">
253:                                                 {videoFile.name}
254:                                             </p>
255:                                             <button
256:                                                 onClick={(e) => {
257:                                                     e.preventDefault();
258:                                                     setVideoFile(null);
259:                                                 }}
260:                                                 className="mt-2 text-xs text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 font-medium hover:underline"
261:                                             >
262:                                                 Cambiar archivo
263:                                             </button>
264:                                         </div>
265:                                     )}
266:                                 </div>
267:                                 {uploadProgress > 0 && uploadProgress < 100 && (
268:                                     <div className="mt-3 space-y-1">
269:                                         <div className="flex justify-between text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">
270:                                             <span>Subiendo...</span>
271:                                             <span>{uploadProgress}%</span>
272:                                         </div>
273:                                         <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden">
274:                                             <div
275:                                                 className="bg-blue-600 h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ease-out"
276:                                                 style={{ width: `${uploadProgress}%` }}
277:                                             ></div>
278:                                         </div>
279:                                     </div>
280:                                 )}
281:                             </div>
282:                             {/* Teacher Selection */}
283:                             <div>
284:                                 <label className="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-3">Docente Asesor</label>
285:                                 <div className="relative mb-4">
286:                                     <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-4 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
287:                                         <Search size={18} className="text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500" />
288:                                     </div>
289:                                     <input
290:                                         type="text"
291:                                         value={teacherSearch}
292:                                         onChange={e => setTeacherSearch(e.target.value)}
293:                                         placeholder="Buscar docente..."
294:                                         className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-gray-900 dark:focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-900/10 dark:focus:ring-blue-500/10 transition-all duration-200 text-base dark:text-white"
295:                                     />
296:                                 </div>
297:                                 <div className="border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl max-h-60 overflow-y-auto divide-y divide-gray-100 dark:divide-slate-700/50">
298:                                     {isLoadingResources ? (
299:                                         <div className="p-6 text-center text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-500">Cargando docentes...</div>
300:                                     ) : filteredTeachers.length === 0 ? (
301:                                         <div className="p-6 text-center text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-500">No se encontraron docentes</div>
302:                                     ) : (
303:                                         filteredTeachers.map(teacher => (
304:                                             <div
305:                                                 key={teacher.id}
306:                                                 onClick={() => setForm({
307:                                                     ...form,
308:                                                     docenteId: teacher.id,
309:                                                     materia: teacher.asignatura // Auto-select subject
310:                                                 })}
311:                                                 className={`p-4 cursor-pointer transition-all flex items-center justify-between
312:                                                     ${form.docenteId === teacher.id ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-300'}
313:                                                 `}
314:                                             >
315:                                                 <div>
316:                                                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
317:                                                         {teacher.nombreCompleto}
318:                                                         {teacher.esAltaPrioridad && (
319:                                                             <span className="text-[11px] bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/30 text-amber-800 dark:text-amber-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold">
320:                                                                 ★ Asesor
321:                                                             </span>
322:                                                         )}
323:                                                     </p>
324:                                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1">{teacher.asignatura}</p>
325:                                                 </div>
326:                                                 {form.docenteId === teacher.id && <Check size={18} className="text-gray-900 dark:text-white" />}
327:                                             </div>
328:                                         ))
329:                                     )}
330:                                 </div>
331:                             </div>
332:                         </motion.div>
333:                     ) : (
334:                         <motion.div
335:                             key="step2"
336:                             initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
337:                             animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
338:                             exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
339:                             className="space-y-8 max-w-2xl"
340:                         >
341:                             {/* Student Search */}
342:                             <div className="relative">
343:                                 <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-4 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
344:                                     <Search size={18} className="text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500" />
345:                                 </div>
346:                                 <input
347:                                     type="text"
348:                                     value={studentSearch}
349:                                     onChange={e => setStudentSearch(e.target.value)}
350:                                     placeholder="Busca por nombre o matrícula..."
351:                                     className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-gray-900 dark:focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-900/10 dark:focus:ring-blue-500/10 transition-all duration-200 text-base dark:text-white"
352:                                     autoFocus
353:                                 />
354:                             </div>
355:                             <div className="space-y-4">
356:                                 {/* Leader (Me) */}
357:                                 <div className="p-5 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 flex items-center gap-4">
358:                                     <UserAvatar src={userData?.fotoUrl} name={userData?.nombre} size="md" className="bg-gray-900" />
359:                                     <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
360:                                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white truncate">{userData?.nombre || 'Usuario'}</p>
361:                                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1 font-medium">Líder del Proyecto</p>
362:                                     </div>
363:                                     <span className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black text-xs font-semibold rounded-lg flex-shrink-0">Líder</span>
364:                                 </div>
365:                                 {/* Results */}
366:                                 {filteredStudents.map(student => {
367:                                     const isSelected = form.miembrosIds.includes(student.id);
368:                                     return (
369:                                         <div key={student.id} className="p-5 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:border-gray-300 dark:hover:border-slate-600 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 flex items-center gap-4 transition-all duration-200">
370:                                             <UserAvatar src={student.fotoUrl} name={student.nombreCompleto} size="md" />
371:                                             <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
372:                                                 <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white truncate">
373:                                                     {student.nombreCompleto}
374:                                                 </p>
375:                                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-mono mt-1">
376:                                                     {student.matricula}
377:                                                 </p>
378:                                             </div>
379:                                             <button
380:                                                 onClick={() => toggleStudent(student.id)}
381:                                                 className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition-all flex-shrink-0 ${isSelected
382:                                                     ? 'bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900/30 text-red-700 dark:text-red-400 hover:bg-red-200 dark:hover:bg-red-900/50'
383:                                                     : 'bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-300 hover:border-gray-300 dark:hover:border-slate-600'
384:                                                     }`}
385:                                             >
386:                                                 {isSelected ? 'Quitar' : 'Añadir'}
387:                                             </button>
388:                                         </div>
389:                                     );
390:                                 })}
391:                                 {filteredStudents.length === 0 && (
392:                                     <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-500 text-sm font-medium">
393:                                         No se encontraron alumnos
394:                                     </div>
395:                                 )}
396:                             </div>
397:                         </motion.div>
398:                     )}
399:                 </AnimatePresence>
400:                 {error && (
401:                     <div className="mt-6 p-4 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 border-2 border-red-200 dark:border-red-800/50 text-red-700 dark:text-red-400 text-sm rounded-xl font-medium text-center">
402:                         {error}
403:                     </div>
404:                 )}
405:             </div>
406:             {/* Footer Buttons */}
407:             <div className="px-8 py-6 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-800 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 flex items-center justify-end gap-3">
408:                 {step === 2 && (
409:                     <button
410:                         onClick={() => setStep(1)}
411:                         className="px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-300 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200"
412:                     >
413:                         Atrás
414:                     </button>
415:                 )}
416:                 {step === 1 ? (
417:                     <button
418:                         onClick={nextStep}
419:                         className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-gray-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800 dark:hover:bg-gray-100 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-2 active:scale-95"
420:                     >
421:                         Siguiente
422:                         <ArrowRight size={18} />
423:                     </button>
424:                 ) : (
425:                     <button
426:                         onClick={handleSubmit}
427:                         disabled={loading}
428:                         className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-gray-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800 dark:hover:bg-gray-100 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed active:scale-95"
429:                     >
430:                         {loading ? 'Creando...' : 'Crear Proyecto'}
431:                         <Check size={18} />
432:                     </button>
433:                 )}
434:             </div>
435:         </div>
436:     );
437: }
````

## File: frontend/src/App.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { lazy, Suspense } from 'react';
  2: import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
  3: import { ThemeProvider } from './context/ThemeContext';
  4: import { AuthProvider, useAuth } from './features/auth/hooks/useAuth';
  5: import LoginPage from './features/auth/pages/LoginPage';
  6: import RegisterPage from './features/auth/pages/RegisterPage';
  7: import AuthLayout from './features/auth/components/AuthLayout';
  8: import './index.css';
  9: // ─── Lazy-loaded: cada ruta se descarga solo cuando el usuario navega a ella ───
 10: const GroupSelector = lazy(() => import('./features/auth/components/GroupSelector'));
 11: const DashboardLayout = lazy(() => import('./features/dashboard/components/DashboardLayout'));
 12: const RoleGuard = lazy(() => import('./features/auth/components/RoleGuard'));
 13: const DashboardPage = lazy(() => import('./features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage'));
 14: const ProjectsPage = lazy(() => import('./features/projects/pages/ProjectsPage'));
 15: const TeamPage = lazy(() => import('./features/dashboard/pages/TeamPage'));
 16: const CalendarPage = lazy(() => import('./features/dashboard/pages/CalendarPage'));
 17: const ProfilePage = lazy(() => import('./features/profile/pages/ProfilePage'));
 18: const ProjectEditorPage = lazy(() => import('./features/projects/pages/ProjectEditorPage'));
 19: const ShowcasePage = lazy(() => import('./features/public/pages/ShowcasePage'));
 20: const RankingPage = lazy(() => import('./features/public/pages/RankingPage'));
 21: const AdminPanel = lazy(() => import('./features/admin/pages/AdminPanel'));
 22: const MateriasPanel = lazy(() => import('./features/admin/pages/MateriasPanel'));
 23: const StudentsPanel = lazy(() => import('./features/admin/pages/StudentsPanel'));
 24: const TeachersPanel = lazy(() => import('./features/admin/pages/TeachersPanel'));
 25: const CarrerasPanel = lazy(() => import('./features/admin/pages/CarrerasPanel'));
 26: const EvaluationsPage = lazy(() => import('./features/evaluations/pages/EvaluationsPage'));
 27: // ─── Spinner minimalista entre rutas ───
 28: function RouteSpinner() {
 29:   return (
 30:     <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', background: 'inherit' }}>
 31:       <div style={{ width: 32, height: 32, border: '2px solid rgba(128,128,128,0.3)', borderTopColor: 'currentColor', borderRadius: '50%', animation: 'spin 0.6s linear infinite' }} />
 32:       <style>{`@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg) } }`}</style>
 33:     </div>
 34:   );
 35: }
 36: // Componente de ruta protegida
 37: function ProtectedRoute({ children }) {
 38:   const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useAuth();
 39:   if (loading) {
 40:     return (
 41:       <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#0f1117]">
 42:         <div className="w-8 h-8 border-2 border-gray-400 dark:border-slate-600 border-t-gray-900 dark:border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
 43:       </div>
 44:     );
 45:   }
 46:   return isAuthenticated ? children : <Navigate to="/login" replace />;
 47: }
 48: function App() {
 49:   return (
 50:     <ThemeProvider>
 51:       <AuthProvider>
 52:         <BrowserRouter>
 53:           <Suspense fallback={<RouteSpinner />}>
 54:           <Routes>
 55:             {/* Rutas de Autenticación con fondo 3D persistente */}
 56:             <Route path="/" element={<Navigate to="/login" replace />} />
 57:             <Route element={<AuthLayout />}>
 58:               <Route path="/login" element={<LoginPage />} />
 59:               <Route path="/register" element={<RegisterPage />} />
 60:             </Route>
 61:             {/* Layout Principal con Sidebar */}
 62:             <Route element={
 63:               <ProtectedRoute>
 64:                 <DashboardLayout />
 65:               </ProtectedRoute>
 66:             }>
 67:               <Route path="/dashboard" element={<DashboardPage />} />
 68:               <Route path="/projects" element={<ProjectsPage />} />
 69:               <Route path="/showcase" element={<ShowcasePage />} />
 70:               <Route path="/ranking" element={<RankingPage />} />
 71:               <Route element={<RoleGuard allowedRoles={['Alumno', 'Docente']} />}>
 72:                 <Route path="/team" element={<TeamPage />} />
 73:                 <Route path="/evaluations" element={<EvaluationsPage />} />
 74:               </Route>
 75:               <Route path="/calendar" element={<CalendarPage />} />
 76:               <Route path="/profile" element={<ProfilePage />} />
 77:               <Route path="/profile/:userId" element={<ProfilePage />} />
 78:             </Route>
 79:             <Route
 80:               path="/project/:id/editor"
 81:               element={
 82:                 <ProtectedRoute>
 83:                   <ProjectEditorPage />
 84:                 </ProtectedRoute>
 85:               }
 86:             />
 87:             <Route
 88:               path="/setup"
 89:               element={
 90:                 <ProtectedRoute>
 91:                   <GroupSelector />
 92:                 </ProtectedRoute>
 93:               }
 94:             />
 95:             <Route
 96:               path="/admin"
 97:               element={
 98:                 <ProtectedRoute>
 99:                   <AdminPanel />
100:                 </ProtectedRoute>
101:               }
102:             />
103:             <Route
104:               path="/admin/materias"
105:               element={
106:                 <ProtectedRoute>
107:                   <MateriasPanel />
108:                 </ProtectedRoute>
109:               }
110:             />
111:             <Route
112:               path="/admin/students"
113:               element={
114:                 <ProtectedRoute>
115:                   <StudentsPanel />
116:                 </ProtectedRoute>
117:               }
118:             />
119:             <Route
120:               path="/admin/teachers"
121:               element={
122:                 <ProtectedRoute>
123:                   <TeachersPanel />
124:                 </ProtectedRoute>
125:               }
126:             />
127:             <Route
128:               path="/admin/carreras"
129:               element={
130:                 <ProtectedRoute>
131:                   <CarrerasPanel />
132:                 </ProtectedRoute>
133:               }
134:             />
135:           </Routes>
136:           </Suspense>
137:         </BrowserRouter>
138:       </AuthProvider>
139:     </ThemeProvider>
140:   );
141: }
142: export default App;
````

## File: frontend/src/features/projects/pages/ProjectsPage.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
  2: import { LayoutGrid, Plus, Search } from 'lucide-react';
  3: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
  4: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  5: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  6: import { ProjectCard } from '../components/ProjectCard';
  7: import { ShowcaseCard } from '../../public/components/ShowcaseCard';
  8: import { CreateProjectForm } from '../components/CreateProjectForm';
  9: import { ProjectDetailsModal } from '../components/ProjectDetailsModal';
 10: import { UserAvatar } from '../../../components/UserAvatar';
 11: import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
 12: import { User, Mail, GraduationCap } from 'lucide-react';
 13: export default function ProjectsPage() {
 14:     const { userData } = useAuth();
 15:     const [projects, setProjects] = useState([]);
 16:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 17:     const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
 18:     const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);
 19:     const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null);
 20:     const fetchProjects = useCallback(async () => {
 21:         try {
 22:             let projectsData = [];
 23:             if (userData?.rol === 'Alumno') {
 24:                 // Alumno solo ve su proyecto activo
 25:                 try {
 26:                     const response = await api.get(`/api/projects/my-project?userId=${userData.userId}`);
 27:                     if (response.data) {
 28:                         // Helper para normalizar propiedades PascalCase a camelCase
 29:                         const normalize = (obj) => {
 30:                             if (!obj) return null;
 31:                             const newObj = {};
 32:                             Object.entries(obj).forEach(([key, value]) => {
 33:                                 newObj[key.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + key.slice(1)] = value;
 34:                             });
 35:                             return newObj;
 36:                         };
 37:                         const rawProject = normalize(response.data);
 38:                         const rawMembers = (rawProject.members || rawProject.miembros || []).map(normalize);
 39:                         const rawCanvas = rawProject.canvasBlocks || rawProject.canvas || [];
 40:                         const liderObj = rawMembers.find(m => m.id === rawProject.liderId) || {};
 41:                         // Extraer texto y thumb igual que en endpoints públicos (manejando posible PascalCase en CanvasBlocks)
 42:                         const textBlock = rawCanvas.find(b => (b.type === 'text' || b.Type === 'text') && (b.content || b.Content)?.trim());
 43:                         let extractedDescription = 'Sin descripción disponible. Navega a los detalles para ver más.';
 44:                         if (textBlock && (textBlock.content || textBlock.Content)) {
 45:                             extractedDescription = (textBlock.content || textBlock.Content)
 46:                                 .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '') // remove HTML tags
 47:                                 .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
 48:                                 .trim();
 49:                         }
 50:                         const imageBlock = rawCanvas.find(b => (b.type === 'image' || b.Type === 'image') && (b.content || b.Content));
 51:                         const normalized = {
 52:                             ...rawProject,
 53:                             liderNombre: liderObj.nombre || 'Desconocido',
 54:                             liderFotoUrl: liderObj.fotoUrl || null,
 55:                             thumbnailUrl: rawProject.thumbnailUrl || (imageBlock ? (imageBlock.content || imageBlock.Content) : null),
 56:                             canvas: rawCanvas.map(normalize), // normalizar los bloques también por si Showcase los itera por .content 
 57:                             descripcion: extractedDescription,
 58:                             miembros: rawMembers,
 59:                             puntosTotales: rawProject.puntosTotales || 0,
 60:                             calificacion: rawProject.calificacion || null
 61:                         };
 62:                         projectsData = [normalized];
 63:                     }
 64:                 } catch (e) {
 65:                     if (e.response?.status !== 404) console.error('Error fetching my project:', e);
 66:                     projectsData = [];
 67:                 }
 68:             } else {
 69:                 // Admin/Docente ve todo el grupo
 70:                 const response = await api.get(`/api/projects/group/${userData.grupoId}`);
 71:                 projectsData = response.data;
 72:             }
 73:             setProjects(projectsData);
 74:         } catch (error) {
 75:             console.error('Error fetching projects:', error);
 76:             setProjects([]);
 77:         } finally {
 78:             setLoading(false);
 79:         }
 80:     }, [userData]);
 81:     useEffect(() => {
 82:         if (userData?.grupoId) {
 83:             fetchProjects();
 84:         }
 85:     }, [userData, fetchProjects]);
 86:     const filteredProjects = projects.filter(p =>
 87:         (p.titulo || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
 88:         (p.liderNombre || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
 89:     );
 90:     const isAlumno = userData?.rol === 'Alumno';
 91:     const alumnoProject = isAlumno && projects.length > 0 ? projects[0] : null;
 92:     return (
 93:         <div className="h-full">
 94:             <main className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
 95:                 {/* Header Section */}
 96:                 <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-10">
 97:                     <div>
 98:                         <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight mb-2">Mis Proyectos</h1>
 99:                         <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400 text-base max-w-2xl">Administra y colabora en tus proyectos.</p>
100:                     </div>
101:                     {isAlumno && !alumnoProject && !loading && (
102:                         <button
103:                             onClick={() => setShowCreateModal(true)}
104:                             className="bg-gray-900 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 shadow-sm hover:bg-gray-800 active:bg-gray-950 transition-all"
105:                         >
106:                             <Plus size={16} />
107:                             Nuevo Proyecto
108:                         </button>
109:                     )}
110:                 </div>
111:                 {/* Content */}
112:                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0">
113:                     {/* Search - Solo para Docente/Admin */}
114:                     {!isAlumno && (
115:                         <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-sm mb-6">
116:                             <div className="relative">
117:                                 <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" size={18} />
118:                                 <input
119:                                     type="text"
120:                                     placeholder="Buscar proyectos..."
121:                                     value={searchQuery}
122:                                     onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
123:                                     className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-white border-0 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-200 dark:focus:ring-slate-600 focus:bg-white dark:focus:bg-slate-700 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400 dark:placeholder:text-slate-500"
124:                                 />
125:                             </div>
126:                         </div>
127:                     )}
128:                     {loading ? (
129:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
130:                             {[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
131:                                 <div key={i} className="h-64 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl animate-pulse" />
132:                             ))}
133:                         </div>
134:                     ) : isAlumno ? (
135:                         /* VISTA ALUMNO */
136:                         alumnoProject ? (
137:                             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 pb-6">
138:                                 {/* Proyecto Principal (Hero) */}
139:                                 <div className="lg:col-span-2 flex flex-col">
140:                                     <motion.div
141:                                         layoutId={alumnoProject.id}
142:                                         initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
143:                                         animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
144:                                         transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
145:                                         className="h-full"
146:                                     >
147:                                         <ShowcaseCard
148:                                             project={{ ...alumnoProject, coverUrl: alumnoProject.videoUrl || alumnoProject.thumbnailUrl || null }}
149:                                             onClick={() => setSelectedProject(alumnoProject)}
150:                                         />
151:                                     </motion.div>
152:                                 </div>
153:                                 {/* Sidebar: Perfil y Equipo */}
154:                                 <div className="lg:col-span-1 flex flex-col gap-6">
155:                                     {/* Mini Perfil */}
156:                                     <motion.div
157:                                         initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
158:                                         animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
159:                                         transition={{ duration: 0.3, delay: 0.1 }}
160:                                         className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col items-center text-center"
161:                                     >
162:                                         <UserAvatar
163:                                             src={userData?.fotoUrl}
164:                                             name={userData?.nombre}
165:                                             size="xl"
166:                                             className="mb-4 ring-4 ring-gray-100"
167:                                         />
168:                                         <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mt-3">{userData?.nombre}</h3>
169:                                         <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mb-6">{userData?.carrera || 'Alumno'}</p>
170:                                         <div className="w-full space-y-3 mb-8">
171:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 text-left">
172:                                                 <Mail size={16} className="text-gray-400 shrink-0" />
173:                                                 <span className="truncate">{userData?.email}</span>
174:                                             </div>
175:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 text-left">
176:                                                 <GraduationCap size={16} className="text-gray-400 shrink-0" />
177:                                                 <span className="truncate">Matrícula: {userData?.matricula || 'N/D'}</span>
178:                                             </div>
179:                                         </div>
180:                                         <Link
181:                                             to="/profile"
182:                                             className="w-full py-2.5 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-600 text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-200 font-semibold rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 hover:border-gray-300 transition-all text-sm mt-auto"
183:                                         >
184:                                             Ver Perfil Completo
185:                                         </Link>
186:                                     </motion.div>
187:                                     {/* Equipo */}
188:                                     <motion.div
189:                                         initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
190:                                         animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
191:                                         transition={{ duration: 0.3, delay: 0.2 }}

200:                                                 <div key={member.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-700/50 border border-transparent hover:border-gray-100 dark:hover:border-slate-600 transition-all">
201:                                                     <Link to={`/profile/${member.id}`} className="shrink-0 rounded-full hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-500 transition-all" title="Ver perfil">

212:                                                             {member.rol || 'Miembro'}
213:                                                         </p>
214:                                                     </div>
215:                                                 </div>

218:                                                 <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-center py-6 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-600">
219:                                                     No hay otros miembros en el equipo aún.
220:                                                 </p>
221:                                             )}
222:                                         </div>
223:                                     </motion.div>

233:                                     </div>

236:                                         El proyecto integrador es tu oportunidad para brillar. Agrega a tu equipo, documenta tu progreso y ¡logra una calificación de excelencia!.
237:                                     </p>
238:                                     <button
239:                                         onClick={() => setShowCreateModal(true)}
240:                                         className="bg-gray-900 dark:bg-white dark:text-black text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 shadow-md hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-gray-800 dark:hover:bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-950 transition-all text-lg group"
241:                                     >
242:                                         <Plus size={24} className="group-hover:rotate-90 transition-transform" />
243:                                         Empezar mi Proyecto
244:                                     </button>
245:                                 </div>
246:                             </div>
247:                         )
248:                     ) : (
249:                         // VISTA DOCENTE / ADMIN (Listado normal)
250:                         filteredProjects.length > 0 ? (
251:                             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 pb-6">
252:                                 {filteredProjects.map(project => (
253:                                     <motion.div
254:                                         key={project.id}
255:                                         layoutId={project.id}
256:                                         initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9 }}
257:                                         animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
258:                                         transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
259:                                         className="h-full"
260:                                     >
261:                                         <ProjectCard
262:                                             project={project}
263:                                             onClick={() => setSelectedProject(project)}
264:                                         />
265:                                     </motion.div>
266:                                 ))}
267:                             </div>
268:                         ) : (
269:                             <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center p-12 bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-gray-300 dark:border-slate-600">
270:                                 <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
271:                                     <Search size={24} />
272:                                 </div>
273:                                 <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-1">No se encontraron proyectos</h3>
274:                                 <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">
275:                                     Intenta con otros términos en tu búsqueda.
276:                                 </p>
277:                             </div>
278:                         )
279:                     )}
280:                 </div>
281:             </main>
282:             {/* Modals */}
283:             <AnimatePresence>
284:                 {showCreateModal && (
285:                     <motion.div
286:                         initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
287:                         animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
288:                         exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
289:                         className="fixed inset-0 bg-gray-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4"
290:                         onClick={() => setShowCreateModal(false)}
291:                     >
292:                         <motion.div
293:                             initial={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
294:                             animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
295:                             exit={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
296:                             onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
297:                             className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 overflow-hidden max-h-[85vh] flex flex-col"
298:                         >
299:                             <CreateProjectForm
300:                                 onClose={() => setShowCreateModal(false)}
301:                                 onSuccess={() => {
302:                                     setShowCreateModal(false);
303:                                     fetchProjects();
304:                                 }}
305:                             />
306:                         </motion.div>
307:                     </motion.div>
308:                 )}
309:                 {selectedProject && (
310:                     <motion.div
311:                         initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
312:                         animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
313:                         exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
314:                         className="fixed inset-0 bg-gray-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4"
315:                         onClick={() => setSelectedProject(null)}
316:                     >
317:                         <motion.div
318:                             initial={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
319:                             animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
320:                             exit={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
321:                             onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
322:                             className="bg-black dark:bg-black w-[95vw] md:w-[95vw] lg:w-[95vw] xl:w-[95vw] 2xl:w-[95vw] max-w-none rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 overflow-hidden h-[95vh] flex flex-col"
323:                         >
324:                             <ProjectDetailsModal
325:                                 project={selectedProject}
326:                                 onClose={() => setSelectedProject(null)}
327:                                 onUpdate={fetchProjects}
328:                             />
329:                         </motion.div>
330:                     </motion.div>
331:                 )}
332:             </AnimatePresence>
333:         </div>
334:     );
335: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
  3: import { Plus, LayoutGrid, Search } from 'lucide-react';
  4: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  5: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  6: // Components
  7: import { CreateProjectForm } from '../../projects/components/CreateProjectForm';
  8: import { ProjectCard } from '../../projects/components/ProjectCard';
  9: import { ProjectDetailsModal } from '../../projects/components/ProjectDetailsModal';
 10: import { StudentDashboard } from '../components/StudentDashboard';
 11: import { TeacherDashboard } from '../components/TeacherDashboard';
 12: import { GuestDashboard } from '../components/GuestDashboard';
 13: export default function DashboardPage() {
 14:     const { userData } = useAuth();
 15:     const [projects, setProjects] = useState([]);
 16:     const [groupName, setGroupName] = useState(null);
 17:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 18:     const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);
 19:     const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null);
 20:     const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
 21:     // Animation Variants
 22:     const containerVariants = {
 23:         hidden: { opacity: 0 },
 24:         visible: {
 25:             opacity: 1,
 26:             transition: {
 27:                 staggerChildren: 0.1
 28:             }
 29:         }
 30:     };
 31:     const itemVariants = {
 32:         hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
 33:         visible: {
 34:             opacity: 1,
 35:             y: 0,
 36:             transition: { type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 24 }
 37:         }
 38:     };
 39:     const [suggestedStudents, setSuggestedStudents] = useState([]);
 40:     useEffect(() => {
 41:         if (userData?.rol === 'admin' || userData?.rol === 'SuperAdmin') window.location.href = '/admin';
 42:         if (userData) {
 43:             Promise.all([
 44:                 fetchProjects(),
 45:                 userData.grupoId ? fetchGroupDetails() : Promise.resolve(),
 46:                 userData.rol === 'Alumno' ? fetchSuggestions() : Promise.resolve()
 47:             ]);
 48:         } else {
 49:             setLoading(false);
 50:         }
 51:     }, [userData]);
 52:     // Normalize keys from PascalCase (C# backend) to camelCase
 53:     const normalizePascal = (obj) => {
 54:         if (!obj || typeof obj !== 'object' || Array.isArray(obj)) return obj;
 55:         const newObj = {};
 56:         Object.entries(obj).forEach(([key, value]) => {
 57:             const camelKey = key.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + key.slice(1);
 58:             newObj[camelKey] = value;
 59:         });
 60:         return newObj;
 61:     };
 62:     const fetchGroupDetails = async () => {
 63:         try {
 64:             const response = await api.get(`/api/admin/groups/${userData.grupoId}`);
 65:             setGroupName(response.data.nombre);
 66:         } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching group:', error); }
 67:     };
 68:     const fetchProjects = async () => {
 69:         try {
 70:             let projectsData = [];
 71:             if (userData?.rol === 'Alumno') {
 72:                 try {
 73:                     const response = await api.get(`/api/projects/my-project?userId=${userData.userId}`);
 74:                     if (response.data) {
 75:                         const normalize = (obj) => {
 76:                             if (!obj) return null;
 77:                             const newObj = {};
 78:                             Object.entries(obj).forEach(([key, value]) => {
 79:                                 newObj[key.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + key.slice(1)] = value;
 80:                             });
 81:                             return newObj;
 82:                         };
 83:                         const rawProject = normalize(response.data);
 84:                         const rawMembers = (rawProject.members || rawProject.miembros || []).map(normalize);
 85:                         const rawCanvas = rawProject.canvasBlocks || rawProject.canvas || [];
 86:                         const liderObj = rawMembers.find(m => m.id === rawProject.liderId) || {};
 87:                         const textBlock = rawCanvas.find(b => (b.type === 'text' || b.Type === 'text') && (b.content || b.Content)?.trim());
 88:                         let extractedDescription = 'Sin descripción disponible. Navega a los detalles para ver más.';
 89:                         if (textBlock && (textBlock.content || textBlock.Content)) {
 90:                             extractedDescription = (textBlock.content || textBlock.Content)
 91:                                 .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '')
 92:                                 .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
 93:                                 .trim();
 94:                         }
 95:                         const imageBlock = rawCanvas.find(b => (b.type === 'image' || b.Type === 'image') && (b.content || b.Content));
 96:                         const normalized = {
 97:                             ...rawProject,
 98:                             liderNombre: liderObj.nombre || 'Desconocido',
 99:                             liderFotoUrl: liderObj.fotoUrl || null,
100:                             thumbnailUrl: rawProject.thumbnailUrl || (imageBlock ? (imageBlock.content || imageBlock.Content) : null),
101:                             canvas: rawCanvas.map(normalize),
102:                             descripcion: extractedDescription,
103:                             miembros: rawMembers,
104:                             puntosTotales: rawProject.puntosTotales || 0,
105:                             calificacion: rawProject.calificacion || null
106:                         };
107:                         projectsData = [normalized];
108:                     }
109:                 } catch (e) {
110:                     if (e.response?.status !== 404) console.error('Error fetching my project:', e);
111:                     projectsData = [];
112:                 }
113:             } else if (userData?.rol === 'Docente') {
114:                 const response = await api.get(`/api/projects/teacher/${userData.userId}`);
115:                 // Normalize PascalCase keys from backend to camelCase for ShowcaseCard
116:                 projectsData = (response.data || []).map(p => ({
117:                     ...normalizePascal(p),
118:                     // Ensure canvas is normalized too (if present)
119:                     canvas: (p.CanvasBlocks || p.canvasBlocks || []).map(b => normalizePascal(b)),
120:                 }));
121:             } else if (userData?.grupoId) {
122:                 const response = await api.get(`/api/projects/group/${userData.grupoId}`);
123:                 // Normalize PascalCase keys from backend to camelCase for ShowcaseCard
124:                 projectsData = (response.data || []).map(p => ({
125:                     ...normalizePascal(p),
126:                     canvas: (p.CanvasBlocks || p.canvasBlocks || []).map(b => normalizePascal(b)),
127:                 }));
128:             }
129:             setProjects(projectsData || []);
130:         } catch (error) {
131:             console.error('Error fetching projects:', error);
132:             setProjects([]);
133:         }
134:         finally { setLoading(false); }
135:     };
136:     const fetchSuggestions = async () => {
137:         if (userData?.rol !== 'Alumno') return;
138:         try {
139:             // Reusing the endpoint from TeamPage
140:             const response = await api.get(`/api/teams/available-students?groupId=${userData.grupoId}`);
141:             // Randomize or take first 4 excluding self is handled by backend usually or we filter here
142:             setSuggestedStudents(response.data.filter(s => s.id !== userData.userId).slice(0, 4));
143:         } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching suggestions:', error); }
144:     };
145:     const filteredProjects = projects.filter(p =>
146:         (p.titulo?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
147:         (p.liderNombre?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
148:     );
149:     return (
150:         <div className="h-full">
151:             <main className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
152:                 {/* Header Section */}
153:                 <div className="mb-10">
154:                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight mb-2">
155:                         Dashboard
156:                     </h1>
157:                     <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400 text-base max-w-2xl">
158:                         Gestión integral de proyectos integradores.
159:                     </p>
160:                 </div>
161:                 {loading ? (
162:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
163:                         {[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
164:                             <div key={i} className="h-64 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl animate-pulse" />
165:                         ))}
166:                     </div>
167:                 ) : userData?.rol === 'Alumno' ? (
168:                     <StudentDashboard
169:                         userData={userData}
170:                         project={projects[0]}
171:                         suggestedStudents={suggestedStudents}
172:                         onShowCreateModal={() => setShowCreateModal(true)}
173:                         onProjectClick={() => setSelectedProject(projects[0])}
174:                     />
175:                 ) : userData?.rol === 'Docente' ? (
176:                     <TeacherDashboard
177:                         userData={userData}
178:                         projects={projects}
179:                         groupName={groupName}
180:                         searchQuery={searchQuery}
181:                         onProjectClick={(project) => setSelectedProject(project)}
182:                     />
183:                 ) : (
184:                     <GuestDashboard userData={userData} />
185:                 )}
186:             </main>
187:             {/* Modals */}
188:             <AnimatePresence>
189:                 {showCreateModal && (
190:                     <motion.div
191:                         initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
192:                         animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
193:                         exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
194:                         className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4"
195:                         onClick={() => setShowCreateModal(false)}
196:                     >
197:                         <motion.div
198:                             initial={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
199:                             animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
200:                             exit={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
201:                             onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
202:                             className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] w-full max-w-2xl rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col"
203:                         >
204:                             <CreateProjectForm
205:                                 onClose={() => setShowCreateModal(false)}
206:                                 onSuccess={() => {
207:                                     setShowCreateModal(false);
208:                                     fetchProjects();
209:                                 }}
210:                             />
211:                         </motion.div>
212:                     </motion.div>
213:                 )}
214:                 {selectedProject && (
215:                     <motion.div
216:                         initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
217:                         animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
218:                         exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
219:                         className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4"
220:                         onClick={() => setSelectedProject(null)}
221:                     >
222:                         <motion.div
223:                             initial={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
224:                             animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
225:                             exit={{ scale: 0.95, opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
226:                             onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
227:                             className="bg-black dark:bg-black w-[95vw] md:w-[95vw] lg:w-[95vw] xl:w-[95vw] 2xl:w-[95vw] max-w-none rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 overflow-hidden h-[95vh] flex flex-col"
228:                         >
229:                             <ProjectDetailsModal
230:                                 project={selectedProject}
231:                                 onClose={() => setSelectedProject(null)}
232:                                 onUpdate={fetchProjects}
233:                             />
234:                         </motion.div>
235:                     </motion.div>
236:                 )}
237:             </AnimatePresence>
238:         </div>
239:     );
240: }
````

  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { Search, Filter, Rocket, MoreHorizontal } from 'lucide-react';

  8: export default function ShowcasePage() {
  9:     const [projects, setProjects] = useState([]);
 10:     const [filteredProjects, setFilteredProjects] = useState([]);
 11:     const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null);
 12:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 13:     const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
 14:     const [selectedStack, setSelectedStack] = useState(null);
 15:     const [allStacks, setAllStacks] = useState([]);
 16:     const [isSearchExpanded, setIsSearchExpanded] = useState(false);
 17:     useEffect(() => {
 18:         fetchPublicProjects();
 19:     }, []);
 20:     useEffect(() => {
 21:         filterProjects();
 22:     }, [searchTerm, selectedStack, projects]);
 23:     const fetchPublicProjects = async () => {
 24:         try {
 25:             const response = await api.get('/api/projects/public');
 26:             setProjects(response.data);
 27:             // Extract unique stacks
 28:             const stacks = new Set();
 29:             response.data.forEach(p => {
 30:                 p.stackTecnologico?.forEach(tech => stacks.add(tech));
 31:             });
 32:             setAllStacks(Array.from(stacks).sort());
 33:         } catch (error) {
 34:             console.error('Error fetching public projects:', error);
 35:         } finally {
 36:             setLoading(false);
 37:         }
 38:     };
 39:     const filterProjects = () => {
 40:         let filtered = projects;
 41:         if (searchTerm) {
 42:             filtered = filtered.filter(p =>
 43:                 p.titulo?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||

 45:             );
 46:         }

 49:                 p.stackTecnologico?.includes(selectedStack)
 50:             );

 53:     };

 75:                                 </div>
 76:                             )}
 77:                             <div 
 78:                                 onClick={() => !isSearchExpanded && setIsSearchExpanded(true)}
 79:                                 className={`flex items-center bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#1a1d27] border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-md cursor-pointer transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1)] overflow-hidden ${

 89:                                         autoFocus

 94:                                         placeholder="Buscar proyecto..."
 95:                                         className="w-full bg-transparent border-none focus:outline-none text-base font-semibold placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-slate-500 dark:text-white"
