````javascript
 97:                                 )}
 98:                             </div>
 99:                         </div>
100:                     </div>

106:                 <div className="mb-10 overflow-x-auto pb-4 scrollbar-hide">
````

## File: frontend/src/features/public/components/ShowcaseCard.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useRef } from 'react';
  2: import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
  3: import { Play, Users, ExternalLink, Edit, Star, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Image as ImageIcon, Trophy, X, Palette, Zap, Airplay, Target } from 'lucide-react';
  4: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  5: import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
  6: import { UserAvatar } from '../../../components/UserAvatar';
  7: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  8: import { FONTS } from '../../projects/constants/editorFonts';
  9: // Safely reads the font of the first text block in the canvas — returns undefined if none.
 10: function getProjectTitleFont(project) {
 11:     try {
 12:         const TEXT_TYPES = ['text', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'quote', 'bullet', 'todo'];
 13:         const firstTextBlock = (project.canvas || []).find(b => TEXT_TYPES.includes(b.type));
 14:         const font = firstTextBlock?.metadata?.fontFamily;
 15:         // Validate it's one of our known fonts
 16:         if (font && FONTS.some(f => f.value === font)) return font;
 17:     } catch (_) { }
 18:     return undefined;
 19: }
 20: export function ShowcaseCard({ project, onClick }) {
 21:     const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);
 22:     const [currentSlide, setCurrentSlide] = useState(0);
 23:     const { userData } = useAuth();
 24:     const navigate = useNavigate();
 25:     const videoRef = useRef(null);
 26:     const lightboxVideoRef = useRef(null);
 27:     const [isLightboxOpen, setIsLightboxOpen] = useState(false);
 28:     // Rubric Voting State
 29:     const CRITERIA = [
 30:         { key: 'uiux',        label: 'UI/UX',       Icon: Palette,  color: 'indigo',  activeColor: '#6366f1', hoverBg: 'hover:bg-indigo-50 dark:hover:bg-indigo-900/20' },
 31:         { key: 'inovacion',   label: 'Innovación',  Icon: Zap,      color: 'amber',   activeColor: '#f59e0b', hoverBg: 'hover:bg-amber-50 dark:hover:bg-amber-900/20' },
 32:         { key: 'presentacion',label: 'Presentación',Icon: Airplay,  color: 'sky',     activeColor: '#0ea5e9', hoverBg: 'hover:bg-sky-50 dark:hover:bg-sky-900/20' },
 33:         { key: 'impacto',     label: 'Impacto',     Icon: Target,   color: 'emerald', activeColor: '#10b981', hoverBg: 'hover:bg-emerald-50 dark:hover:bg-emerald-900/20' },
 34:     ];
 35:     const getInitialRubric = () => {
 36:         if (userData?.userId && project.votantes?.[userData.userId] && typeof project.votantes[userData.userId] === 'object') {
 37:             const v = project.votantes[userData.userId];
 38:             return { uiux: v.ui_ux || 0, inovacion: v.inovacion || 0, presentacion: v.presentacion || 0, impacto: v.impacto || 0 };
 39:         }
 40:         return { uiux: 0, inovacion: 0, presentacion: 0, impacto: 0 };
 41:     };
 42:     const [rubric, setRubric]           = useState(getInitialRubric);
 43:     const [hoverRubric, setHoverRubric] = useState({ uiux: 0, inovacion: 0, presentacion: 0, impacto: 0 });
 44:     const [isVoting, setIsVoting]       = useState(false);
 45:     const [voteSuccess, setVoteSuccess] = useState(false);
 46:     const [activeCriteria, setActiveCriteria] = useState(null);
 47:     const isOwner = userData?.userId === project.liderId;
 48:     // Read font from first text block in canvas (safe, no layout changes)
 49:     const titleFont = getProjectTitleFont(project);
 50:     // 2. Gather Media Items (Video + Thumbnail + Canvas Images)
 51:     const mediaItems = [];
 52:     // Add Video Pitch if exists
 53:     if (project.videoUrl) {
 54:         mediaItems.push({ type: 'video', url: project.videoUrl, thumbnail: project.thumbnailUrl });
 55:     }
 56:     // Add Project Thumbnail (if not used as video thumb) OR just as an image
 57:     if (project.thumbnailUrl && !mediaItems.some(item => item.url === project.thumbnailUrl)) {
 58:         mediaItems.push({ type: 'image', url: project.thumbnailUrl });
 59:     }
 60:     // Add Images and Videos from Canvas
 61:     if (project.canvas) {
 62:         const canvasMedia = project.canvas
 63:             .filter(b => (b.type === 'image' || b.type === 'video') && b.content && b.content !== project.thumbnailUrl)
 64:             .map(b => ({ type: b.type, url: b.content }));
 65:         mediaItems.push(...canvasMedia);
 66:     }
 67:     // Default Placeholder if empty
 68:     if (mediaItems.length === 0) {
 69:         mediaItems.push({ type: 'placeholder' });
 70:     }
 71:     const currentMedia = mediaItems[currentSlide];
 72:     // Carousel Navigation
 73:     const nextSlide = (e) => {
 74:         e.stopPropagation();
 75:         setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev + 1) % mediaItems.length);
 76:         setIsPlaying(false); // Stop video on slide change
 77:     };
 78:     const prevSlide = (e) => {
 79:         e.stopPropagation();
 80:         setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev - 1 + mediaItems.length) % mediaItems.length);
 81:         setIsPlaying(false);
 82:     };
 83:     // Handle Rubric Vote
 84:     const handleRubricVote = async (e, criteriaKey, stars) => {
 85:         e.stopPropagation();
 86:         if (!userData) return;
 87:         if (isOwner) return;
 88:         const newRubric = { ...rubric, [criteriaKey]: stars };
 89:         setRubric(newRubric);
 90:         // Only submit if all criteria have been rated
 91:         const allRated = Object.values(newRubric).every(v => v > 0);
 92:         if (!allRated || isVoting) return;
 93:         setIsVoting(true);
 94:         try {
 95:             await api.post(`/api/projects/${project.id}/rate`, {
 96:                 userId: userData.userId,
 97:                 uIUX: newRubric.uiux,
 98:                 inovacion: newRubric.inovacion,
 99:                 presentacion: newRubric.presentacion,
100:                 impacto: newRubric.impacto,
101:             });
102:             setVoteSuccess(true);
103:             setTimeout(() => setVoteSuccess(false), 2000);
104:         } catch (error) {
105:             console.error('Error rating project:', error);
106:         } finally {
107:             setIsVoting(false);
108:         }
109:     };
110:     // 3. Determine Description
111:     const description = project.descripcion || 'Sin descripción disponible. Navega a los detalles para ver más.';
112:     // 4. Handle Edit Click
113:     const handleEditClick = (e) => {
114:         e.stopPropagation();
115:         navigate(`/project/${project.id}/editor`);
116:     };
117:     return (
118:         <div className="bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden flex flex-col mb-12 group group-hover:-translate-y-1 hover:ring-1 hover:ring-indigo-100 dark:hover:ring-slate-600 w-full mx-auto">
119:             {/* --- 1. Header: User & Status (Instagram Style Top) --- */}
120:             <div className="p-4 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-50 dark:border-slate-700/50 bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] z-10">
121:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
122:                     <div onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); navigate(`/profile/${project.liderId}`); }} className="cursor-pointer hover:ring-2 hover:ring-indigo-200 rounded-full transition-all shrink-0">
123:                         <UserAvatar src={project.liderFotoUrl} name={project.liderNombre} size="md" className="border border-indigo-50 shadow-sm" />
124:                     </div>
125:                     <div className="flex flex-col cursor-pointer hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); navigate(`/profile/${project.liderId}`); }}>
126:                         <h4 className="text-sm font-bold leading-none truncate max-w-[180px] dark:text-white" title={project.liderNombre}>
127:                             {project.liderNombre || 'Desconocido'}
128:                         </h4>
129:                         <span className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1 font-medium">
130:                             {new Date(project.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}
131:                         </span>
132:                     </div>
133:                 </div>
134:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
135:                     {/* Status Badge */}
136:                     <span className={`px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider ${project.estado === 'Completado' ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-200/50' :
137:                         project.estado === 'Activo' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-200/50' :
138:                             'bg-gray-50 text-gray-500 border border-gray-200/50'
139:                         }`}>
140:                         {project.estado}
141:                     </span>
142:                     {isOwner && (
143:                         <button
144:                             onClick={handleEditClick}
145:                             className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-50 rounded-full transition-all"
146:                             title="Editar Proyecto"
147:                         >
148:                             <Edit size={16} />
149:                         </button>
150:                     )}
151:                 </div>
152:             </div>
153:             {/* --- 2. Media Area (Adapted with Efecto Cine) --- */}
154:             <div
155:                 className="w-full bg-black relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden min-h-[300px] max-h-[85vh] group/media"
156:                 onMouseEnter={() => {
157:                     if (currentMedia.type === 'video') {
158:                         setIsPlaying(true);
159:                         videoRef.current?.play().catch(() => { });
160:                     }
161:                 }}
162:                 onMouseLeave={() => {
163:                     if (currentMedia.type === 'video') {
164:                         setIsPlaying(false);
165:                         videoRef.current?.pause();
166:                     }
167:                 }}
168:             >
169:                 {/* Fondo Difuminado (Efecto Cine) */}
170:                 {currentMedia.url && currentMedia.type !== 'placeholder' && (
171:                     currentMedia.type === 'video' ? (
172:                         <video
173:                             src={currentMedia.url}
174:                             className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover scale-[1.2] opacity-40 blur-[50px] z-0 pointer-events-none"
175:                             autoPlay
176:                             muted
177:                             loop
178:                             playsInline
179:                         />
180:                     ) : (
181:                         <img
182:                             src={currentMedia.url}
183:                             className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover scale-[1.2] opacity-40 blur-[50px] z-0 pointer-events-none filter"
184:                             alt=""
185:                         />
186:                     )
187:                 )}
188:                 {/* Media Content */}
189:                 {currentMedia.type === 'video' ? (
190:                     <div
191:                         className="w-full relative z-10 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer bg-transparent"
192:                         title="Clic para ampliar"
193:                         onClick={(e) => {
194:                             e.stopPropagation();
195:                             setIsLightboxOpen(true);
196:                         }}
197:                     >
198:                         <video
199:                             ref={videoRef}
200:                             src={currentMedia.url}
201:                             loop
202:                             muted
203:                             playsInline
204:                             className={`w-full max-h-[85vh] object-contain transition-opacity duration-500 ${isPlaying ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-70'}`}
205:                         />
206:                         {/* Play Overlay (Only visible when paused) */}
207:                         {!isPlaying && (
208:                             <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
209:                                 <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border border-white/30 shadow-xl transition-all duration-300">
210:                                     <Play fill="white" className="text-white ml-1" size={32} />
211:                                 </div>
212:                             </div>
213:                         )}
214:                         <span className="absolute bottom-4 left-4 px-2.5 py-1 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-md rounded-md text-white text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border border-white/20 shadow-lg pointer-events-none z-10">
215:                             Video Pitch
216:                         </span>
217:                     </div>
218:                 ) : currentMedia.type === 'image' ? (
219:                     <div
220:                         className="w-full relative z-10 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group/img bg-transparent"
221:                         title="Clic para ampliar"
222:                         onClick={(e) => {
223:                             e.stopPropagation();
224:                             setIsLightboxOpen(true);
225:                         }}
226:                     >
227:                         <img
228:                             src={currentMedia.url}
229:                             alt={project.titulo}
230:                             className="w-full max-h-[85vh] object-contain drop-shadow-xl"
231:                         />
232:                     </div>
233:                 ) : (
234:                     // Placeholder
235:                     <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-500">
236:                         <ImageIcon size={48} className="mb-2 opacity-50" />
237:                         <span className="text-xs font-medium">Sin contenido visual</span>
238:                     </div>
239:                 )}
240:                 {/* Carousel Controls (Only if multiple items) */}
241:                 {mediaItems.length > 1 && (
242:                     <>
243:                         <button
244:                             onClick={prevSlide}
245:                             className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-2 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md text-white rounded-full hover:bg-black/70 hover:scale-110 transition-all opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 z-30 shadow-lg cursor-pointer"
246:                         >
247:                             <ChevronLeft size={20} />
248:                         </button>
249:                         <button
250:                             onClick={nextSlide}
251:                             className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-2 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md text-white rounded-full hover:bg-black/70 hover:scale-110 transition-all opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 z-30 shadow-lg cursor-pointer"
252:                         >
253:                             <ChevronRight size={20} />
254:                         </button>
255:                         {/* Dots Indicator */}
256:                         <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-1.5 z-30 bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-white/10">
257:                             {mediaItems.map((_, idx) => (
258:                                 <div
259:                                     key={idx}
260:                                     className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full shadow-sm transition-all duration-300 ${idx === currentSlide ? 'bg-white scale-125' : 'bg-white/40'}`}
261:                                 />
262:                             ))}
263:                         </div>
264:                     </>
265:                 )}
266:                 {/* Ranking Badge (Total Points) - Absolute Top Right */}
267:                 {project.puntosTotales > 0 && (
268:                     <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 z-30 bg-yellow-400/95 backdrop-blur-md text-yellow-900 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full shadow-xl flex items-center gap-1.5 font-bold text-xs border border-yellow-300/50">
269:                         <Trophy size={16} fill="currentColor" />
270:                         <span>{project.puntosTotales} pts</span>
271:                     </div>
272:                 )}
273:             </div>
274:             {/* --- 3. Body & Footer (Info Section) --- */}
275:             <div className="p-5 flex flex-col flex-1 bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27]">
276:                 {/* Title & Description */}
277:                 <div className="mb-4">
278:                     <h3
279:                         onClick={onClick}
280:                         className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white leading-snug mb-2 cursor-pointer hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors line-clamp-1"
281:                         style={titleFont ? { fontFamily: titleFont } : undefined}
282:                     >
283:                         {project.titulo || 'Sin Título'}
284:                     </h3>
285:                     <p onClick={onClick} className="text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed line-clamp-2 cursor-pointer">
286:                         {description}
287:                     </p>
288:                 </div>
289:                 {/* Tech Stack */}
290:                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-5 mt-auto">
291:                     {project.stackTecnologico?.slice(0, 3).map((tech, i) => (
292:                         <span key={i} className="px-2.5 py-1 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 text-[11px] font-semibold rounded-md shadow-sm">
293:                             {tech}
294:                         </span>
295:                     ))}
296:                     {(project.stackTecnologico?.length || 0) > 3 && (
297:                         <span className="px-2 py-1 text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 text-[11px] font-medium bg-gray-50/50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-md">
298:                             +{project.stackTecnologico.length - 3}
299:                         </span>
300:                     )}
301:                 </div>
302:                 {/* Bottom Action Row */}
303:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-gray-50 dark:border-slate-700/50">
304:                     {/* Rubric Voting Panel - Only if NOT owner */}
305:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
306:                         {/* Calificación oficial */}
307:                         {project.calificacion !== null && project.calificacion !== undefined && (
308:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-indigo-700 font-bold text-xs bg-indigo-50 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md border border-indigo-100" title="Calificación Oficial">
309:                                 <span>Calificación: {project.calificacion}</span>
310:                             </div>
311:                         )}
312:                         {!isOwner && (
313:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap" onMouseLeave={() => setHoverRubric({ uiux: 0, inovacion: 0, presentacion: 0, impacto: 0 })}>
314:                                 {CRITERIA.map(({ key, label, Icon, activeColor, hoverBg }) => {
315:                                     const current = hoverRubric[key] || rubric[key];
316:                                     const isRated = rubric[key] > 0;
317:                                     const isActive = activeCriteria === key;
318:                                     return (
319:                                         <div 
320:                                             key={key} 
321:                                             className={`flex items-center transition-all duration-300 rounded-full ${
322:                                                 isActive 
323:                                                     ? 'bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 pr-3 py-1 pl-1' 
324:                                                     : 'border border-transparent'
325:                                             }`}
326:                                         >
327:                                             {/* Trigger Icon */}
328:                                             <button
329:                                                 onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setActiveCriteria(isActive ? null : key); }}
330:                                                 className={`p-1.5 rounded-full transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-110 flex items-center gap-1.5 ${hoverBg} ${isRated && !isActive ? 'scale-110' : ''}`}
331:                                                 title={label}
332:                                                 style={isRated || isActive ? { color: activeColor } : {}}
333:                                             >
334:                                                 <Icon
335:                                                     size={18}
336:                                                     fill={isRated ? activeColor : 'none'}
337:                                                     stroke={isRated || isActive ? activeColor : 'currentColor'}
338:                                                     className={isRated || isActive ? '' : 'text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500'}
339:                                                 />
340:                                                 {isActive && (
341:                                                     <span className="text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wider uppercase" style={{ color: activeColor }}>
342:                                                         {label}
343:                                                     </span>
344:                                                 )}
345:                                             </button>
346:                                             {/* Estrellas Inline */}
347:                                             {isActive && (
348:                                                 <div className="flex gap-0.5 items-center ml-1 border-l border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 pl-2 animate-fade-in">
349:                                                     {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map(star => (
350:                                                         <button
351:                                                             key={star}
352:                                                             onMouseEnter={() => setHoverRubric(h => ({ ...h, [key]: star }))}
353:                                                             onMouseLeave={() => setHoverRubric(h => ({ ...h, [key]: 0 }))}
354:                                                             onClick={(e) => {
355:                                                                 handleRubricVote(e, key, star);
356:                                                                 // Opcional: colapsar después de votar
357:                                                                 // setTimeout(() => setActiveCriteria(null), 500); 
358:                                                             }}
359:                                                             disabled={isVoting}
360:                                                             className="transition-all duration-150 hover:scale-125 p-0.5"
361:                                                         >
362:                                                             <Star
363:                                                                 size={16}
364:                                                                 fill={current >= star ? activeColor : 'none'}
365:                                                                 stroke={current >= star ? activeColor : '#cbd5e1'}
366:                                                                 className="opacity-90 hover:opacity-100"
367:                                                             />
368:                                                         </button>
369:                                                     ))}
370:                                                     {rubric[key] > 0 && (
371:                                                         <span className="text-[10px] font-bold ml-1.5" style={{ color: activeColor }}>{rubric[key]}/5</span>
372:                                                     )}
373:                                                 </div>
374:                                             )}
375:                                         </div>
376:                                     );
377:                                 })}
378:                                 {/* Éxito de voto */}
379:                                 {voteSuccess && (
380:                                     <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-emerald-500 animate-pulse ml-1">Votado ✓</span>
381:                                 )}
382:                             </div>
383:                         )}
384:                     </div>
385:                     <button
386:                         onClick={onClick}
387:                         className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all shadow-sm group/btn hover:shadow-md active:scale-95"
388:                     >
389:                         Ver más
390:                         <ExternalLink size={14} className="group-hover/btn:translate-x-1 group-hover/btn:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform" />
391:                     </button>
392:                 </div>
393:             </div>
394:             {isLightboxOpen && createPortal(
395:                 <div
396:                     className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-md group/lightbox"
397:                     onClick={() => setIsLightboxOpen(false)}
398:                 >
399:                     {/* Close Button */}
400:                     <button
401:                         className="absolute top-6 right-6 p-3 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white transition-all z-50 cursor-pointer opacity-0 group-hover/lightbox:opacity-100 duration-300"
402:                         onClick={(e) => {
403:                             e.stopPropagation();
404:                             setIsLightboxOpen(false);
405:                         }}
406:                     >
407:                         <X size={32} />
408:                     </button>
409:                     {/* Navigation Arrows (if multiple media) */}
410:                     {mediaItems.length > 1 && (
411:                         <>
412:                             <button
413:                                 onClick={(e) => {
414:                                     e.stopPropagation();
415:                                     setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev - 1 + mediaItems.length) % mediaItems.length);
416:                                 }}
417:                                 className="absolute left-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-4 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white transition-all z-50 cursor-pointer"
418:                             >
419:                                 <ChevronLeft size={36} />
420:                             </button>
421:                             <button
422:                                 onClick={(e) => {
423:                                     e.stopPropagation();
424:                                     setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev + 1) % mediaItems.length);
425:                                 }}
426:                                 className="absolute right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-4 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white transition-all z-50 cursor-pointer"
427:                             >
428:                                 <ChevronRight size={36} />
429:                             </button>
430:                         </>
431:                     )}
432:                     {/* Lightbox Content */}
433:                     <div className="relative w-[90vw] h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
434:                         {currentMedia.type === 'video' ? (
435:                             <video
436:                                 src={currentMedia.url}
437:                                 controls
438:                                 autoPlay
439:                                 className="w-full h-full object-contain drop-shadow-2xl rounded-lg pointer-events-auto"
440:                             />
441:                         ) : currentMedia.type === 'image' ? (
442:                             <img
443:                                 src={currentMedia.url}
444:                                 alt="Contenido Ampliado"
445:                                 className="w-full h-full object-contain drop-shadow-2xl rounded-lg pointer-events-auto"
446:                             />
447:                         ) : null}
448:                     </div>
449:                     {/* Lightbox Dots Indicator */}
450:                     {mediaItems.length > 1 && (
451:                         <div className="absolute bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-2 z-50 bg-black/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/10">
452:                             {mediaItems.map((_, idx) => (
453:                                 <div
454:                                     key={idx}
455:                                     className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${idx === currentSlide ? 'bg-white scale-125' : 'bg-white/30 cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/60'}`}
456:                                     onClick={(e) => {
457:                                         e.stopPropagation();
458:                                         setCurrentSlide(idx);
459:                                     }}
460:                                 />
461:                             ))}
462:                         </div>
463:                     )}
464:                 </div>,
465:                 document.body
466:             )}
467:         </div>
468:     );
469: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/Sidebar.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { NavLink } from 'react-router-dom';
  2: import { FolderOpen, Users, Calendar, LogOut, LayoutDashboard, Rocket, Trophy, X, Moon, Sun } from 'lucide-react';
  3: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  4: import { UserAvatar } from '../../../components/UserAvatar';
  5: import { useTheme } from '../../../context/ThemeContext';
  6: export function Sidebar({ isOpen, onClose }) {
  7:   const { userData, logout } = useAuth();
  8:   const { isDark, toggleTheme } = useTheme();
  9:   const menuGroups = [
 10:     {
 11:       title: 'PRINCIPAL',
 12:       items: [
 13:         { label: 'Dashboard', path: '/dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard },
 14:         { label: 'Galería', path: '/showcase', icon: Rocket },
 15:         { label: 'Ranking', path: '/ranking', icon: Trophy },
 16:       ]
 17:     },
 18:     {
 19:       title: 'GESTIÓN',
 20:       items: [
 21:         // Items exclusivos para Estudiantes (y Admins para debug)
 22:         ...(['Alumno', 'Admin', 'admin', 'SuperAdmin'].includes(userData?.rol) ? [
 23:           { label: 'Mis Proyectos', path: '/projects', icon: FolderOpen },
 24:           { label: 'Mi Equipo', path: '/team', icon: Users },
 25:         ] : []),
 26:         // Items exclusivos para Docentes
 27:         ...(userData?.rol === 'Docente' ? [
 28:           { label: 'Evaluaciones', path: '/evaluations', icon: FolderOpen },
 29:         ] : []),
 30:       ]
 31:     },
 32:     ...(userData?.rol === 'admin' || userData?.rol === 'SuperAdmin' ? [{
 33:       title: 'ADMINISTRACIÓN',
 34:       items: [
 35:         { label: 'Panel Admin', path: '/admin', icon: Users }
 36:       ]
 37:     }] : [])
 38:   ];
 39:   return (
 40:     <>
 41:       {/* Mobile Overlay Background */}
 42:       {isOpen && (
 43:         <div
 44:           className="lg:hidden fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 transition-opacity"
 45:           onClick={onClose}
 46:         />
 47:       )}
 48:       {/* Sidebar Container */}
 49:       <aside
 50:         className={`
 51:           fixed lg:relative inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 flex flex-col bg-white dark:bg-[#151821] border-r border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 font-sans h-full shrink-0
 52:           transition-all duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)]
 53:           /* Mobile classes */
 54:           ${isOpen ? 'translate-x-0 w-72' : '-translate-x-full w-72'} 
 55:           /* Desktop classes: Collapsed by default (w-20), Expanded on hover (w-72) */
 56:           lg:translate-x-0 lg:w-20 lg:hover:w-72 group
 57:         `}
 58:       >
 59:         {/* Header / Logo Brand */}
 60:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-6 lg:p-4 lg:group-hover:p-6 transition-all duration-300 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 overflow-hidden shrink-0">
 61:           <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 62:             {/* Logo Icon */}
 63:             <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-2xl p-1 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 overflow-hidden shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center">
 64:               <img
 65:                 src="/byfrost-icon.png"
 66:                 alt="Byfrost Logo"
 67:                 className="w-full h-full object-cover rounded-xl"
 68:               />
 69:             </div>
 70:             {/* Text logo (hidden when collapsed on desktop, visible on hover/mobile) */}
 71:             <div className="transition-opacity duration-300 lg:opacity-0 lg:group-hover:opacity-100 whitespace-nowrap">
 72:               <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white leading-tight">
 73:                 Byfrost®
 74:               </h1>
 75:               <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-medium mt-0.5">Repositorio de Proyectos</p>
 76:             </div>
 77:           </div>
 78:           {/* Mobile Close Button */}
 79:           <button
 80:             onClick={onClose}
 81:             className="lg:hidden p-2 text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700/50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
 82:           >
 83:             <X size={20} />
 84:           </button>
 85:         </div>
 86:         {/* Navigation */}
 87:         <nav className="flex-1 px-3 py-6 space-y-8 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden custom-scrollbar">
 88:           {menuGroups.map((group, idx) => (
 89:             <div key={idx}>
 90:               {/* Group Title - hidden on desktop collapsed, visible on hover/mobile */}
 91:               <h3 className="px-5 mb-3 text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest transition-opacity duration-300 lg:opacity-0 lg:group-hover:opacity-100 h-4 overflow-hidden">
 92:                 <span className="lg:hidden lg:group-hover:inline-block whitespace-nowrap">{group.title}</span>
 93:               </h3>
 94:               <div className="space-y-1">
 95:                 {group.items.map((item) => {
 96:                   const Icon = item.icon;
 97:                   return (
 98:                     <NavLink
 99:                       key={item.path}
100:                       to={item.path}
101:                       onClick={() => {
102:                         // Close sidebar on mobile when a link is clicked
103:                         if (window.innerWidth < 1024) onClose();
104:                       }}
105:                       className={({ isActive }) => `
106:                         flex items-center relative transition-all duration-300 group/navitem rounded-xl
107:                         /* Mobile Padding */
108:                         px-3 py-2.5
109:                         /* Desktop Collapsed */
110:                         lg:px-1 lg:py-3 lg:justify-center
111:                         /* Desktop Expanded */
112:                         lg:group-hover:px-4 lg:group-hover:py-3 lg:group-hover:justify-start
113:                         ${isActive
114:                           ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700/50 text-gray-900 dark:text-white font-semibold'
115:                           : 'text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-700/30'
116:                         }
117:                       `}
118:                       // Tooltip for collapsed state
119:                       title={item.label}
120:                     >
121:                       {({ isActive }) => (
122:                         <>
123:                           <div className={`flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 transition-all duration-300
124:                             /* Mobile Size */
125:                             w-8 h-8 rounded-lg
126:                             /* Desktop Collapsed Size */
127:                             lg:w-11 lg:h-11 lg:rounded-xl
128:                             /* Desktop Expanded Size */
129:                             lg:group-hover:w-9 lg:group-hover:h-9 lg:group-hover:rounded-lg
130:                             ${isActive ? 'text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 group-hover/navitem:text-gray-700 dark:group-hover/navitem:text-white'}
131:                           `}>
132:                             <Icon
133:                               className="transition-all duration-300 w-[18px] h-[18px] lg:w-[22px] lg:h-[22px] lg:group-hover:w-5 lg:group-hover:h-5 group-hover/navitem:scale-125 group-hover/navitem:animate-[icon-shake_0.4s_ease-out]"
134:                               strokeWidth={isActive ? 2.5 : 2}
135:                             />
136:                           </div>
137:                           {/* Label Text */}
138:                           <div className={`
139:                             whitespace-nowrap transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden flex items-center
140:                             /* Mobile */
141:                             ml-3
142:                             /* Desktop Collapsed */
143:                             lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0 lg:ml-0
144:                             /* Desktop Expanded */
145:                             lg:group-hover:max-w-xs lg:group-hover:opacity-100 lg:group-hover:ml-3
146:                           `}>
147:                             <span className={isActive ? 'text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300'}>
148:                               {item.label}
149:                             </span>
150:                           </div>
151:                         </>
152:                       )}
153:                     </NavLink>
154:                   );
155:                 })}
156:               </div>
157:             </div>
158:           ))}
159:         </nav>
160:         {/* Footer with User Info + Theme Toggle */}
161:         <div className="p-3 shrink-0 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 py-4">
162:           {/* Theme Toggle Button */}
163:           <button
164:             onClick={toggleTheme}
165:             title={isDark ? 'Cambiar a modo claro' : 'Cambiar a modo oscuro'}
166:             className="w-full flex items-center transition-all duration-300 group/theme rounded-xl text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700/40 mb-2
167:               /* Mobile Padding */
168:               p-3
169:               /* Desktop Collapsed */
170:               lg:p-3 lg:justify-center
171:               /* Desktop Expanded */
172:               lg:group-hover:px-4 lg:group-hover:justify-start
173:             "
174:           >
175:             <div className="shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300
176:               /* Mobile */
177:               w-6 h-6
178:               /* Desktop Collapsed */
179:               lg:w-8 lg:h-8
180:               /* Desktop Expanded */
181:               lg:group-hover:w-6 lg:group-hover:h-6
182:             ">
183:               {isDark
184:                 ? <Sun className="transition-all duration-300 group-hover/theme:scale-125 group-hover/theme:animate-[icon-shake_0.4s_ease-out] w-[18px] h-[18px] lg:w-5 lg:h-5 lg:group-hover:w-[18px] lg:group-hover:h-[18px] text-amber-400" strokeWidth={2} />
185:                 : <Moon className="transition-all duration-300 group-hover/theme:scale-125 group-hover/theme:animate-[icon-shake_0.4s_ease-out] w-[18px] h-[18px] lg:w-5 lg:h-5 lg:group-hover:w-[18px] lg:group-hover:h-[18px]" strokeWidth={2} />
186:               }
187:             </div>
188:             <div className={`
189:               transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden flex items-center
190:               /* Mobile */
191:               ml-3
192:               /* Desktop Collapsed */
193:               lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0 lg:ml-0
194:               /* Desktop Expanded */
195:               lg:group-hover:max-w-xs lg:group-hover:opacity-100 lg:group-hover:ml-3
196:             `}>
197:               <span className="text-xs font-bold whitespace-nowrap">{isDark ? 'Modo Claro' : 'Modo Oscuro'}</span>
198:             </div>
199:           </button>
200:           {/* User Profile Link */}
201:           <NavLink
202:             to="/profile"
203:             onClick={() => { if (window.innerWidth < 1024) onClose(); }}
204:             className="bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl border border-slate-800 flex items-center transition-all hover:bg-black group/profile overflow-hidden
205:               /* Mobile Padding */
206:               p-2
207:               /* Desktop Collapsed */
208:               lg:p-1.5 lg:justify-center
209:               /* Desktop Expanded */
210:               lg:group-hover:p-2 lg:group-hover:justify-start
211:             "
212:             title="Ir a Perfil"
213:           >
214:             <div className="shrink-0 relative transition-all duration-300 lg:scale-110 lg:group-hover:scale-100">
215:               <UserAvatar src={userData?.fotoUrl} name={userData?.nombre} size="sm" className="border border-slate-700 shadow-md group-hover/profile:scale-105 transition-transform" />
216:               {/* Status indicator */}
217:               <div className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-green-500 border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-full"></div>
218:             </div>
219:             <div className={`
220:               min-w-0 flex-col justify-center transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
221:               /* Mobile */
222:               ml-3 flex
223:               /* Desktop Collapsed */
224:               lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0 lg:ml-0
225:               /* Desktop Expanded */
226:               lg:group-hover:max-w-xs lg:group-hover:opacity-100 lg:group-hover:flex lg:group-hover:ml-3
227:             `}>
228:               <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white truncate tracking-tight">
229:                 {(userData?.nombre && userData?.nombre !== 'Usuario')
230:                   ? userData.nombre.replace(/^\d+\s+/, '').split(' ')[0]
231:                   : (userData?.email ? userData.email.split('@')[0] : 'Usuario')}
232:               </p>
233:               <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold truncate uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5">
234:                 {userData?.rol || 'Alumno'}
235:               </p>
236:             </div>
237:           </NavLink>
238:           <div className="mt-2 text-center">
239:             <button
240:               onClick={logout}
241:               title="Cerrar Sesión"
242:               className="w-full flex items-center transition-all duration-300 group/logout rounded-xl text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700/40
243:                 /* Mobile Padding */
244:                 p-3
245:                 /* Desktop Collapsed */
246:                 lg:p-3 lg:justify-center
247:                 /* Desktop Expanded */
248:                 lg:group-hover:px-4 lg:group-hover:justify-start
249:               "
250:             >
251:               <div className="shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300
252:                 /* Mobile */
253:                 w-6 h-6
254:                 /* Desktop Collapsed */
255:                 lg:w-8 lg:h-8
256:                 /* Desktop Expanded */
257:                 lg:group-hover:w-6 lg:group-hover:h-6
258:               ">
259:                 <LogOut className="group-hover/logout:scale-125 group-hover/logout:animate-[icon-shake_0.4s_ease-out] transition-all duration-300 w-[18px] h-[18px] lg:w-5 lg:h-5 lg:group-hover:w-[18px] lg:group-hover:h-[18px]" strokeWidth={2} />
260:               </div>
261:               <div className={`
262:                 transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden flex items-center
263:                 /* Mobile */
264:                 ml-3
265:                 /* Desktop Collapsed */
266:                 lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0 lg:ml-0
267:                 /* Desktop Expanded */
268:                 lg:group-hover:max-w-xs lg:group-hover:opacity-100 lg:group-hover:ml-3
269:               `}>
270:                 <span className="text-xs font-bold whitespace-nowrap">Cerrar Sesión</span>
271:               </div>
272:             </button>
273:           </div>
274:         </div>
275:       </aside>
276:     </>
277:   );
278: }
````

## File: frontend/src/features/projects/components/ProjectDetailsModal.jsx
````javascript
  1: import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
  2: import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
  3: import { X, UserPlus, Trash2, ExternalLink, BookOpen, Hash, Users, Activity, Image as ImageIcon, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Play, Maximize2, Minimize2 } from 'lucide-react';
  4: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  5: import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth';
  6: import { UserAvatar } from '../../../components/UserAvatar';
  7: import api from '../../../lib/axios';
  8: import { EvaluationPanel } from '../../evaluations/components/EvaluationPanel';
  9: import { CanvasEditor } from './CanvasEditor';
 10: import { ProjectPDFExportButton } from './ProjectPDFExport';
 11: import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
 12: export function ProjectDetailsModal({ project: initialProject, onClose, onUpdate }) {
 13:     const { userData } = useAuth();
 14:     // Helper to normalize keys of an object to camelCase
 15:     const normalizeProjectData = (data) => {
 16:         if (!data) return null;
 17:         const normalized = {};
 18:         Object.keys(data).forEach(key => {
 19:             const camelKey = key.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + key.slice(1);
 20:             normalized[camelKey] = data[key];
 21:         });
 22:         // Specific field mapping if needed (e.g. if backend sends weird names)
 23:         // Ensure arrays are initialized
 24:         if (!normalized.members) normalized.members = normalized.miembros || [];
 25:         if (!normalized.miembrosIds) normalized.miembrosIds = [];
 26:         if (!normalized.canvas) normalized.canvas = normalized.canvasBlocks || [];
 27:         // Deep normalize members
 28:         normalized.members = normalized.members.map(m => {
 29:             if (!m) return m;
 30:             const nm = {};
 31:             Object.keys(m).forEach(k => nm[k.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + k.slice(1)] = m[k]);
 32:             return nm;
 33:         });
 34:         // Deep normalize canvas blocks
 35:         normalized.canvas = normalized.canvas.map(b => {
 36:             if (!b) return b;
 37:             const nb = {};
 38:             Object.keys(b).forEach(k => nb[k.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + k.slice(1)] = b[k]);
 39:             return nb;
 40:         });
 41:         return normalized;
 42:     };
 43:     const [project, setProject] = useState(() => normalizeProjectData(initialProject));
 44:     const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('docs'); // 'docs' | 'eval' | 'settings'
 45:     const [newMemberEmail, setNewMemberEmail] = useState('');
 46:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 47:     const [fetchingDetails, setFetchingDetails] = useState(true);
 48:     const [error, setError] = useState('');
 49:     const [editTitle, setEditTitle] = useState(initialProject.titulo || '');
 50:     const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);
 51:     // Custom Confirmation States (to avoid window.confirm/prompt blocking)
 52:     const [deleteStep, setDeleteStep] = useState(0); // 0: none, 1: first confirm, 2: final input
 53:     const [deleteInput, setDeleteInput] = useState('');
 54:     const [memberToRemove, setMemberToRemove] = useState(null); // stores memberId
 55:     // Autocomplete State
 56:     const [availableStudents, setAvailableStudents] = useState([]);
 57:     const [fetchingStudents, setFetchingStudents] = useState(false);
 58:     const [showSuggestions, setShowSuggestions] = useState(false);
 59:     // Carousel State
 60:     const [currentSlide, setCurrentSlide] = useState(0);
 61:     const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);
 62:     const [readMode, setReadMode] = useState(false);
 63:     const videoRef = useRef(null);
 64:     const [isLightboxOpen, setIsLightboxOpen] = useState(false);
 65:     const isLeader = userData?.userId === project?.liderId;
 66:     const isAdmin = userData?.rol === 'Admin' || userData?.rol === 'SuperAdmin';
 67:     const isAssignedTeacher = userData?.rol === 'Docente' && project?.docenteId === userData?.userId;
 68:     const canDelete = isLeader || isAdmin || isAssignedTeacher;
 69:     const canSeeSettings = canDelete;
 70:     // Reset carousel/lightbox state when the project changes
 71:     useEffect(() => {
 72:         setCurrentSlide(0);
 73:         setIsPlaying(false);
 74:         setIsLightboxOpen(false);
 75:         setReadMode(false);
 76:         if (videoRef.current) {
 77:             videoRef.current.pause();
 78:         }
 79:     }, [initialProject?.id]);
 80:     useEffect(() => {
 81:         fetchDetails();
 82:         if (project?.grupoId) {
 83:             fetchAvailableStudents();
 84:         }
 85:     }, [project?.id, project?.grupoId]);
 86:     // Sync internal state if the prop changes externally (e.g. from RankingPage)
 87:     useEffect(() => {
 88:         setProject(normalizeProjectData(initialProject));
 89:     }, [initialProject?.id]);
 90:     const fetchAvailableStudents = async () => {
 91:         setFetchingStudents(true);
 92:         try {
 93:             const response = await api.get(`/api/Teams/available-students?groupId=${project.grupoId}`);
 94:             setAvailableStudents(response.data || []);
 95:         } catch (err) {
 96:             console.error('Error fetching available students:', err);
 97:         } finally {
 98:             setFetchingStudents(false);
 99:         }
100:     };
101:     const fetchDetails = async () => {
102:         try {
103:             const response = await api.get(`/api/projects/${initialProject.id}`);
104:             let projectData = response.data;
105:             // Normalize canvas/canvasBlocks if needed
106:             if (!projectData.canvas) projectData.canvas = projectData.canvasBlocks || [];
107:             setProject(normalizeProjectData(projectData));
108:             setEditTitle(projectData.titulo);
109:         } catch (err) {
110:             console.error('Error fetching details:', err);
111:         } finally {
112:             setFetchingDetails(false);
113:         }
114:     };
115:     const handleAddMember = async (e) => {
116:         if (e) e.preventDefault(); // IMPORTANTE: Evitar recarga de página al usar con un form
117:         if (!newMemberEmail.trim()) return;
118:         setLoading(true);
119:         setError('');
120:         console.log('[MEMBER-DEBUG] handleAddMember triggered for:', newMemberEmail);
121:         try {
122:             const response = await api.post(`/api/Projects/${project.id}/members`, {
123:                 emailOrMatricula: newMemberEmail
124:             });
125:             console.log('[MEMBER-DEBUG] Member added response:', response.data);
126:             await fetchDetails();
127:             setNewMemberEmail('');
128:             setShowSuggestions(false);
129:             onUpdate?.();
130:         } catch (err) {
131:             console.error('[MEMBER-DEBUG] Error adding member:', err);
132:             setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Error al agregar miembro');
133:         } finally {
134:             setLoading(false);
135:         }
136:     };
137:     const handleRemoveMember = async (memberId) => {
138:         console.log('[MEMBER-DEBUG] handleRemoveMember triggered for:', memberId);
139:         // Instead of confirm, we set the state to show the inline UI
140:         setMemberToRemove(memberId);
141:     };
142:     const confirmRemoveMember = async () => {
143:         if (!memberToRemove) return;
144:         const memberId = memberToRemove;
145:         console.log('[MEMBER-DEBUG] confirmRemoveMember ACCEPTED for:', memberId);
146:         setLoading(true);
147:         try {
148:             const url = `/api/Projects/${project.id}/members/${memberId}?requestingUserId=${userData.userId}`;
149:             console.log('[MEMBER-DEBUG] Sending DELETE request to:', url);
150:             const response = await api.delete(url);
151:             console.log('[MEMBER-DEBUG] Remove member response:', response.data);
152:             await fetchDetails();
153:             onUpdate?.();
154:         } catch (err) {
155:             console.error('[MEMBER-DEBUG] Error removing member:', err);
156:             setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Error al eliminar miembro');
157:         } finally {
158:             setLoading(false);
159:             setMemberToRemove(null);
160:         }
161:     };
162:     const handleVisibilityToggle = async () => {
163:         const newStatus = !project.esPublico;
164:         // Optimistic UI update
165:         setProject(prev => ({ ...prev, esPublico: newStatus }));
166:         try {
167:             await api.put(`/api/projects/${project.id}`, {
168:                 titulo: project.titulo,
169:                 videoUrl: project.videoUrl,
170:                 canvasBlocks: project.canvasBlocks || project.canvas, // Send current blocks to avoid data loss
171:                 esPublico: newStatus
172:             });
173:             await onUpdate?.(); // Refresh list to reflect changes
174:         } catch (err) {
175:             console.error('Error updating visibility:', err);
176:             // Revert on error
177:             setProject(prev => ({ ...prev, esPublico: !newStatus }));
178:             alert('Error al cambiar la visibilidad del proyecto');
179:         }
180:     };
181:     const handleUpdateTitle = async () => {
182:         if (!editTitle || editTitle === project.titulo) return;
183:         try {
184:             await api.put(`/api/projects/${project.id}`, {
185:                 titulo: editTitle,
186:                 videoUrl: project.videoUrl,
187:                 canvasBlocks: project.canvasBlocks || project.canvas,
188:                 esPublico: project.esPublico
189:             });
190:             setProject(prev => ({ ...prev, titulo: editTitle }));
191:             await onUpdate?.();
192:             alert('Título actualizado correctamente');
193:         } catch (err) {
194:             console.error('Error updating title:', err);
195:             alert('Error al actualizar el título');
196:         }
197:     };
198:     const handleDeleteProject = async () => {
199:         console.log('[DELETE-DEBUG] handleDeleteProject triggered - Using Custom Modal UI');
200:         setDeleteStep(1); // Show first confirmation
201:     };
202:     const proceedToDeleteStep2 = () => {
203:         console.log('[DELETE-DEBUG] First confirmation ACCEPTED (via UI)');
204:         setDeleteStep(2); // Show input confirmation
205:     };
206:     const executeFinalDelete = async () => {
207:         if (deleteInput !== 'ELIMINAR') {
208:             console.log('[DELETE-DEBUG] Execution blocked: Input was', deleteInput);
209:             if (deleteInput !== null) alert('Para eliminar el proyecto debes escribir exactamente "ELIMINAR"');
210:             return;
211:         }
212:         console.log('[DELETE-DEBUG] Final confirmation ACCEPTED. Proceeding with deletion...');
213:         setIsDeleting(true);
214:         try {
215:             const url = `/api/Projects/${project.id}?requestingUserId=${userData.userId}`;
216:             console.log('[DELETE-DEBUG] Sending DELETE request to:', url);
217:             const response = await api.delete(url);
218:             console.log('[DELETE-DEBUG] Delete response received:', response.data);
219:             alert('Proyecto eliminado exitosamente');
220:             onUpdate?.();
221:             onClose(); 
222:         } catch (err) {
223:             console.error('[DELETE-DEBUG] Error deleting project:', err);
224:             const errorMsg = err.response?.data?.message || err.response?.data || err.message;
225:             alert('Error al eliminar el proyecto: ' + errorMsg);
226:         } finally {
227:             setIsDeleting(false);
228:             setDeleteStep(0);
229:             setDeleteInput('');
230:             console.log('[DELETE-DEBUG] Deletion process finished');
231:         }
232:     };
233:     if (!project) return <div>Cargando...</div>;
234:     // Leader Name Resolution
235:     const leader = project?.members?.find(m => m.id === project.liderId);
236:     const creadorNombre = leader
237:         ? (leader.nombre !== 'Usuario' ? leader.nombre : leader.email)
238:         : (project?.liderNombre || 'Desconocido');
239:     // Gather Media Items
240:     const mediaItems = [];
241:     if (project.videoUrl && project.videoUrl.trim() !== '' && project.videoUrl !== 'null') {
242:         mediaItems.push({ type: 'video', url: project.videoUrl, thumbnail: project.thumbnailUrl });
243:     }
244:     if (project.thumbnailUrl && project.thumbnailUrl.trim() !== '' && project.thumbnailUrl !== 'null' && !mediaItems.some(item => item.url === project.thumbnailUrl)) {
245:         mediaItems.push({ type: 'image', url: project.thumbnailUrl });
246:     }
247:     if (project.canvas) {
248:         const canvasMedia = project.canvas
249:             .filter(b => (b.type === 'image' || b.type === 'video') && b.content && b.content !== project.thumbnailUrl)
250:             .map(b => ({ type: b.type, url: b.content }));
251:         mediaItems.push(...canvasMedia);
252:     }
253:     if (mediaItems.length === 0) mediaItems.push({ type: 'placeholder' });
254:     const currentMedia = mediaItems[currentSlide] || mediaItems[0];
255:     const nextSlide = (e) => {
256:         e.stopPropagation();
257:         setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev + 1) % mediaItems.length);
258:         setIsPlaying(false);
259:     };
260:     const prevSlide = (e) => {
261:         e.stopPropagation();
262:         setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev - 1 + mediaItems.length) % mediaItems.length);
263:         setIsPlaying(false);
264:     };
265:     return (
266:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden relative">
267:             {/* Master-Detail Layout — Immersive, no outer padding */}
268:             <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row flex-1 overflow-hidden bg-black relative z-10">
269:                 {/* Left Column: Media Carousel */}
270:                 <motion.div
271:                     initial={false}
272:                     animate={{ width: readMode ? '0%' : '66%', opacity: readMode ? 0 : 1 }}
273:                     transition={{ duration: 0.35, ease: 'easeInOut' }}
274:                     className="relative bg-black flex-col items-center justify-center p-0 group overflow-hidden hidden lg:flex shrink-0"
275:                     style={{ minWidth: readMode ? 0 : undefined }}
276:                     onMouseEnter={() => {
277:                         if (currentMedia?.type === 'video') {
278:                             setIsPlaying(true);
279:                             videoRef.current?.play().catch(() => { });
280:                         }
281:                     }}
282:                     onMouseLeave={() => {
283:                         if (currentMedia?.type === 'video') {
284:                             setIsPlaying(false);
285:                             videoRef.current?.pause();
286:                         }
287:                     }}
288:                 >
289:                     <div className="w-full h-full relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
290:                         {/* 🌟 EFECTO CINE BACKGROUND 🌟 */}
291:                         {currentMedia.type === 'video' ? (
292:                             <video
293:                                 src={currentMedia.url}
294:                                 muted
295:                                 loop
296:                                 playsInline
297:                                 autoPlay
298:                                 className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover scale-150 opacity-40 blur-[60px] z-0 pointer-events-none"
299:                             />
300:                         ) : currentMedia.type === 'image' ? (
301:                             <img
302:                                 src={currentMedia.url}
303:                                 alt=""
304:                                 className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover scale-150 opacity-40 blur-[60px] z-0 pointer-events-none"
305:                             />
306:                         ) : null}
307:                         {/* FOREGROUND MEDIA - Mantiene object-contain sin recortar */}
308:                         <div className="relative z-10 w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center">
309:                             {currentMedia.type === 'video' ? (
310:                                 <div
311:                                     className="w-full h-full relative flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer"
312:                                     title="Clic para ampliar"
313:                                     onClick={(e) => {
314:                                         e.stopPropagation();
315:                                         setIsLightboxOpen(true);
316:                                     }}
317:                                 >
318:                                     <video
319:                                         ref={videoRef}
320:                                         src={currentMedia.url}
321:                                         loop
322:                                         muted
323:                                         playsInline
324:                                         className={`w-full h-full object-contain transition-opacity duration-500 drop-shadow-2xl ${isPlaying ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-80'}`}
325:                                     />
326:                                     {!isPlaying && (
327:                                         <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
328:                                             <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border border-white/30 shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group-hover:scale-110">
329:                                                 <Play fill="white" className="text-white ml-1" size={40} />
330:                                             </div>
331:                                         </div>
332:                                     )}
333:                                     <span className="absolute bottom-6 left-6 px-3 py-1.5 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-md rounded-md text-white text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border border-white/20 shadow-lg pointer-events-none z-10">
334:                                         Video Pitch
335:                                     </span>
336:                                 </div>
337:                             ) : currentMedia.type === 'image' ? (
338:                                 <div
339:                                     className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer p-4"
340:                                     title="Clic para ampliar"
341:                                     onClick={(e) => {
342:                                         e.stopPropagation();
343:                                         setIsLightboxOpen(true);
344:                                     }}
345:                                 >
346:                                     <img
347:                                         src={currentMedia.url}
348:                                         alt={project.titulo}
349:                                         className="w-full h-full object-contain drop-shadow-2xl"
350:                                     />
351:                                 </div>
352:                             ) : (
353:                                 <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-500 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md w-full h-full">
354:                                     <ImageIcon size={64} className="mb-4 opacity-50" />
355:                                     <span className="text-sm font-medium">Sin contenido visual</span>
356:                                 </div>
357:                             )}
358:                         </div>
359:                         {/* Carousel Controls */}
360:                         {mediaItems.length > 1 && (
361:                             <>
362:                                 <button
363:                                     onClick={prevSlide}
364:                                     className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md text-white rounded-full hover:bg-black/80 hover:scale-110 transition-all opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 z-30 shadow-lg cursor-pointer border border-white/10"
365:                                 >
366:                                     <ChevronLeft size={24} />
367:                                 </button>
368:                                 <button
369:                                     onClick={nextSlide}
370:                                     className="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md text-white rounded-full hover:bg-black/80 hover:scale-110 transition-all opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 z-30 shadow-lg cursor-pointer border border-white/10"
371:                                 >
372:                                     <ChevronRight size={24} />
373:                                 </button>
374:                                 {/* Dots Indicator */}
375:                                 <div className="absolute bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-2 z-30 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/10">
376:                                     {mediaItems.map((_, idx) => (
377:                                         <div
378:                                             key={idx}
379:                                             className={`transition-all duration-300 rounded-full shadow-sm cursor-pointer ${idx === currentSlide ? 'bg-white w-2.5 h-2.5' : 'bg-white/40 w-2 h-2 hover:bg-white/70'}`}
380:                                             onClick={(e) => {
381:                                                 e.stopPropagation();
382:                                                 setCurrentSlide(idx);
383:                                             }}
384:                                         />
385:                                     ))}
386:                                 </div>
387:                             </>
388:                         )}
389:                     </div>
390:                 </motion.div>
391:                 {/* Right Column: Info & Content */}
392:                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] border-l border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700/50 relative">
393:                     {/* --- Botón Cerrar Minimalista (Estilo Instagram) --- */}
394:                     <button
395:                         onClick={onClose}
396:                         className="absolute top-4 right-4 z-[100] w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-white transition-all rounded-full hover:bg-gray-100/50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 group/close"
397:                         title="Cerrar"
398:                     >
399:                         <X size={24} strokeWidth={2.2} className="group-hover/close:rotate-90 transition-transform duration-300" />
400:                     </button>
401:                     {/* Integrated Header */}
402:                     <div className="px-6 pt-5 pb-0 shrink-0 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50">
403:                         {/* Title row */}
404:                         <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 mb-3">
405:                             <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
406:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
407:                                     <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight truncate leading-tight">
408:                                         {project.titulo}
409:                                     </h2>
410:                                 </div>
411:                             </div>
412:                             {/* Action buttons */}
413:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0 pr-10">
414:                                 <ProjectPDFExportButton project={project} creadorNombre={creadorNombre} />
415:                                 <button
416:                                     onClick={() => setReadMode(r => !r)}
417:                                     title={readMode ? 'Ver multimedia' : 'Modo lectura'}
418:                                     className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/20 transition-all"
419:                                 >
420:                                     {readMode ? <Minimize2 size={18} /> : <Maximize2 size={18} />}
421:                                 </button>
422:                             </div>
423:                         </div>
424:                         {/* Tabs */}
425:                         <div className="flex justify-between items-center pb-0">
426:                             <div className="flex gap-4">
427:                                 <button
428:                                     onClick={() => setActiveTab('docs')}
429:                                     className={`text-sm font-bold transition-all relative pb-1 ${activeTab === 'docs'
430:                                         ? 'text-blue-600'
431:                                         : 'text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-slate-300'
432:                                         }`}
433:                                 >
434:                                     Info
435:                                     {activeTab === 'docs' && (
436:                                         <span className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-blue-600 rounded-full"></span>
437:                                     )}
438:                                 </button>
439:                                 <button
440:                                     onClick={() => setActiveTab('eval')}
441:                                     className={`text-sm font-bold transition-all relative pb-1 ${activeTab === 'eval'
442:                                         ? 'text-blue-600'
443:                                         : 'text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-slate-300'
444:                                         }`}
445:                                 >
446:                                     Evaluación
447:                                     {activeTab === 'eval' && (
448:                                         <span className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-blue-600 rounded-full"></span>
449:                                     )}
450:                                 </button>
451:                                 {canSeeSettings && (
452:                                     <button
453:                                         onClick={() => setActiveTab('settings')}
454:                                         className={`text-sm font-bold transition-all relative pb-1 ${activeTab === 'settings'
455:                                             ? 'text-blue-600'
456:                                             : 'text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-slate-300'
457:                                             }`}
458:                                     >
459:                                         Ajustes
460:                                         {activeTab === 'settings' && (
461:                                             <span className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-blue-600 rounded-full"></span>
462:                                         )}
463:                                     </button>
464:                                 )}
465:                             </div>
466:                             {/* Edit Button (only visible in docs tab for members/leader) */}
467:                             <div className="flex gap-2">
468:                                 {(isLeader || (project.members || []).some(m => m.id === userData.userId)) && activeTab === 'docs' && (
469:                                     <button
470:                                         onClick={() => window.open(`/project/${project.id}/editor`, '_self')}
471:                                         className="px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full font-bold text-xs text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-100 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/50 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"
472:                                     >
473:                                         <ExternalLink size={14} />
474:                                         Editar Docs
475:                                     </button>
476:                                 )}
477:                             </div>
478:                         </div>
479:                     </div>{/* End Integrated Header */}
480:                     {/* Scrollable Content */}
481:                     <div className={`flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar ${readMode ? 'px-10 py-8 lg:px-20' : 'p-6'}`}>
482:                         {/* Always visible Info header when on docs tab (like Instagram caption) */}
483:                         {activeTab === 'docs' && (
484:                             <div className="mb-8 space-y-6">
485:                                 {/* Leader/Team Meta */}
486:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
487:                                         <Link to={`/profile/${project.liderId}`} className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-blue-500 to-purple-500 flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-white shadow-sm text-white overflow-hidden hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-500 transition-all shrink-0" title="Ver perfil">
488:                                             <UserAvatar src={leader?.fotoUrl || leader?.FotoUrl} name={creadorNombre} size="md" className="w-full h-full" />
489:                                         </Link>
490:                                         <div>
491:                                             <Link to={`/profile/${project.liderId}`} className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">
492:                                                 <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white leading-tight">
493:                                                     {creadorNombre}
494:                                                 </p>
495:                                             </Link>
496:                                             {isLeader && (
497:                                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-0.5">
498:                                                     <button
499:                                                         onClick={handleVisibilityToggle}
500:                                                         className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all flex items-center gap-1 ${project.esPublico
501:                                                             ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/20 dark:text-green-400 hover:bg-green-100'
502:                                                             : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-400 hover:bg-gray-200'
503:                                                             }`}
504:                                                         title={project.esPublico ? 'Click para hacer privado' : 'Click para hacer público'}
505:                                                     >
506:                                                         {project.esPublico ? '🌍 Público' : '🔒 Privado'}
507:                                                     </button>
508:                                                 </div>
509:                                             )}
510:                                         </div>
511:                                     </div>
512:                                 {/* Text Content from Canvas Editor */}
513:                                 <div className={`prose max-w-none text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-300 dark:prose-invert ${readMode ? 'prose-base lg:prose-lg' : 'prose-sm'}`}>
514:                                     <CanvasEditor
515:                                         key={`canvas-editor-${fetchingDetails ? 'loading' : 'loaded'}`}
516:                                         project={project}
517:                                         readOnly={true}
518:                                         mode="text"
````
