````javascript
519:                                     />
520:                                 </div>
521:                                 {/* Squad Divider */}
522:                                 <div className="border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50 pt-6 mt-6">
523:                                     <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
524:                                         <Users size={16} className="text-gray-400" />
525:                                         Squad ({project.miembrosIds?.length || 0}/5)
526:                                     </h3>
527:                                     {/* Add Member Combobox */}
528:                                     {isLeader && (
529:                                         <form onSubmit={handleAddMember} className="mb-4 relative">
530:                                             <div className="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl p-1.5 flex items-center gap-2">
531:                                                 <div className="relative flex-1">
532:                                                     <input
533:                                                         type="text"
534:                                                         value={newMemberEmail}
535:                                                         onChange={(e) => {
536:                                                             setNewMemberEmail(e.target.value);
537:                                                             setShowSuggestions(true);
538:                                                         }}
539:                                                         onFocus={() => setShowSuggestions(true)}
540:                                                         onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setShowSuggestions(false), 200)}
541:                                                         placeholder="Buscar por matrícula o nombre..."
542:                                                         className="w-full bg-transparent px-3 py-1 outline-none text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-white placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-slate-500"
543:                                                         disabled={loading || fetchingStudents}
544:                                                     />
545:                                                     {/* Suggestions Dropdown */}
546:                                                     {showSuggestions && newMemberEmail && (
547:                                                         <div className="absolute z-50 top-full left-0 right-0 mt-2 bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] rounded-xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700 shadow-xl overflow-hidden max-h-60 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
548:                                                             {fetchingStudents ? (
549:                                                                 <div className="p-4 text-center text-xs text-gray-500">Cargando compañeros...</div>
550:                                                             ) : availableStudents.filter(s =>
551:                                                             (s.nombreCompleto?.toLowerCase().includes(newMemberEmail.toLowerCase()) ||
552:                                                                 s.matricula?.toLowerCase().includes(newMemberEmail.toLowerCase()) ||
553:                                                                 s.email?.toLowerCase().includes(newMemberEmail.toLowerCase()))
554:                                                             ).length > 0 ? (
555:                                                                 availableStudents.filter(s =>
556:                                                                 (s.nombreCompleto?.toLowerCase().includes(newMemberEmail.toLowerCase()) ||
557:                                                                     s.matricula?.toLowerCase().includes(newMemberEmail.toLowerCase()) ||
558:                                                                     s.email?.toLowerCase().includes(newMemberEmail.toLowerCase()))
559:                                                                 ).map(student => (
560:                                                                     <div
561:                                                                         key={student.id}
562:                                                                         onClick={() => {
563:                                                                             setNewMemberEmail(student.matricula || student.email);
564:                                                                             setShowSuggestions(false);
565:                                                                         }}
566:                                                                         className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 cursor-pointer border-b border-gray-50 dark:border-slate-700/50 last:border-0 transition-colors"
567:                                                                     >
568:                                                                         <UserAvatar src={student.fotoUrl || student.FotoUrl} name={student.nombreCompleto || 'U'} size="sm" className="bg-gradient-to-tr from-blue-100 to-purple-100 text-blue-600 shrink-0" />
569:                                                                         <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
570:                                                                             <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white truncate">
571:                                                                                 {student.nombreCompleto && student.nombreCompleto.trim() !== '' ? student.nombreCompleto : (student.email || 'Estudiante')}
572:                                                                             </p>
573:                                                                             <p className="text-[11px] font-medium text-gray-400 truncate uppercase mt-0.5">
574:                                                                                 {student.matricula || student.email}
575:                                                                             </p>
576:                                                                         </div>
577:                                                                         <UserPlus size={14} className="text-gray-300" />
578:                                                                     </div>
579:                                                                 ))
580:                                                             ) : (
581:                                                                 <div className="p-4 text-center text-xs text-gray-500">No se encontraron compañeros disponibles.</div>
582:                                                             )}
583:                                                         </div>
584:                                                     )}
585:                                                 </div>
586:                                                 <button
587:                                                     type="submit"
588:                                                     disabled={loading || !newMemberEmail}
589:                                                     className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs font-bold shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
590:                                                 >
591:                                                     Agregar
592:                                                 </button>
593:                                             </div>
594:                                             {error && <p className="text-xs text-red-500 mt-2 ml-2 font-medium">{error}</p>}
595:                                         </form>
596:                                     )}
597:                                     {/* Members List */}
598:                                     <div className="space-y-2">
599:                                         {fetchingDetails ? (
600:                                             <div className="space-y-2">
601:                                                 {[1, 2, 3].map(i => <div key={i} className="h-12 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl animate-pulse" />)}
602:                                             </div>
603:                                         ) : (
604:                                             (project.members || []).length > 0 ? (
605:                                                 (project.members || []).map((member, idx) => (
606:                                                     <motion.div
607:                                                         key={member.id || idx}
608:                                                         initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 5 }}
609:                                                         animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
610:                                                         transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
611:                                                         className="p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between group transition-colors"
612:                                                     >
613:                                                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
614:                                                             <Link to={`/profile/${member.id}`} className="shrink-0 rounded-full hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-500 transition-all" title="Ver perfil">
615:                                                                 <UserAvatar src={member.fotoUrl || member.FotoUrl} name={member.nombre || 'U'} size="sm" className="bg-gray-200" />
616:                                                             </Link>
617:                                                             <div>
618:                                                                 <Link to={`/profile/${member.id}`} className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">
619:                                                                     <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white leading-none">
620:                                                                         {(member.nombre && member.nombre !== 'Usuario') ? member.nombre : (member.email || 'Miembro')}
621:                                                                     </p>
622:                                                                 </Link>
623:                                                                 <p className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 mt-1 leading-none">{member.rol || 'Miembro'}</p>
624:                                                             </div>
625:                                                         </div>
626:                                                         {member.id === project.liderId ? (
627:                                                             <span className="text-[10px] font-bold bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 px-2 py-1 rounded-md">Líder</span>
628:                                                         ) : (
629:                                                             (isLeader || userData?.userId === member.id) && (
630:                                                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
631:                                                                     {memberToRemove === member.id ? (
632:                                                                         <>
633:                                                                             <button
634:                                                                                 onClick={() => confirmRemoveMember()}
635:                                                                                 disabled={loading}
636:                                                                                 className="px-2 py-1 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold rounded hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors"
637:                                                                             >
638:                                                                                 Confirmar
639:                                                                             </button>
640:                                                                             <button
641:                                                                                 onClick={() => setMemberToRemove(null)}
642:                                                                                 className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-[10px] font-bold rounded hover:bg-gray-300 transition-colors"
643:                                                                             >
644:                                                                                 X
645:                                                                             </button>
646:                                                                         </>
647:                                                                     ) : (
648:                                                                         <button
649:                                                                             onClick={() => handleRemoveMember(member.id)}
650:                                                                             className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-md transition-colors opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100"
651:                                                                         >
652:                                                                             <Trash2 size={14} />
653:                                                                         </button>
654:                                                                     )}
655:                                                                 </div>
656:                                                             )
657:                                                         )}
658:                                                     </motion.div>
659:                                                 ))
660:                                             ) : (
661:                                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 text-center py-2">No hay miembros aún.</p>
662:                                             )
663:                                         )}
664:                                     </div>
665:                                     <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between text-[10px] text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest mt-8 pt-4 border-t border-gray-50 dark:border-slate-800/30 gap-2">
666:                                         <span>Ciclo {project.ciclo} • {project.materia}</span>
667:                                         <span>
668:                                             {(() => {
669:                                                 if (!project.createdAt) return null;
670:                                                 const date = project.createdAt.seconds ? new Date(project.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(project.createdAt);
671:                                                 return isNaN(date.getTime()) ? null : date.toLocaleDateString('es-ES', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }).toUpperCase();
672:                                             })()}
673:                                         </span>
674:                                     </div>
675:                                 </div>
676:                             </div>
677:                         )}
678:                         {activeTab === 'eval' && (
679:                             <div className="p-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto pb-20 animate-fadeIn">
680:                                 <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
681:                                     <Activity size={20} className="text-blue-500" />
682:                                     Evaluación y Rúbrica
683:                                 </h3>
684:                                 <EvaluationPanel projectId={project.id} />
685:                             </div>
686:                         )}
687:                         {activeTab === 'settings' && canSeeSettings && (
688:                             <div className="p-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto pb-20 space-y-6 animate-fadeIn">
689:                                 <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
690:                                     <Hash size={20} className="text-blue-500" />
691:                                     Ajustes del Proyecto
692:                                 </h3>
693:                                 {/* Edit Title - Solo para el líder */}
694:                                 {isLeader && (
695:                                     <>
696:                                         <div className="space-y-2">
697:                                             <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase">Título del Proyecto</label>
698:                                             <div className="flex gap-2">
699:                                                 <input
700:                                                     type="text"
701:                                                     value={editTitle}
702:                                                     onChange={(e) => setEditTitle(e.target.value)}
703:                                                     className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-white border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 dark:focus:ring-slate-600 focus:border-blue-400 dark:focus:border-slate-500 outline-none transition-all"
704:                                                 />
705:                                                 <button
706:                                                     onClick={handleUpdateTitle}
707:                                                     disabled={!editTitle || editTitle === project.titulo}
708:                                                     className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-bold hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all"
709:                                                 >
710:                                                     Guardar
711:                                                 </button>
712:                                             </div>
713:                                         </div>
714:                                         {/* Visibility Toggle */}
715:                                         <div className="space-y-2 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700/50">
716:                                             <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase">Visibilidad</label>
717:                                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 dark:border-slate-700">
718:                                                 <div>
719:                                                     <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">{project.esPublico ? 'Público' : 'Privado'}</p>
720:                                                     <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-0.5 max-w-[200px]">
721:                                                         {project.esPublico
722:                                                             ? 'Visible en la galería general.'
723:                                                             : 'Solo visible para el equipo y profesores.'}
724:                                                     </p>
725:                                                 </div>
726:                                                 <button
727:                                                     onClick={handleVisibilityToggle}
728:                                                     className={`px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all ${project.esPublico
729:                                                         ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 hover:bg-green-200'
730:                                                         : 'bg-white dark:bg-slate-700 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-600 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-600'
731:                                                         }`}
732:                                                 >
733:                                                     {project.esPublico ? 'Hacer Privado' : 'Hacer Público'}
734:                                                 </button>
735:                                             </div>
736:                                         </div>
737:                                     </>
738:                                 )}
739:                                 {/* Danger Zone */}
740:                                 <div className="pt-6 mt-6 border-t border-red-100">
741:                                     <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-red-500 uppercase mb-3 flex items-center gap-1.5">
742:                                         <Trash2 size={14} /> Zona de Peligro
743:                                     </h4>
744:                                     <div className="p-3 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/10 rounded-xl border border-red-100 dark:border-red-900/20 flex flex-col gap-3">
745:                                         <div>
746:                                             <p className="text-sm font-bold text-red-700">Eliminar Proyecto</p>
747:                                             <p className="text-[11px] text-red-500/80 mt-0.5">
748:                                                 Acción irreversible. Eliminará contenido y liberará al equipo.
749:                                             </p>
750:                                         </div>
751:                                         {deleteStep === 0 && (
752:                                             <button
753:                                                 onClick={handleDeleteProject}
754:                                                 className="w-full py-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-900/30 text-red-600 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white hover:border-red-600 transition-all shadow-sm"
755:                                             >
756:                                                 Eliminar Definitivamente
757:                                             </button>
758:                                         )}
759:                                         {deleteStep === 1 && (
760:                                             <div className="space-y-3 animate-fadeIn">
761:                                                 <p className="text-xs font-bold text-red-600 bg-red-100 p-2 rounded-lg text-center">
762:                                                     ⚠️ ¿ESTÁS SEGURO? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
763:                                                 </p>
764:                                                 <div className="flex gap-2">
765:                                                     <button
766:                                                         onClick={proceedToDeleteStep2}
767:                                                         className="flex-1 py-1.5 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-red-700 transition-all"
768:                                                     >
769:                                                         Sí, continuar
770:                                                     </button>
771:                                                     <button
772:                                                         onClick={() => setDeleteStep(0)}
773:                                                         className="flex-1 py-1.5 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-gray-300 dark:hover:bg-slate-600 transition-all"
774:                                                     >
775:                                                         Cancelar
776:                                                     </button>
777:                                                 </div>
778:                                             </div>
779:                                         )}
780:                                         {deleteStep === 2 && (
781:                                             <div className="space-y-3 animate-fadeIn">
782:                                                 <div className="space-y-1">
783:                                                     <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-600 uppercase">Escribe "ELIMINAR" para confirmar</label>
784:                                                     <input
785:                                                         type="text"
786:                                                         value={deleteInput}
787:                                                         onChange={(e) => setDeleteInput(e.target.value)}
788:                                                         placeholder="ELIMINAR"
789:                                                         className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border border-red-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg text-sm text-gray-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 outline-none placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-slate-500"
790:                                                     />
791:                                                 </div>
792:                                                 <div className="flex gap-2">
793:                                                     <button
794:                                                         onClick={executeFinalDelete}
795:                                                         disabled={deleteInput !== 'ELIMINAR' || isDeleting}
796:                                                         className="flex-1 py-1.5 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-red-700 transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:bg-gray-400"
797:                                                     >
798:                                                         {isDeleting ? 'Eliminando...' : 'CONFIRMAR ELIMINACIÓN'}
799:                                                     </button>
800:                                                     <button
801:                                                         onClick={() => {
802:                                                             setDeleteStep(0);
803:                                                             setDeleteInput('');
804:                                                         }}
805:                                                         disabled={isDeleting}
806:                                                         className="flex-1 py-1.5 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-gray-300 dark:hover:bg-slate-600 transition-all"
807:                                                     >
808:                                                         Cancelar
809:                                                     </button>
810:                                                 </div>
811:                                             </div>
812:                                         )}
813:                                     </div>
814:                                 </div>
815:                             </div>
816:                         )}
817:                     </div>
818:                 </div>
819:                 {/* --- LIGHTBOX OVERLAY --- */}
820:                 {isLightboxOpen && createPortal(
821:                     <div
822:                         className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-md group/lightbox"
823:                         onClick={() => setIsLightboxOpen(false)}
824:                     >
825:                         <button
826:                             className="absolute top-6 right-6 p-3 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white transition-all z-50 cursor-pointer opacity-0 group-hover/lightbox:opacity-100 duration-300"
827:                             onClick={(e) => {
828:                                 e.stopPropagation();
829:                                 setIsLightboxOpen(false);
830:                             }}
831:                         >
832:                             <X size={32} />
833:                         </button>
834:                         {mediaItems.length > 1 && (
835:                             <>
836:                                 <button
837:                                     onClick={(e) => {
838:                                         e.stopPropagation();
839:                                         setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev - 1 + mediaItems.length) % mediaItems.length);
840:                                     }}
841:                                     className="absolute left-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-4 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white transition-all z-50 cursor-pointer"
842:                                 >
843:                                     <ChevronLeft size={36} />
844:                                 </button>
845:                                 <button
846:                                     onClick={(e) => {
847:                                         e.stopPropagation();
848:                                         setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev + 1) % mediaItems.length);
849:                                     }}
850:                                     className="absolute right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-4 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full text-white transition-all z-50 cursor-pointer"
851:                                 >
852:                                     <ChevronRight size={36} />
853:                                 </button>
854:                             </>
855:                         )}
856:                         <div className="relative w-[90vw] h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
857:                             {currentMedia.type === 'video' ? (
858:                                 <video
859:                                     src={currentMedia.url}
860:                                     controls
861:                                     autoPlay
862:                                     className="w-full h-full object-contain drop-shadow-2xl rounded-lg pointer-events-auto"
863:                                 />
864:                             ) : currentMedia.type === 'image' ? (
865:                                 <img
866:                                     src={currentMedia.url}
867:                                     alt="Contenido Ampliado"
868:                                     className="w-full h-full object-contain drop-shadow-2xl rounded-lg pointer-events-auto"
869:                                 />
870:                             ) : null}
871:                         </div>
872:                         {mediaItems.length > 1 && (
873:                             <div className="absolute bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-2 z-50 bg-black/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/10">
874:                                 {mediaItems.map((_, idx) => (
875:                                     <div
876:                                         key={idx}
877:                                         className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${idx === currentSlide ? 'bg-white scale-125' : 'bg-white/30 cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/60'}`}
878:                                         onClick={(e) => {
879:                                             e.stopPropagation();
880:                                             setCurrentSlide(idx);
881:                                         }}
882:                                     />
883:                                 ))}
884:                             </div>
885:                         )}
886:                     </div>,
887:                     document.body
888:                 )}
889:             </div>
890:         </div>
891:     );
892: }
````
